Name: Ultracargo
Description:
Somos uma empresa de soluções logísticas integradas que hoje movimenta combustíveis, biocombustíveis, químicos, petroquímicos e óleos vegetais, além de mantermos a posição de liderança entre as empresas independentes de armazenagem de granéis líquidos do país. 

Contamos com mais de 900 colaboradores e somamos mais de 58 anos de história. Fazemos parte do Ultra, um dos maiores grupos empresariais brasileiros.

Com mais de 1 milhão de metros cúbicos de capacidade estática, contamos com terminais de granéis líquidos em quatro regiões brasileiras e estamos conectados aos modais rodoviário, ferroviário, hidroviário e dutoviário. Nossos terminais estão localizados em Rondonópolis (MT) e nos Portos de Santos (SP), Rio de Janeiro (RJ), Aratu (BA), Suape (PE), Itaqui (MA) e Vila do Conde (PA). Temos 50% de participação na Opla, que opera um terminal de etanol em Paulínia (SP) e iniciamos a construção de um novo terminal em Palmeirante (TO).

Venha fazer parte do nosso time!

Name: TPC Logística Inteligente
Description:
Com mais de 24 anos de atuação no mercado, a TPC é um dos principais Operadores Logísticos do Brasil, presente em 24 estados do país e com  mais de 12.000 colaboradores.
Nossas 140 operações  contam com 850.000 m² de área de armazenagem, 3 milhões de entregas por ano, e 600 mil posições pallets.
A TPC Logística Inteligente possui a solução ideal para cada necessidade, focando sempre em Lean & Green Logistics.

Name: Bandeirantes Deicmar
Description:
A Bandeirantes Deicmar atua em operações de importação, exportação, transporte e distribuição de cargas. O grupo é composto por terminais marítimo e de contêineres, armazém alfandegado de importação e exportação, centro de distribuição e transporte rodoviário. Possui uma transportadora, com frota própria de caminhões, e serviços que englobam toda a cadeia logística, da importação à distribuição.

#juntossomosmaisfortes

Name: Ageo Terminais
Description:
Ser um terminal de excelência é o nosso maior propósito. E aqui tem gente de respeito, que atua com qualidade, colocando o Cliente no centro do negócio. Juntos, somos agentes de mudança, protagonistas, e queremos ir muito além da entrega. Queremos ouvir nossos Clientes, transformar suas sugestões, reclamações e elogios em ações concretas e entender que sempre é possível fazer melhor.

Queremos crescer, mas não sozinhos. O crescimento dos nossos terminais é representado pelo sucesso de todos que compartilham conosco esse propósito. Nossa essência é ousar sonhar com a conquista de objetivos ainda maiores. Sonhamos. Sonhamos muito. Sonhamos o tempo todo. E traçamos novas metas, objetivos e, enfim, conquistamos os nossos sonhos.

Quando iniciamos nossas operações ninguém acreditou que poderíamos nos tornar referência em terminais de granéis líquidos do Porto de Santos, o maior porto da América Latina. Fomos lá e conquistamos. Sonhamos em ter mais um terminal. Fomos lá e conquistamos. Sonhamos com a implementação do primeiro berço de atracação privativo. Conquistamos. Estávamos satisfeitos? Não! Então sonhamos com o terceiro terminal em operação. Se você entendeu a nossa essência, já sabe a resposta: conquistamos!

Tudo isso foi conquistado porque todos nós fazemos acontecer. Somos gente que acredita que dá para fazer mais e melhor, gente que quer voar longe, gente que olha para o horizonte e com confiança diz: “Eu quero chegar lá!” Nascemos para ser gigante. E quem nasce com essa essência não deixa de sonhar nunca. Nossa essência nos conduz!

Name: Cargoz.com
Description:
At Cargoz, we believe storage should be simple, flexible, and accessible — not complicated or rigid.

Since our launch in 2022, our primary goal has been to make warehouse space available to businesses of all sizes. Businesses do not need to learn complex logistics jargon to grow. They should be able to find the right space, at the right time, with clarity and confidence.

With us, businesses can:
 - Find and book warehouse space instantly by location, size, or type.
 - Pay only for what they use — no lock-ins, no hidden fees.
 - Scale storage up or down as their needs change.
 - Network of over 800+ verified warehouses across the UAE and KSA.
 - Rely on a transparent, flexible network of trusted partners.

Today, over 2,000 businesses trust Cargoz with their storage needs across more than 7 million square feet of available storage space — and it’s growing every day. From food-grade to dangerous goods, frozen to open yards, we provide the flexibility growing businesses want.

At Cargoz, flexibility meets empathy. We’re reimagining an industry long known for rigid terms into one built on trust, simplicity, and customer love.

But beyond storage, we have a deeper mission: we’re building the world’s most loved warehousing experience.

Name: Cooperativa Reg.Cafeic. Guaxupé
Description:
Warehouse

Name: SCDP (Cameroon Petroleum Depots Company)

Name: Comfrio - Inteligência em Soluções Logísticas
Description:
A Comfrio é a maior empresa brasileira de inteligência em soluções logísticas de frio para a cadeia de alimentos e agronegócios.  Com mais de 20 anos de história, desenvolve soluções para cuidar do alimento no Brasil desde a distribuição de sementes para o agronegócio até operações de restaurantes de cadeias de food service. Sempre pautada pelo compromisso com seus clientes, a empresa desenvolve suas atividades com qualidade superior para garantir que o alimento chegue à mesa dos brasileiros com integridade absoluta e para viabilizar o sucesso dos negócios de seus clientes.
Para isso, a Comfrio se vale da mais alta tecnologia e de infraestrutura que reúne 27 centros de distribuição em todas as regiões do Brasil e capacidade de armazenagem de mais de 1 milhão de metros cúbicos.
Seja bem-vindo, nós somos a COMFRIO.

A Superfrio é uma empresa jovem, dinâmica e com alta capacidade de investimento. Concentra recursos tanto em elevados padrões de qualidade quanto em novos projetos que antecipem o crescimento de seus clientes.

MISSÃO

através da gestão da cadeia de alimentos com temperatura controlada

VISÃO
TOP 5 mundial em infraestrutura logística de alimentos
50 CDs com 5 milhões m3 , 500 veículos e volume de 500 mil T/mês

Name: IndoSpace
Description:
IndoSpace is India’s largest investor, developer, and manager of Grade A industrial and logistics real estate. Since its inception in 2007, we have revolutionized the industry to meet India’s ever-rising demands around industrialization and the warehousing and supply chain ecosystem.

With over $3.2 bn in investment, we are the only pan-India industrial and logistics park developer with 52 operational and under development parks spread over 58 million square feet. Our logistics parks are equipped with world-class warehousing, industrial, and logistics facilities located in and around the major industrial corridors/consumption hubs.

We offer ready space and build-to-suit solutions and continuously add land parcels, providing clients with easy expansion options in prime locations that reduce total logistics costs.

IndoSpace Logistics Parks and warehouses are the first projects in India to be certified with the prestigious India Green Building Council (IGBC) Platinum rating. In addition, we are also the first company in India to be awarded the esteemed ‘Excellence in Design for Greater Efficiencies’ (EDGE) certification for our industrial parks.

Our award-winning warehousing and logistics parks have consistently set benchmarks for the industry. Our dedication to best practices has won us various awards, including being named ‘Best Developer of Industrial/Warehouse Real Estate in India’ by the reputed Euromoney magazine for seven consecutive years since 2015. Euromoney also ranks IndoSpace amongst the top two industrial park developers in India.

What makes IndoSpace the partner-of-choice for companies looking for warehouses and logistics parks in India, is the combination of our strategic land bank, world-class infrastructure and amenities, backed by our unwavering commitment to provide best-in-class solutions.

Maybe it involves only one of our core offerings. At Warehousing Express, it's never stopped us from striving for it in every facet of fulfilling the customer expectation.

Description: Número 1 em infraestrutura flexível para armazenagem e cobertura. São mais de 3 milhões de m² de área instalada em todo Brasil.

Name: Welspun One
Description:
Welspun One is India’s leading integrated fund and development management platform focused on logistics and industrial real estate. Backed by the Welspun World group, the company is committed to developing high-quality, institutional-grade assets across key warehousing and industrial hubs. With a robust portfolio spanning major cities and marquee projects such as the WTC Nhava Sheva port-based logistics park and the World Trade Center, Thane, Welspun One continues to set new benchmarks in the Logistics & Industrial (L&I) sector.

Welspun One’s unique integrated offering allows it to mobilize capital from its investors by providing them with an opportunity to participate in, and profit from, the growth and development of the warehousing sector in India in a transparent and institutional manner and utilize this capital along with their in-house development expertise to deliver best-in-class warehousing infrastructure to its clients.

Name: Horizon Industrial Parks
Description:
At Horizon Industrial Parks, our purpose is to enable our customers to succeed by proactively delivering agile solutions for accelerated growth. 

We practice a unique consultative approach that is a combination of our local domain expertise and our unparalleled global experience thanks to our parent company Blackstone, a world leader in real estate investing. This dual advantage helps us offer end-to-end solutions to our customers for optimising design, controlling costs and improving efficiency.

Our integrated solutions for strategic land acquisition, park compliances and approvals, asset development and property management empower our customers to get a head start and focus on their core business. 

Each of our 18 Grade A industrial and logistics parks is built to world-class standards to serve the unique needs of each of our ambitious clients. Spread over 1000 acres and with a development potential of over 25 MSFT located in eight key markets in India, including Delhi-NCR, Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Ahmedabad, Nagpur, and Goa, our parks are home to leading global brands across sectors such as third-party logistics, e-Commerce, Automobile, Aerospace, Engineering, and Retail. 

Our commitment to ESG runs deep, working at multiple levels to tackle the different dimensions of sustainable development. From green initiatives to nurture the environment at our parks and embedding safe recycling practices to driving inclusivity as a key tenet of social development, we hold our vision of a cleaner, greener and safer tomorrow close to our hearts.

Our values underpin everything we do and serve as our everyday North Star. We are agile in our mindset, collaborative in our approach, and drive excellence in all spheres of our work.

To learn more, click on the website link below.

Name: V-Logis
Description: Driving supply chain efficiency nationwide. Your trusted partner for specialized warehousing and comprehensive end-to-end supply chain solutions across India. Proudly backed by the strength and legacy of the V-Trans group, we deliver efficiency and reliability for your logistics needs.

Name: Plaza Logística
Description:
En Plaza Logística, somos mucho más que una empresa. Somos una visión de excelencia en infraestructura
logística, impulsada por la innovación, la sustentabilidad y la gobernanza. Desarrollamos y operamos parques
logísticos estratégicamente ubicados bajo los más altos estándares de calidad, seguridad e higiene, y con un
fuerte compromiso con el medioambiente. Adoptamos estándares ambientales LEED y/o EDGE en el proceso de
construcción de nuestros parques y certificamos nuestra administración de acuerdo con las Normas ISO 9001,
ISO 14001 e ISO 45001.

Creemos en asociaciones de largo plazo, trabajando en estrecha colaboración con grandes clientes de retail, e-
commerce, consumo masivo, entre otros sectores. Como líderes del sector, nuestro enfoque es claro: crear un entorno ideal para que las empresas alcancen sus objetivos comerciales. En Plaza Logística, somos referentes a la hora de crear espacios que impulsen el crecimiento de nuestros clientes.

En términos de financiamiento, hemos desarrollado una sólida relación con organismos multilaterales de crédito
(BID | Invest, DFC), fuimos admitidos al Régimen de Oferta Pública en el mercado de capitales de Argentina en diciembre de 2017, y mantenemos relación con bancos internacionales y de capital nacional. En el año 2019, nos convertimos en la primera compañía privada en Argentina en emitir un Bono Verde, mediante el re-
etiquetamiento de un Bono emitido en el año 2017. En el año 2021, logramos ser la primera compañía privada
en Argentina en emitir un Bono Sostenible (verde + social).

Conocenos y descubrí cómo estamos transformando el mundo de la infraestructura logística!
Location: Comuna 1, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Cattalini Terminais Marítimos

Com larga experiência na movimentação de graneis líquidos, a Cattalini é considerada referência internacional no mercado e detém reputação de excelência por seus clientes, incluindo empresas nacionais e multinacionais de relevância nos setores de energia e agronegócio.

A Cattalini movimenta anualmente mais de 2 milhões de m³ de graneis líquidos e opera a partir de 2 terminais em Paranaguá, alfandegados e certificados como entrepostos aduaneiros. A Cattalini está certificada por órgãos internacionais e independentes como Bureau Veritas e CDI-T, além de ser considerada pela Conportos como instalação portuária padrão ISPS Code.

Name: Andreani Grupo Logístico Brasil
Description:
Desde 1945 desenvolvemos a mais ampla variedade de serviços logísticos, oferecendo soluções integrais para gestão e distribuição de encomendas industriais e comerciais.

Contamos com 80 anos de experiência em logística, oferecendo as melhores soluções nos serviços de armazenagem e distribuição de produtos de diversos segmentos na Argentina. Com uma carteira de mais de 800 clientes, somos considerados o principal operador logístico.

O compromisso com o negócio de nossos clientes, interpretar suas necessidades logísticas e aprofundar os mercados em que participam e o nosso principal valor. A partir de uma relação de confiança mútua construímos vínculos de aliados estratégicos e acompanhamos o crescimento de nossos clientes contribuindo com soluções inovadoras para responder as expectativas de seus clientes finais.

Name: National Bulk Handling Corporation Pvt. Ltd
Description:
For over two decades, NBHC has been recognized for its commitment to service excellence, trusted risk management practices, and strong governance standards. We set industry benchmarks in the procurement, handling, storage, and upkeep of agri-commodities and collateral, serving clients across India’s major business and trade centres.

Corporates, traders, processors, millers, FPOs, banks, and financial institutions rely on our expertise to enhance operational efficiency and drive long-term growth. Through our diversified businesses—Professional Warehousing, Collateral Management, Trade Facilitation & Supply chain Solutions,  Procurement of Agri-Commodities, Pest Management & Fumigation, Audit & Accreditation, and technology-enabled value-added Data Services—we deliver tailored solutions that strengthen India’s agri-ecosystem.

Expanding our solutions portfolio, we now offer Quality Assaying & Inspection and Rake Management Services, ensuring reliable quality assurance throughout procurement, transit, storage, and dispatch. NBHC’s tech-driven Rake Management boosts efficiency and profitability, providing customers with real-time tracking, automated logs, and actionable insights to reduce delays and optimize stock movement.

As a knowledge-driven and technology-led organization, we continue to advance transformation in the agri sector. Our digital-first approach strengthens service lines, enables robust paperless operations, and upholds the highest standards of transparency and governance. The trust placed in us by our stakeholders remains central to our mission.

Backed by strong values, a proven 20-year track record, and the strategic support of True North, we are well-positioned for sustained growth. We remain committed to shaping the future of India’s agri-sector through innovation-led warehousing excellence and by delivering lasting value to all our stakeholders.

Name: Bidvest Tank Terminals
Description:
We pride ourselves on being the best stewards and handlers possible. Island View Storage (Pty) Ltd trading as Bidvest Tank Terminals was established in 1953 – and as the foremost independent bulk liquid and gas storage operator in South Africa, we are dedicated to every customer we serve.

We handle over three billion litres of our customers’ product every year. This includes chemicals, gases, fats and oils, base oils, lube oil additives and petroleum products.

With over seventy customers, we handle more than 150 types of product – stored in over 560-tanks at our Port of Durban, Port of Richard’s Bay, and Isando sites. This gives us an impressive storage capacity of approximately 868,000 cubic metres.

Name: C. Steinweg Group
Description: C. Steinweg Group is a globally operating service provider in the field of storage, handling, forwarding, chartering and other related logistics services. The organisation is well recognised and respected by all parties involved in the commodity trade business.

Name: United States Cold Storage, Inc.
Description:
USCS’s century of cold storage excellence in America is backboned by 42 world-class facilities across 13 states. Our purpose goes beyond industry-leading locations and services. USCS has over three thousand hardworking employees who love what they do, dedicated to keeping us at the top of the cold storage industry.  We’ll do whatever it takes for our partners to profitably reach their goals, whether it’s primary storage or fully integrated 3rd party logistics solutions.

United States Cold Storage is dedicated to being the leader in providing highly reliable and cost-effective logistics solutions to the frozen and refrigerated food industry, giving our customers the competitive edge they need to succeed in the ever-changing business environment.

Our world-class facilities are located in the following states: California, Delaware, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Indiana, Nebraska, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Tennessee, Texas, Utah and Virginia.

Name: Star Agriwarehousing & Collateral Management Ltd
Description:
StarAgri is one of Asia’s leading integrated agritech solutions companies. As an end-to-end agricultural value-chain services platform, we offer a comprehensive suite of services to optimize efficiency and value in the sector.

We work with farmers, FPO’s and agri-communities to help them solve some of their most pressing challenges like post-harvest loss, access to bank finances and poor links to markets. We do this by forging sustainable partnerships between farming communities and their customers - agri-procurers. This helps create a more efficient market, translates into better crop price realization for farmers, and lower intermediary costs for buyers. 

With a network of 2,204 warehouses across 19 states, 5.2 million+ tons of warehousing capacity and ₹180 billion worth of commodities stored across 403 collateral management locations, we aim to become a strategic link in the global agri commodities supply chain.

In addition to addressing farmers’ challenges, our integrated solutions create value for all stakeholders – banks and financial institutions, agri-processors, and commodity exchanges. We also offer a wide array of value-added services that include risk management, retailing, and logistics, to name a few.

StarAgri has received funding support from Temasek Holdings and IDFC Private Equity.

Name: Friozem
Description:
NOSSA HISTÓRIA 

A Friozem Armazéns Frigoríficos Ltda nasceu da  necessidade do Governo Federal de promover a armazenagem de carne congelada para a formação de estoques reguladores.

Segundo o fundador da empresa, Fábio Fonseca, em 1978, quando a Friozem iniciou suas operações em Jandira – SP, o Governo comprava carne bovina dos matadouros durante a safra e guardava o produto congelado nos armazéns frigoríficos.  Quando chegava a entressafra, vendia novamente o produto aos mesmos matadouros, pelo exato preço que comprara meses antes.

Os matadouros, por sua vez, faziam a distribuição da carne ao mercado sem alteração de preço, mantendo o valor de meses antes, o que contribuía para o controle da inflação.  A demanda por espaço frigorífico, desta forma, era bastante grande, já que o Governo, desde o ano 1971, tinha esta política de intervenção na economia e faltava espaço para armazenagem.

A Friozem nasceu portanto com o firme propósito de atender a esta necessidade de armazenagem de carne congelada mas sempre com o foco de estender sua atuação à preservação de todo e qualquer alimento perecível.  Para se instalar, escolheu o Município de Jandira, na região oeste da Grande São Paulo, mais precisamente na altura do KM 32 da Rodovia Castelo Branco, a apenas 15 minutos do Cebolão e das marginais Pinheiros e Tietê.

A empresa iniciou suas operações com 35 mil metros cúbicos e vem se expandindo ininterruptamente desde então, sendo que hoje esse número chega a 643 mil metros cúbicos, não apenas em Jandira, mas também em Recife, Fortaleza, Belo Horizonte, São Bernardo do Campo, Araraquara, Curitiba, Salvador, Porto Alegre e Rio de Janeiro.

Atualmente, todas as Unidades da Friozem operam como um Centro de Distribuição, fornecendo aos seus clientes uma ampla estrutura de serviços.

Name: TPL | Platinum Log
Description:
Toda empresa que cresce, passa por mudanças. Assim como nós. E neste constante movimento que é a nossa realidade, hoje somos TPL.

Estamos no jogo há mais de 10 anos transformando a logística. O movimento e a inovação fazem parte da nossa rotina. Como as maiores empresas de tecnologia, entendemos que a mudança é essencial para o crescimento. Adaptamos nossas estratégias, aprimoramos nossos processos e abraçamos a inovação.

Com uma visão firme de longo prazo, estamos nos consolidando como principal operador logístico - Fulfillment (B2B e B2C) do Brasil, contando com tecnologia própria (OMS, TMS e WMS) que proporciona a visualização, integração e gestão em tempo real de todas as etapas operacionais, transporte lotação e estruturas multi CD's localizadas estrategicamente em 4 estados nas regiões sul e sudeste.
 
A mudança de Platinum Log para TPL representa nossa evolução e nosso compromisso com a modernidade e a agilidade que o mercado exige.

Com Centros de Distribuição estrategicamente posicionados e uma equipe dedicada de +700 colaboradores, estamos prontos para atender todas as suas demandas de fulfillment, transporte e tecnologia logística, garantindo que você fique sempre à frente no mercado.

Name: Lachmann
Description:
A Lachmann foi fundada em 1927, e desde então se destaca pelo constante aprimoramento de seus serviços. Atua em diversas etapas da cadeia logística do comércio exterior.

Nossa equipe é formada por profissionais altamente qualificados e com profundo conhecimento do mercado brasileiro. Seus modelos de negócios estão estruturados para oferecer flexibilidade e agilidade, para atender às necessidades dos clientes em todos os segmentos, de forma competitiva.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Exportadora de Café Guaxupé Ltda.
Description:
Fundada em 1970 pelo Sr. Olavo Barbosa, a EXPORTADORA DE CAFÉ GUAXUPÉ se orgulha de ser uma família dedicada ao café.
Atua como elo entre produtores brasileiros, torradores e importadores de diversos países. Possui serviços especializados e uma equipe preparada para orientar seus parceiros com um forte compromisso de aproximar o produtor do mercado internacional, sempre respeitando às normas sociais, ambientais e comerciais que regem o setor.

Os armazéns da EXPORTADORA GUAXUPÉ tem capacidade para armazenar até 1 milhão de sacas de café, contando com tecnologia avançada para limpeza e preparação dos cafés separando-os por tamanho, densidade e cor.

Possui um rigoroso sistema de monitoramento de todas as etapas da operação, o que garante a qualidade e rastreabilidade total do café, da origem ao destino, de forma segura e confiável.

Também possui escritório comercial em Manhuaçu-MG que possibilita a comercialização das região das Matas de Minas e em São José do Rio Pardo-SP, município pertencente à região da média Mogiana.

Nossas Redes Sociais:

Facebook:  @exportadoraguaxupe
Instagram: @exportadoraguaxupe

Name: DARWISH BIN AHMED & SONS
Description:
The Darwish Bin Ahmed & Sons Group was founded in 1964 by the late Mr. Darwish Bin Ahmed. It is now successfully managed by his sons and grandsons and has enjoyed steady growth during this period by strategically investing and growing organically.
DBA & Sons has established its presence in a wide range of segments like Infrastructure, Material Handling, Oil & Gas, Quarry & Mining, Air Conditioning, Power Generation and Transportation with rental solutions also offered in these fields of operation. The Group Head Quarters in Mussafah, Abu Dhabi, seems to define the company. The imposing HQ building was designed and constructed by Saif Bin Darwish, the Construction and Civil Engineering Division and an integral part of the Darwish Bin Ahmed & Sons Group. 

DBA has been operating in the UAE for over 50 years and has left its calling card all over Abu Dhabi; from iconic landmarks such as the Sheikh Khalifa Bridge, the Sheikh Zayed Tunnel to the city’s buses. The Group has been nurturing the emirate from the beginning; focused on building a sustainable business incorporating family values.

Today DBA & Sons group is one of the leading business organizations in the UAE and has seen a year-on-year growth of more than 50% in both domestic and international businesses., now employing over 6,500 people. The Group is active in over 50 countries worldwide with offices in Australia, New Zealand, South Africa, Russia, Ukraine, Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan and India, to name but a few and serving over 5,000 customers.

Name: GH Solucionador Logístico
Description:
GH Solucionador Logístico - Premiados do GPTW 2024

Somos uma empresa que oferece soluções completas em armazenagem e transporte de cargas. Contamos com acompanhamento de processos em alta tecnologia, o que garante toda agilidade e eficiência que seus negócios precisam. 

Entre em contato conosco e saiba mais sobre nossos serviços!

Name: SENSTOCK
Description:
SENSTOCK est un acteur majeur dans le stockage de produits hydrocarbures liquides au Sénégal avec le plus grand dépôt du pays et d’une capacité de stockage globale de 284 000 000 L.

Ces réceptions proviennent de la production de la SAR et des importations. Nous stockons puis chargeons les camions citernes et soutons les navires pour le compte de nos actionnaires (TotalEnergies, PUMA, Touba Oil et SAR) et de nos clients sénégalais et de la sous-région (importateurs et distributeurs).

SENSTOCK déclare également en douane pour le compte de ses clients.

Name: Conestoga Cold Storage
Description: Serving customers from across Canada and around the world, Conestoga operates six fully-automated cold storage warehouses with a total storage volume of over 87 million cubic feet which provide fully computerized warehouse facilities, distribution centres, and a chain of cross docks that enable us to deliver product efficiently from coast to coast. This combination results in dependable service across the country and easy access to all points in Canada and the U.S.

Name: Warehouse Anywhere
Description: Warehouse Anywhere solves the toughest storage challenges for multi-location businesses. By fusing enterprise-grade software with a national network of 14,000+ self-storage facilities, supplemental white-glove services, and a dedicated concierge team – Warehouse Anywhere lets commercial customers easily rent storage month-to-month, consolidate costs, stay compliant, and scale to any market quickly. Founded in 2015, Warehouse Anywhere delivers business and commercial self-storage asset-management solutions to field-service, pharmaceutical, consumer packaged goods, marketing agencies, and other Fortune 1000 organizations. For more information, please visit warehouseanywhere.com.

Name: Bluespace Self-Storage
Description:
Bluespace is the leading self-storage operator in Spain with over 50 centres in Barcelona, Madrid, Valencia, and Bilbao. In the rest of the country, we offer services and solutions through our excellent partners. In 2019 Bluespace arrives in Portugal with 2 centres in Lisbon and in 2020 to France with 2 centres in Paris, adding a total of 54 self-storage centres in 3 countries.
At Bluespace we aim to maintain our status as the best self-storage company in Spain. To achieve this, we have devised a 5-year expansion plan which will mean 100 centres and 400 employees.
Our mission is to deliver the highest quality self-storage experience to our customers by providing personalized care, quality facilities, customized transportation & logistic solutions all supported by state-of-the-art technologies.
Provide an excellent working environment and high integrity culture for our employees with opportunities to acquire valuable professional experiences and leadership skills, and with clear avenues for growth. Finally, deliver long-term value and top tier financial returns to our shareholders.
Our vision is to be the self-storage industry leader in both market share and customer satisfaction in the markets where we operate.  We continually strive to grow in our existing Spanish markets and to expand into new country markets.

Name: Power Rack Company
Description:
Power Rack manufactures products that help customers organize their businesses. 

From pallet racking to bolt-free racking, and everything in between, Power Rack designs and produces standard and custom-built solutions, that meet its customers' needs. 

Power Rack is a proud member of Bahra Electric Group and Electric House, who’s history stretches back 60 years to 1955.

Name: Frazier Industrial Company
Description:
Frazier Industrial Company has been providing structural steel storage solutions across the United States, Canada and Mexico for 75 years.  Our blue and orange pallet rack is quickly recognized for its durability and custom engineered design. From standard pallet rack systems, to complex pick-to belt towers, ASRS installations or Rack Supported Buildings, Frazier’s expert team helps each customer design the best, most cost-effective systems.
Frazier is an industry leader in manufacturing capabilities through the use of 10 fabrication facilities across North America, including Canada and Mexico. Strategically located, these manufacturing facilities reduce freight and installation costs, resulting in the most competitive prices. Each facility has the ability to produce thousands of pounds of racking per day, giving us the ability to meet your tight construction deadlines. In addition, Frazier boasts a staff of knowledgeable industry experts, including an experienced Project Management Team, dedicated Engineering Divisions for both Standard Products and ASRS and more. 
We have an extremely successful track record of addressing customers’ business and operational needs while also exceeding their expectations. Our extensive client base expands over fourteen major industry groups, including the Food, Beverage, Cold Storage, 3PL and Retail sectors.

Name: BuildMyInfra
Description:
BUILDMYINFRA is specialized in the infrastructure of Warehouses & Retail stores with an end-to-end solutions from Audit, Design, Supply, Build & Monitor. BMI is an expert in:
1. Designing all solutions,
2. PMC
3. STC/Turnkey Project
4. Procurement Partner 		     

Our core services include Civil, MEP, HVAC, Electrical, Fire Security, CCTV & Surveillance, IT Networking, IT Managed Services, Office Interiors, IDS, FAS, ACS.  

With our inhouse resident engineers in PAN India & Subcontinent(Nepal), we deliver projects within the timeline(96%) and ensure proper quality and industry standards.

BMI aims to eliminate the traditional process of dealing with multiple vendors by being a one-stop solution and currently working with all top E-commerce & Logistics companies in PAN India.

Email: sales@buildmyinfra.com
Contact: +91-844-8843-335

Name: LinkMisr International
Description:
LinkMisr is a leading industrial company specialized in manufacturing shelving and racking systems. We serve Egyptian, Arabian and African markets. The products are manufactured under license from Link 51 (UK).

o In 1993 LinkMisr was established at the industrial city of 10th Ramadan city.

o LinkMisr manufactures under license from Link 51 UK.

o The company in the last twenty years continued growing and sustained its position as the market leader in Egypt and other countries in Middle East and Africa.

o LinkMisr owns and manufactures it's products, in 4 plants with total area of 28,000 sqm, using the most modern equipments.

Name: STAMH Group
Tippmann Group / Interstate Warehousing / Tippmann Construction
Description:
Tippmann Group offers more than 50 years of experience in the refrigeration industry, specializing in cold storage construction and management of refrigerated / frozen distribution centers.  Interstate Warehousing, a Tippmann Group company,  owns and operates 8 public refrigerated warehouse facilities located throughout the U.S. in Franklin, IN, Anderson, IN, Cincinnati, Chicago, Nashville, Denver, and Newport News, VA, and Kingman, AZ.

Tippmann Construction, also a Tippmann Group Company, provides a fast-track design / build option for construction of a new distribution center, or expansions and renovations to existing distribution facilities.  Tippmann Group and Interstate Warehousing developed the QFR Zone (Quick Freeze Racking Zone), a more efficient alternative to traditional blast freezing, which can save warehouses up to 50% on their blast freezing related expenses.

We strive toward building customer relationships and exceeding customer expectations with Tradition, Flexibility, Quality and Performance.

•Family-owned and operated for more than 50 years
•One of the largest Public Refrigerated Warehouse (PRW) companies in North America
•Strategically located state-of-the-art distribution facilities
•Superior customer service
•Refrigerated and frozen pool consolidation programs at multiple locations
•Multiple facilities with AIB/ASI/USDA inspection certifications
•Internet access to real-time inventory and shipping activity through Interstate's eView system

Name: Krost Shelving and Racking
Description:
Krost: Africa’s leading provider of smart, reliable storage solutions!

Krost Shelving and Racking has been designing and proudly manufacturing steel Shelving, Racking, Mezzanine Floors and lockers since 1965 -with a reputation deeply rooted in heritage and quality. Using the latest manufacturing technologies, we ensure every product meets the highest standards of precision, durability and efficiency.

SABS-certified and ISO 9001:2008 compliant, we serve a wide range of industries, from manufacturing and logistics to retail, mining, warehousing, agriculture and more. With a focus on expertise, innovation and personal service, we deliver storage solutions that maximise space and value.

We make space work smarter for you!

Name: Adonai Química
Description: A Adonai Química é uma empresa 100% nacional que tem como objetivo o desenvolvimento sustentável dos serviços de movimentação de produtos líquidos à granel no porto de Santos, em total sintonia com os Sistemas de Gestão Integrada (Qualidade, Meio Ambiente e Segurança) visando o desempenho da melhor técnica e prática para manter e continuamente melhorar as condições operacionais dos modais rodoviário e maritimo nacional.

Name: TGW Northern Europe
Description:
Part of the global TGW Logistics Group, we design, build and maintain high-performance automated warehouse solutions for leading brands across the UK, Benelux and Scandinavia.

From Fashion, Grocery to Industrial & Consumer goods, our cross-border team of sales, engineers, project managers and software specialists helps companies boost efficiency and stay ahead of tomorrow’s challenges.

With a strong local presence and the support of a global innovation network, we combine cultural diversity with shared purpose:
 Delivering intralogistics excellence that moves the world of our customers.
 Based in the UK, Netherlands, Scandinavia and Lithuania
Careers | Partnerships | Growth through automation

Name: Arfrio S.A. Armazéns Gerais Frigoríficos
Description:
Primeira empresa do Brasil em armazenagem e movimentação de produtos congelados e resfriados, e  primeiro armazém de uso público da América Latina, tendo sido inaugurada em 1957.
Tradicional e pioneiro, hoje o Grupo Arfrio conta com dez unidades operacionais dotadas de câmaras polivalentes e antecâmaras climatizadas atuando em diversos estados.
Entre a indústria e o comércio está presente em algumas das maiores empresas de alimentos nacionais e multinacionais.
 A empresa busca a excelência através do desenvolvimento tecnológico, e de ações que 
promovam as inovações necessárias para adequação a novos cenários, procurando cada 
vez mais servir melhor ao cliente.
Com uma estrutura física moderna e pessoal altamente qualificado, capaz de realizar com eficiência todas as operações envolvidas na cadeia de abastecimento de seus clientes.

Name: MySafestore Self-Storage
Description:
MySafestore is a Belgian company founded in 2006 and formerly known as Lokabox. 

𝐈𝐭𝐬 𝐜𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐛𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟-𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐠𝐞.

MySafestore provides a range of quality services to its customers to meet a need for space by offering temporary or long-term storage solutions for private or professional usage with secure and individual access, seven days a week.

As the market leader in Wallonia, MySafestore counts over 2500 storage units to rent in province of Liège, Hainaut, Walloon Brabant & Brussels.

With its dazzling growth, MySafestore pursues its development by acquiring new locations or by opening new facilities close to high-density urban areas in Belgium.

Name: Logitri Oy
Description:
Logitri on vuonna 2009 perustettu 3PL- logistiikkapalveluja tuottava yritys ja yksi Suomen johtavista logistiikka-alan toimijoista. Palvelumme käsittävät varastointipalvelut, kuljetuspalvelut, sisälogistiikan palvelut sekä pakkaus- ja lisäarvopalvelut.

Olemme yrittäjävetoinen logistiikan asiantuntijatalo, jossa työskentelee noin 200 logistiikan ammattilaista. Meillä viihdytään pitkään ja arvomme vastuullisuus, asiakaskeskeisyys, jatkuva kehittäminen sekä rohkeus näkyvät päivittäisessä arjessa ja ohjaavat toimintaamme.

Modernin ja energiatehokkaan logistiikkakeskuksen ja kattavan sähkö- ja kaasuajoneuvovalikoiman myötä olemme myös vastuullisen logistiikan edelläkävijä. Tuusulassa sijaitsevan 70 000 neliön logistiikkakeskuksen katolla sijaitseva 1,0 Mwp aurinkovoimala tuottaa jo noin 15-20% koko keskuksen sähköntarpeesta. Investointi aurinkovoimaan ei ainoastaan vähennä Logitrin riippuvuutta perinteisistä energialähteistä, vaan myös alentaa huomattavasti logistiikkatoiminnan hiilijalanjälkeä. Olemme kompensoineet CO2-päästömme osallistumalla mm Suomen hiilinielujen kasvattamiseen ja toimintamme on hiilineutraalia, ensimmäisten yritysten joukossa Suomessa. Lisäksi koko logistiikkaketjumme on ollut vuodesta 2022 asti fossiilivapaa. Tämä saavutettiin siirtymällä hiilineutraaliin sähköön ja lisäämällä entisestään aurinkovoimaa sekä kaasu- ja sähköautojen määrää. Tänä päivänä koko kuljetuskalustomme kulkee 100% uusiutuvilla polttoaineilla.

Logitrin omistajat ja henkilökunta ovat pitkän kokemuksen omaavia alan ammattilaisia. Haluamme palvella asiakkaitamme kaikissa toimialaamme liittyvissä asioissa asiakaslähtöisesti ja joustavasti. Koulutamme henkilökuntaamme jatkuvasti, jotta voimme tarjota uusimmat innovaatiot ja parhaan asiantuntemuksen asiakkaidemme käyttöön

Name: Guardian Warehousing
Description:
Guardian Warehousing are a business storage solution that offer an integrated approach to logistics.
We provide a range of services on our client's behalf, including order processing, stock control and distribution!

We work closely with our client's to ensure that they receive a personal and bespoke service that meets their specific needs.

Name: Johnson Taylor Forklifts
Description:
SIMPLICITY

The most brilliant designs are often the simplest. You need a no-frills machine that gets the job done, and keeps on going.

LONG TERM BACKUP

We look at the big picture: Our preventative maintenance plans, scheduled service repairs with readily available spares and the advice of our technicians will make sure you get the most out of your product.

VALUE FOR MONEY

We have some of the most competitive, value-for-money machines in the marketplace. From our “ budget “ machines to our well-known branded machines, we have the equipment to suit every need.

Our customers demand storage, transfer and processing solutions that are extremely resistant to corrosion, highly chemically resistant and mechanically advanced.
Depending on the fluid, substance or gas involved, their concentrations, temperatures and operating conditions, PFA COMPOSITES recommends the materials, designs and layouts best suited to your project.

Name: Langley Mechanical Services Ltd

Name: The Records Hub
Description:
THE RECORDS HUB S.A., is a company with a portfolio of solutions including Secure Storage, Secure Digitization of Documents and Secure Document and  Records Information Management, GDPR & DPO Services, and Consulting.
Our aim is dual: on the one hand, increase customer competitiveness and productivity, while, on the other hand, achieve smooth customer alignment to the requirements of the future.THE RECORDS HUB S.A. ensures that its customers are provided Tailor-Made quality solutions and answers, intended to their sustainable operation and growth, as they align their operations to current and future requirements.
During internal inspections and risk assessments, THE RECORDS HUB S.A. provides for and indicates solutions to cover against any weaknesses or risks that may appear, in order to eliminate gaps and provide the maximum possible security in information management, in a timely and valid manner, both in ex ante control, but also in ex post intervention for all procedures. Our aim is to protect customer prestige and achieve a competitive advantage for the customer, coupled with considerable economic benefit. The Records Hub S.A. has 9 ISO Certifications.

Name: Mobu Logistics
Description:
Mobu Logistics es una empresa salvadoreña especializada en la logística del almacenamiento y manejo de mercadería, cross docking y servicios de distribución a nivel nacional.

Estamos ubicados estratégicamente en el Parque Industrial San Andrés, como parte un proyecto de bajo impacto urbano y ambiental, situado en un área de crecimiento industrial del país dado su excelente conectividad con las principales vías de acceso a las fronteras de Guatemala y Honduras, y su eficiencia logística, al estar ubicado a 20 minutos de la capital, y a 61 km del principal puerto del país, Acajutla.

Name: STOREX Self Storage
Description:
STOREX stores the stuff you don’t have room for in your workplace or home; the fun stuff you need to get hold of at just the right moment, and the difficult stuff you don’t have the time or energy to deal with right now.

We’re doing it better than the rest by setting new standards for self-storage. Our customer-focused business has a fresh, pro-planet outlook and smart, device-based, end-to-end support for customers looking for easy ways to free up space, de-stress, declutter, or make the most of precious resources.

At STOREX Self Storage we pride ourselves on being paperless and our systems are designed to make sure we don’t waste your valuable time. Our simple, flexible pricing is responsive to customers’ changing needs – you upsize or downsize your storage unit whenever you want. Your booking, billing and ‘secure space key’ are on your device – putting you in control.

Our architect designed urban STOREX Self Storage hubs deliver stress free space. They are backed by certified levels of security with smart technology enabling safe and easy access – just when you need or want it.

Our highly trained staff will help you get the best deal for your storage. Whether you’re a business or a family needing space to grow – short term or long term. Our online team will help you find the space that’s right for you, and ensure you get the most from it.

STOREX Self Storage purpose-built facilities provide on-site parking and EV charging. Our locations in key urban centres mean they’re easy to get to when you need fast, efficient, secure, affordable stress-free space for your stuff.

Your things are safe with us.

Name: Apex Warehouse Systems
Description: Material Handling Storage specialist in the greater Chicago area. We design and integrate pallet rack,  storage and material handling systems to optimize warehouse efficiency. Of course, we use the latest and greatest engineering and design technology, 3D AutoCAD and modeling tools, but these certainly aren’t our greatest assets, nor the reason our customers keep coming back.

Name: Global Warehouse Solutions
Description:
Global Warehouse Solutions is a leading provider of comprehensive warehousing and logistics services, offering a wide range of solutions to meet the needs of businesses of all sizes. Our mission is to provide the highest quality warehousing and logistics services to our clients, ensuring their products are stored, managed, and shipped efficiently and effectively. With over 540,000 square feet of warehousing space across multiple facilities in Florida and California, we have the capacity to accommodate your storage needs, no matter how big or small.

At Global Warehouse Solutions, we understand the importance of reliable warehousing and logistics services in today’s fast-paced business environment. That’s why we offer a full range of solutions, from short-term storage to long-term warehousing and everything in between. Our team of experienced professionals has the knowledge and expertise to handle all aspects of your warehousing and logistics needs, from receiving and inspecting incoming shipments to managing inventory, picking and packing, and shipping outbound orders.

In addition to our standard warehousing and logistics services, we also offer value-added services such as product assembly and packaging, barcoding and labeling, and quality control inspections. Our goal is to provide our clients with a complete end-to-end solution, so they can focus on their core business operations and leave the logistics to us.

From strategic 𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 to industry-leading 𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐩𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐬𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬, we bring everything under one roof to 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐭𝐡.

Our comprehensive approach includes:
 𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧 & 𝐎𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 – Space planning, racking systems, and workflow efficiency
 𝐌𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐇𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐄𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐩𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 – Forklifts, chargers, batteries, personnel carriers & more
 𝐌𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 & 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 – Expert service, repairs, and certified forklift training
 𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 & 𝐓𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐧𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐠𝐲 – Smart solutions to enhance productivity

We’re not just a provider—we’re your trusted 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐫. Let’s connect and build a warehouse that works 𝐬𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐞𝐫, 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐞𝐫.

Name: Frederic Smart Logistics
Description:
At Frederic Smart Logistics, we specialize in secure, efficient, and flexible warehousing and fulfilment solutions designed to meet the unique needs of our clients. 

From short-term to long-term storage, we ensure your goods are handled with care at every stage—from receipt to dispatch—so you can stay focused on growing your business while we seamlessly manage your logistics.

Our state-of-the-art facilities in Cambridge, Peterborough, and Warrington boast over 45,000 racked pallet locations, all accredited to the prestigious BRCGS AA standard. Positioned near major UK road networks, our sites offer fast, reliable access for seamless distribution and supply chain management.

We offer a full suite of scalable services, including racked and bulk storage, cross-docking, case picking, supermarket consolidation, co-packing, value-added services, quality control checks, and sampling. No matter your storage or distribution needs, our team delivers flexible, high-quality solutions tailored to optimize your operations.

In addition to our warehousing expertise, we are proud to be one of East Anglia's oldest and most respected grain and seed merchants. Established in 1906, we have over a century of experience trading cereals, pulses, and oilseeds, alongside developing specialist buyback contracts for a wide range of commodities. Our agricultural heritage is at the heart of our business, and we continue to uphold the same family values that have guided us since day one.

At Frederic Smart, we are committed to building long-term partnerships based on trust, service excellence, and integrity. Still family-owned and managed, we are proud to be a trusted logistics partner that delivers dependable solutions to help your business thrive.

Name: Door to Door Storage, Inc.
Description:
Our Story

In 1996, Door to Door revolutionized the self-storage industry by introducing portable, containerized storage in Seattle, Washington. The idea caught on quickly on the West Coast, and today Door to Door serves numerous metropolitan areas across the nation.

In 1999, we took the logical next step and began offering self-service moving to our customers with the same commitment to exceeding their expectations. Today, Door to Door’s corporate headquarters is located 20 miles south of Seattle in Kent, Washington.

Some companies have chosen to copy our product as closely as possible, while others claim that they have a better container. In either case, they all struggle to match our industry leading customer satisfaction ratings and enviable record of protecting possessions.

We are committed to delivering quality moving and storage solutions as well as the kind of Exceptional Customer Care you will recommend to your friends and family. Through all of your life transitions, we’ll be here to take care of you.

Name: Ken Thomas - Warehousing & Transport
Description:
Ken Thomas is a privately-owned warehousing and transport company founded in 1948 by Ken Thomas, the father of John who is now the Managing Director. Ken started with just two lorries which mainly consisted of transporting produce from local farms and packhouses for onward delivery to the London and Birmingham markets.
In the 1960s the first warehouse was built and used for storage of canned goods for some of the local food companies. John Thomas took over running the company in the early 80s and has continued to head up the company since. The early 80s saw significant growth in transport services for the company and by this point Ken Thomas were offering nationwide distribution.
Ken Thomas continued their expansion over the mid to late 80s and a large number of quality insulated warehouses were built to keep up with the demand put on the company by its customers.
Since this time growth has steadily continued and Ken Thomas are currently embarking on another large expansion by building additional warehousing space to enable them to cope with their growing customer base.
We have over 300,000 sq. feet of warehousing and we are well equipped to handle stock of any size.
In addition to warehousing, Nationwide distribution facilities are available using our own vehicles and we also have close working relationships with major local distribution companies.

Whether it be for the transportation or warehousing of our customer’s goods, the quality of service is paramount at Ken Thomas. Quality has been important ever since the company was founded by Mr Ken Thomas, and as an equally hands on MD, it is equally important to John. At Ken Thomas, we employ people who have the determination to provide the very best service. Commitment to our customers starts at the very top.
We are dedicated to put our customers at the forefront of everything we do and we’re confident in our ability to deliver a flexible and scalable warehousing & transport solution to your business.

Name: Armazenna
Description:
Somos uma empresa criada para fornecer agilidade e praticidade aos nossos clientes, oferecendo os melhores conceitos de modernidade e soluções em centros logísticos.
Para isso, temos opções de galpões modulares a partir de 1.000 m², onde há rampas de acesso para empilhadeiras, piso nivelado a laser com capacidade de 6 ton/m², proteção térmica (facefelt), pé-direito de 12 m² e muito mais. Nossos centros também possuem um complexo sistema de segurança com detecção de incêndio, portaria blindada, controle de acesso e outras formas de proteção. Todos os nossos condomínios compartilham despesas como limpeza, portaria, segurança, entre outras coisas, reduzindo os custos para a sua empresa, tudo visando proporcionar as melhores condições. 

Contamos com seis empreendimentos em Pernambuco, somando mais de 500.000 m² e estamos estrategicamente localizados em Jaboatão dos Guararapes e Cabo de Santo Agostinho, próximos a BRs, portos, aeroportos, transportes públicos e grandes centros de negócios, assegurando facilidade para sua empresa e comodidade para os seus funcionários. 

Preocupados com o meio ambiente, fazemos substituições para que os impactos sejam reduzidos ao máximo. Nossos galpões possuem sistema de ventilação natural e iluminação natural zenital, além do reaproveitamento da água para irrigação.

Cloverleaf Cold Storage Company privately held warehouse company offering public and contract storage in refrigerated, frozen, and dry environments.  All Cloverleaf warehouses are food grade facilities and over 99% of company throughput is related to the food processing, food service, and retail business.

Cloverleaf Cold Storage began providing refrigerated warehouse services to the food industry more than 60 years ago in Mankato, Minnesota, but company history goes back further.  The company began as the Farmers Produce Company in Sioux City, Iowa in 1934. This company collected poultry and eggs from local farmers for packing and shipping to nationwide markets.  By 1958, Cloverleaf had also developed freezer warehouses in Sioux City, in addition to Mankato, and in the following years the company expanded through new development and joint ventures with its customers.  

Cloverleaf has been an innovator in the industry: building the first rack-supported freezer in the United States, and the first large-scale urethane panel warehouse. It was one of the first to adopt cantilever and push-back rack designs.  Cloverleaf first began passing EDI transactions with its customers in 1989 and using bar code pallet tracking in 1991. Today, Cloverleaf is one of the largest privately held public refrigerated and dry warehouse companies in the United States.

Name: Acme Distribution
Description:
Acme's History

It all began with one small truck and one very big dream. Acme Delivery Service, Inc. was founded in Denver, Colorado in 1947 by the late Jack Grunwald who sought to provide the leading distribution and warehousing business in the country — and he did. From a single truck start, Grunwald partnered with his competitors in the mid 1960s to create a freight consolidation program, and shortly after, Acme welcomed a full national distribution center. In 1988, Acme Distribution was a one million square-foot facility providing Denver and the Rocky Mountain region with the most state of the art warehousing amenities.

Today, Acme Distribution provides customized service to more than 400 clients with four facilities country-wide that total 2.5 million square feet of warehouse storage, extensive transportation capabilities, and logistics services that suit the needs of more than a dozen different industries. It is size that allows Acme to service the greatest of shipment volumes, and it is acute attention to detail and exceptional customer service that allows Acme to claim its superior status in the logistics industry. Acme provides the peak level of shipping, trucking and freight handling needs. Customer satisfaction, profitability and value creation will be the foundations of our continued growth. Acme Distribution is committed to providing the highest possible level of customer service.

Name: FEDESSA - Federation of European Self Storage Associations
Description:
Established in March 2004 as a response to a fast growing self storage market in Europe, the Federation of European Self Storage Associations (FEDESSA) represents the different self storage associations across Europe. 

The federation consists of self storage associations across Europe and today FEDESSA represents 4,000 self storage facilities or more than 35% of the self storage facilities in Europe, including all the major operators. Our current members are the self storage associations of Belgium, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Norway, Portugal, Sweden, Switzerland, Spain, The Netherlands, Czech Republic and the United Kingdom.  We are also in close contact with existing and potential operators in Austria, Estonia, Hungary, Latvia, Poland, Romania and Russia. 
Our main mission is to:
Provide a common voice for the industry throughout Europe.
Support the development of national associations and encourage countries where the industry is starting up to form their own national association. 
Position the self storage industry as a responsible partner and business sector.
Any self storage operator which is member of a European national self storage association is automatically a member of FEDESSA.

Are you a self storage operator in a European country with no self storage association, then you can become a member thanks to our Direct Affiliate membership.

En honor al Gral. Mariano Necochea, prócer que combatió por la independencia de nuestro pueblo, el 29 de octubre de 1950 alrededor de 170 productores, reunidos en la Biblioteca Andrés Ferreyra fundaron la Cooperativa Agropecuaria Gral. Necochea Ltda.; allí eligieron el primer Consejo de Administración, nombrando como presidente a Roberto Laspiur.  
Inicialmente la cooperativa se centralizó en la ciudad de Necochea pues la mayoría de los productores interesados en formarla tenían sus campos en la zona. Su casa central estuvo ubicada en un galpón cedido por un socio en la esquina de calle 56 y 57 siendo su primer gerente Felipe Del Hoyo.   
Con el transcurso de los años la entidad fue creciendo, contando hoy día con mas de 650 socios, productores agropecuarios de explotaciones ubicadas en los Partidos de Necochea, Lobería, San Cayetano, Tres Arroyos, Gral. Alvarado, Gral. Pueyrredón y Balcarce. 
Actualmente cuenta con una capacidad de almacenaje de mas de 200.000 toneladas de cereales y oleaginosas, distribuidas en 7 plantas de acopio. 
Gracias a la contínua inversión en infraestructura y tecnología ya se han incorporado 8 filiales ubicadas estratégicamente en el sudeste de la provincia de Buenos Aires. 
Quequén /Energia /Lobería /San Agustín /Balcarce /Mechongué /Otamendi /La Ballenera  . 
La Cooperativa brinda diversos servicios y ofrece variedad de productos tanto a sus asociados como a clientes en general.

Name: Countrywide Commodity Repository Limited
Description:
Welcome to Countrywide Commodity Repository Limited (CCRL) - a reliable partner for electronic ownership and transfer of commodity assets in the Indian markets.

CCRL was established in 2017 with collaboration of three eminent institutions namely, Central Depository Services Ltd. (CDSL), BSE Investments Ltd. & Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd (MCX). 

Operating under the regulatory framework of Warehousing Development & Regulatory Authority (WDRA), this national-level institution empowers commodity stakeholders like farmers, FPOs, processors, manufacturers and traders by digitizing warehouse storage receipts, thus facilitating ownership and transfer of commodity assets electronically. This also protects customers from multiple risks associated with traditional warehouse paper-receipts like, fraudulent issuance of warehouse receipts without receipt of goods, over-statement of value or quality of goods, fraudulent issuance of duplicate warehouse receipts, loss, mutilation, tampering or fudging of information in warehouse receipts etc.. 

CCRL provides secure repository services to customers who deposit commodity-assets in WDRA-registered warehouses across India. Issuance of electronic negotiable warehouse receipts (eNWR) through demat accounts ensure secure and transparent ownership and transfers of commodity assets digitally with no human intervention. CCRL-repository platform is also connected to all leading nationalised and private banks & NBFCs that provide seamless pledge finance on eNWRs.

Apart from serving retail customers, traders, Farmers & FPOs around the country, CCRL also exclusively serves Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd. (MCX) and Bombay Stock Exchange Ltd. (BSE) for their trades in commodities.  Do visit our website to know more.

Description:
At Complete 3PL, we pride ourselves in offering a comprehensive 3rd party logistics service that covers you end to end. From warehousing support to efficient freight forwarding and meticulous customs clearance processes, our dedicated team possesses the expertise and experience to handle it all. We understand the importance of efficiency and cost-effectiveness in today's fast-paced business world, and we ensure that your shipments are delivered on time and budget.  
When it comes to freight forwarding, we've got you covered, whether it's for domestic or international destinations. We employ the most efficient and cost-effective partners to ensure your goods reach their destination on time and in perfect condition. Our customs clearance services will provide you with fast and accurate customs declarations which will help your shipments pass customs checks without delay.
What sets 3PL apart is our unwavering commitment to provide exceptional service. We have invested in advanced technology to maintain an extensive trusted partner network that allows us to offer flexible and scalable solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of every customer. 
Why do our customers choose Complete 3PL?
 Reliable Deliveries: Count on us for on-time, secure deliveries, no matter where your shipments need to go.
 Cost-Effective: We understand the importance of cost control. Our routes and customs processes are designed to deliver the best value.
 Peace of Mind: Our logistics planning knowledge combined with obsessive attention to detail ensure that your shipments are in the safest hands.
 Tailored Solutions: We don't offer one-size-fits-all solutions. Instead, we customise our services to meet our customers’ specific requirements.
We are here to make your supply chain operation smoother and more efficient. If you would like to simplify your logistics and experience hassle-free haulage, freight forwarding, and customs clearance solutions on a global scale, contact Complete 3PL today.

Name: Casilleros inteligentes
Description:
Nuestro objetivo es ayudar a tu empresa a contar con seguras instalaciones de almacenamiento para generar un alto grado de impacto tecnológico y sobre todo de seguridad para con tus clientes.
Casilleros Inteligentes, es una empresa Colombiana especializada en la fabricación y diseño de Casilleros inteligentes que permiten la apertura y cierre de sus puertas mediante la implementación de tecnología. IoT, Rfid, Pin Código, Qr, App Msn. 
Contamos con los sistemas de almacenamiento más avanzados del mercado, los cuales tiene como único fin el de proteger todo lo que se almacene en estos, desde una pequeña compra online hasta el almacenamiento de productos de valor y/o maquinarias.
Brindamos soluciones innovadoras a Empresas de Entrega de paquetes, logística Ecommerce, Educativas, Corporativas, Construcción y conjuntos residenciales integrando tecnologías de punta con Casilleros de almacenamiento, Convirtiendo a nuestra empresa en un aliado estratégico para la tuya con el único objetivo de establecer espacios de almacenamiento seguros para tus instalaciones.
No importa si se trata de una gran empresa, una fábrica, una universidad, un hospital o una escuela, la gama de configuraciones de nuestros casilleros le ayudarán a optimizar sus instalaciones y mejorar la transparencia. 
Nuestros casilleros están disponibles en una gama de estilos para satisfacer sus necesidades, ya sea estén integrados a una red o sean individuales. 
Casilleros inteligentes surgió hace aproximadamente 1 año, cuando se descubrió el problema que tenían ciertas instalaciones al no contar con espacios de almacenamiento óptimos. Lo cual generaba problemas en dichas instalaciones.
Contar con un esta tecnología en tu empresa mitigará exponencialmente los hurtos y extravíos de paquetería, encomiendas y demás material de valor. Puesto que sus sistemas integrados de apertura hace que sea prácticamente imposible de manipular.

Name: National e-Repository Limited (NeRL)
Description:
National E-Repository Limited (NERL) - an NCDEX Group Company, is a national level market infrastructure institution that records and stores Warehouse Receipts in an electronic form (e-NWRs) in the Indian commodities market, under the aegis of Warehouse Development and Regulatory Authority (WDRA), Government of India. 
The mission of WDRA is to regulate and ensure implementation of the provisions of the Warehousing (Development and Regulation) Act, 2007 for the development and regulation of warehouses, maintain negotiability of the warehouse receipts and promote orderly growth of the warehousing business in the country for the benefit of farmers and Financial Institutions (FIs) through transparency and trust.

NCDEX group has in depth experience in digitalizing warehouse receipts and commodity inventory management through its ingeniously built systems – Comtrack and Comlive, which have brought transparency and efficiency to warehousing. NERL will leverage the capabilities of NCDEX group and with its unique combination of repository, cutting edge technologies, warehouses and mandis, will offer a game changing experience to all types of market participants. NERL will be responsible for storage, security, authenticity and transfer of all electronic negotiable warehouse receipts (eNWR), within a regulated framework, between users of the repository such as warehouse service providers, banks, financial institutions, farmers, traders and value-chain participants.

NERL will be a pioneer in providing legal and regulatory environment for inventory financing and warehouse receipt lending to encourage the use of these financing mechanisms; and will act as catalyst to boost warehouse based commodity business transactions. Its systems will introduce lot visibility, traceability and off-market transfers to commodity trading outside the Exchange ecosystem. It will accommodate all types of warehouse service providers, including private and state-owned, small and medium.

We operate through our associates in Saudi Arabia, Oman, Kuwait, Nepal, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Malaysia, Hong Kong, Kenya, Myanmar, Thailand & Iran. Apart from this, we’ve expanded our end-to-end solutions services outside India, to South-East Asia, Middle East, and Far-East region of the globe.

DTDC is a one-stop store for all e-tail services, offering tailor-made solutions like marketplace listing, multi-vendor management, tech development, warehousing & fulfilment, cross-border solutions, last-mile delivery, reverse logistics management, and more. We proudly operate India’s largest last-mile delivery network, which has made DTDC the preferred choice for strategic e-commerce trading partnerships, all across the Globe.

DTDC’s ability to assimilate worldwide parcel services with the best technological platforms means the highest level of success. Be it start-ups or established players, our fulfilment warehouses are designed to facilitate smooth order-fulfilment processes, from receiving to product delivery. Name: Young Storage Network (YSN)
Description:
The YSN recognises and supports youth in the industry with the idea being for a group of under 40s to get together to network and share ideas. 
With over 285 members and no cost to join, as long as you are under 40 and working in the industry then this group is for you. 

Membership is not only for owners of self storage businesses, but for frontline staff, suppliers, financiers in the industry too.  Membership is on an individual not business base so one business can have multiple members as part of the group. 

Governed by its own board, the YSN is an official working group of the SSA UK.

YSN Vision
To encourage the growth of young people in the self storage industry through networking and professional development.

YSN Mission is:
To increase the number of young people engaged with the Association
Attract more buy in from employers to support the network
Engage members through personal and online methods
Provide training programmes specifically targeting new entrants and young people
Increase awareness and use of technology in the industry
Members meet 3-4 times a year either online or in-person but outside of this, most of the networking takes place on Facebook, LinkedIn and more recently, on WhatsApp where the network share best practice, gain insight into other companies experiences and knowledge base, or simply ask questions.

There are also approximately 4 YSN Educational Sessions for members per year covering topics such as Managing Bad Debt, Looking after your Mental Health, Add On Sales, Company Culture and Leadership, Branding and many more.

The group regularly contributes articles for the SSA UK quarterly magazine, UNLOCKED and has produced video content for the wider SSA UK membership.

- projekty systemów logistyki magazynowej - projektujemy tak, aby zapewnić naszym Klientom znaczące oszczędności, udoskonaloną jakość i efektywny przepływ towarów.
- regały magazynowe Dexion - jesteśmy po to, aby pomóc Twojej firmie dobrać taki typ i układ regałów, aby był on jak najbardziej EKONOMICZNY, BEZPIECZNY i WYDAJNY, a optymalna aranżacja przestrzeni magazynowej przełożyła się na oszczędność czasu i kosztów realizacji projektu logistycznego.

Zapewniamy różnorodne formy finansowania, szeroki wybór sprzętu, zdrowie i bezpieczeństwo użytkowania, profesjonalny serwis i części zamienne.

The required skilled and talented manpower for the shipping industry is available in plenty in this region due to the presence of the AP SEZ, VSEZ, Public Sector giant like Hindustan Shipyard Ltd., Naval Dock Yard, Head Qtrs of Eastern Naval Command of Indian Navy and major industries like Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited, Hindustan Zinc Ltd, and Coromandel International Ltd etc.

SRAVAN GROUP has already established a large customer base covering various industries like Fertilizers, Fertilizer raw materials, Chemicals and Pharma, Food grains, Coal, Iron Ore, Steel, Cement, Petroleum products, Sugar etc., and has specialized in handling bulk cargo at Vizag Port, Gangavaram Port and Kakinada Port and containerized cargo at VCTPL, Visakhapatnam..

SRAVAN GROUP is also a leading warehousing service provider in Private Sector in South India and having own warehousing facilities in Vizag, Gangavaram and Kakinada to cater the needs of importers and exporters through Vizag, Gangavaram and Kakinada ports with about 7, 00,000 square feet of closed warehousing space besides having an overall 15, 00,000 square feet of open yard for stacking/storing of containers and various bulk and break bulk materials since its inception in the year 1997.

Les usages en sont multiples :
Pour les Particuliers : un déménagement, une mutation, des travaux entrepris dans la maison principale, un départ à l'étranger : des boxes de 1 à 50 m2 permettent de stocker l'équivalent d'un studio à une grande villa.
Pour les Professionnels : les boxs peuvent atteindre 100m2 ou plus, pour stocker matériel de manutention, stocks saisonniers, archives et documents administratifs, que ce soit pour les artisans, commerçants ou professions libérales. 
Locakase assure également la réception de marchandises.
Les boxs, sécurisés par vidéo-surveillance et par alarme individuelle, sont constamment entretenus .Ils offrent un accès 7/7j et 24h/24. 
La souscription du contrat, très simple et rapide (pas de bail, pas d'engagement de durée : seul un préavis de 15 j est requis) garantit également une souplesse évidente.
Locakase dispose également d'une boutique de produits d'emballage où sont proposés cartons de toute taille, rouleau adhésif, papier bulle.. et prête à ses clients tout le matériel de manutention (chariots, transpalettes..) utiles pour emménager dans leur box.

Les centres sont managés par des équipes de professionnels du "self-stockage", made in France, en mesure de conseiller les clients sur tous les aspects de leur location.

Our 400,000 square foot warehouse is the home for our full-service 3PL center, offering inventory management, warehousing, and order fulfillment services to partners internationally.


Nautical understands the impact plastics have on our planet. That’s why we have partnered with Solmera to begin manufacturing all our single-use plastics using an additive that will allow the products to rapidly decompose in almost any environment between one and two years of being thrown away. This is just one step to becoming more environmentally conscious. In addition to becoming more environmentally conscious, being involved socially is very important to Nautical. Partnering with organizations like Down Syndrome Innovations and companies like Staffing by Starboard are just the initial steps for Nautical to make an impact socially.

Name: Grocery Supply Company
Description:
Founded in 1947 by Curtis McKenzie, Kenneth McKenzie, and Woodrow Brittain, the company prospered under their leadership. “There were at least 50 or so other grocery warehouses within a 100-mile radius of us,” remembered Kenneth McKenzie.

Today, GSC Enterprises, Inc. operates two primary business segments: Grocery Supply Company (c-store distribution) and Fidelity Express (alternative financial services). 

After 14 major expansions, Grocery Supply Company has over 450,000 square feet of space with more than 10,000 items in inventory. Whether you’re a single store operator or a large regional chain, our extensive product line of dry, refrigerated, and frozen items will surely meet your needs. GSC primarily serves convenient stores throughout Texas, Oklahoma, Arkansas, Louisiana, Kansas, and Missouri.

GSC remains a family owned and operated business, with Michael K. McKenzie (second generation) serving as Chairman of the Board and Ryan McKenzie (third generation) serving as Chief Operating Officer. The McKenzie family is not only devoted to its employees and customers, but also, its community. A desire to serve all stakeholders is at the heart of GSC's core values.

“Whether you are working with Grocery Supply Company or Fidelity Express, we truly believe that we are Families Serving Families.” ---Ryan McKenzie COO.

We have over 20 years experience in carrying out Forklift Truck Training, Working for a number of companies and various training organisations both locally and nationally.

Our training can be carried out on your premises using your equipment or on our premises. The benefit of being trained on your own premises is the operator will be using the equipment they will be operating on a daily basis. Or the training can be carried out at our site using our equipment. We also work around various shift patterns including, days, evenings, nights or weekends etc.

Name: Summit Alliance Port Limited
Description:
Established in December 2003 in Patenga Industrial Area, Chattogram, Summit Alliance Port Limited (SAPL) was listed with Dhaka and Chattogram Stock Exchange on 16th October 2008. Summit Alliance Port Limited (SAPL) is the pioneer and market leader in the Inland Container Depot (ICD) and Container Freight Services (CFS) industry. 

SAPL has three container depots including one depot of erstwhile OCL. All the depots at Chattogram and River Terminal at Muktarpur have certification from Global Security Verification (GSV) which is the leading international network for supporting the development and implementation of measures for enhancing global supply chain security. This GSV certification has established the fact that the company has the appropriate security measures, as published by the US Bureau of Customs and Border Protection, in place and that these measures are maintained throughout the facilities. Along with GSV, all SAPL facilities are International Ship & Port Security (ISPS) compliant which is a security measure set by the IMO (International Maritime Organization) along with Verified Gross Mass (VGM) approved by Department of Shipping, Government of Bangladesh as part of the Safety of Life at Sea (SOLAS) Convention.

With over 25 years of experience, SAPL enjoys excellent relationships with the major Shipping Lines and Freight Forwarders.

Storeganizer is an innovative high-density warehouse storage system. It enables warehouses to store small items in columns of suspended, easy-to-access pockets made of flexible and durable fabric.
Storeganizer allows warehouses to cost-effectively store more small items per ft/m² and ft/m³ by optimizing the use of rack space and decreasing the TCO of warehouses. Warehouse operators can reduce walking distance and boost picking efficiency thanks to Storeganizer.
 
Founded in 2012, Storeganizer is supported by the Belgium-based automotive expert conTeyor. With Storeganizer, conTeyor builds on its experience as the leading expert in the niche market of  state of the art, returnable and cost-effective packaging solutions.

We are currently working on many new projects and our goal is to create a chain of high quality, high service storage locations in the Nordic countries situated around the capital areas and the larger surrounding cities.

With 34 locations throughout Denmark, Sweden and Finland - and many more to come - Pelican Self Storage is undergoing rapid expansion.
