Name: Kasten - Gonvarri Material Handling
Description:
Kasten, also well known in Finland as Constructor Finland Oy, is a member of the Gonvarri Material Handling group and a leading provider of smart and scalable storage solutions. With soon 140 years of history and manufacturing roots dating back to 1886 in Helsinki, Kasten has long been a pioneer in warehouse optimization and industrial racking systems. From producing Finland’s first steel shelving in the 1950s to today’s automated vertical storage solutions, we have remained committed to innovation, quality, and customer success.
 
Our state-of-the-art production facility in Lohja, Finland, serves clients across the Nordics and Europe. We design, manufacture, install, and service a full range of racking and shelving systems, including pallet racking, mobile racking (MOVO), cantilever racking, and shelving for small parts. Whether you need to increase capacity, reduce picking time, or improve warehouse ergonomics, our tailored solutions ensure maximum space efficiency and flexibility.
 
Kasten is also at the forefront of warehouse automation. Our Tornado and GonvaLift Vertical Lift Machines (VLM) deliver goods-to-person efficiency, reduce floor space by up to 75%, and integrate seamlessly with our TCPlus WMS software. These solutions support batch picking, ERP integration, and optimized stock control — from retail to manufacturing and beyond. Our Heavy Duty Tower systems are engineered for demanding industrial environments, providing robust and reliable performance.
 
We are your long-term partner in warehouse transformation, offering end-to-end support from consulting and layout planning to installation, maintenance, and upgrades. Backed by deep experience, we combine local expertise with global capabilities to future-proof your logistics.

Name: Lauralu UK & Ireland
Description:
For more than 20 years, Lauralu has designed, manufactured, and installed bespoke and modular temporary structures on sites across Europe. Our temporary structures are suitable for a range of industrial and commercial applications, and we have supplied high quality solutions to logistics operators, SMEs, retailers, and even institutional and public authorities.

We have a network of highly trained and experienced installers across the UK and Europe. They are capable of working within tight deadlines, whilst meeting all relevant health and safety regulations. We can have a bespoke or modular structure designed, delivered, and installed anywhere in the UK in as little as four weeks.

All of our high quality structures are designed and manufactured in our own factory. From the production and machining of profiles, to the manufacturing of the roof membranes, we control the entire value chain. This means that we are able to deliver a consistently high quality product at competitive manufacturer’s prices.

Our temporary industrial buildings are available to buy or to rent, and we offer a choice of flexible financial options. 

If you only require a short term temporary solution, we have a rental option.  If you require a more permanent solution you can also purchase your structure outright whilst benefiting from our competitive manufacturer’s rates.

Get in touch, and one of our commercial engineers will be happy to discuss your requirements before designing the perfect temporary structure for you.
 
For more information, call us on 01827 215217, or email info@lauraluindustry.co.uk.

Name: sistemas de almacenamiento vertical
Description:
Los almacenes automatizados verticales  permiten automatizar la entrada y la salida de los productos, garantizando un control de las mercancías más rápido y preciso. 
La principal ventaja que notarás desde el primer momento es la optimización del espacio: al almacenar las mercancías en nuestros almacenes automáticos verticales es posible recuperar hasta el 90% del espacio en el suelo.
Además, combinando los almacenes automáticos verticales con el software de gestión de almacenes (WMS) es posible reducir los errores y controlar en tiempo real el estado del almacén y de las mercancías.
Las ventajas de utilizar los almacenes automáticos verticales y horizontales Modula
 Recuperación de espacio
 Ahorro de tiempo
 Seguridad de las mercancías
 Ergonomía y seguridad del operador
 Configuración personalizada
 Reducción de errores y gestión de existencias
 Máxima capacidad
 Software dedicado
 Facilidad de uso
La principal cualidad de los sistemas de almacenamiento vertical es el aprovechamiento máximo de la altura disponible con la menor superficie utilizada.
Los almacenes verticales automatizados son módulos de almacenamiento diseñados para gestionar los stocks de cualquier tipo de producto de pequeño formato de manera automática y mecanizada en altura, aprovechando más el espacio vertical y no tanto horizontal.

Name: NextBitLogistics
Description:
NextBit Logistics is a company that offers a range of services related to logistics and fleet management, with a focus on human resources, fleet management, warehousing, and storage solutions. These services can be crucial for businesses that rely on the efficient movement and management of goods and materials. Here's a brief overview of the key services provided by NextBit Logistics:
1.	HR Services: NextBit Logistics likely offers human resources services to help businesses manage their workforce efficiently. This might include recruitment, training, payroll management, and other HR-related functions to ensure the smooth operation of logistics and warehousing activities.
2.	Fleet Management: Fleet management services involve the optimization and management of a company's vehicle fleet. This can include tracking and monitoring vehicles, maintenance scheduling, fuel efficiency improvements, and route optimization to reduce costs and improve overall efficiency.
3.	Warehousing: Warehousing services include the storage, organization, and management of goods and materials in a warehouse or storage facility. This can include inventory management, order fulfillment, and security measures to ensure the safety and accessibility of stored items.

The combination of these services can help businesses streamline their logistics and supply chain operations, reduce costs, and improve overall efficiency. NextBit Logistics may tailor its offerings to meet the specific needs of its clients in these areas.

Name: Heber Mühendislik
Description:
30 yılı aşkın mühendislik deneyimi ve uzman ekibiyle depo raf sistemleri, taşıma ve depolama paletleri üreticisi HEBER Mühendislik’e hoşgeldiniz. 

Firmamız İzmir AOSB’de kurulu fabrika ve merkez ofisi ile, depo raf sistemleri, taşıma ve depolama metal paletleri, deprem analizli raf projeleri alanlarında son teknoloji üretim ekipmanları ve uluslararası sertifikasyonları ile imalat ve kurulum yapmaktadır. 

Depo raf endüstrisinde kalite, dayanıklılık ve yenilik standartlarını yükseltmeyi amaçlayan Heber Mühendislik, güvenli, uzun ömürlü ve dayanıklı depolar için yine uzman ekibiyle, sektörde fark yaratarak, Raf Periyodik Kontrol ve Raporlama hizmeti de sunmaktadır. 

Raf sistemleri ve depolamanın tedarik zincirindeki uçtan uca sürecinde keşiften, projelendirmeye, statik analizlerden depo raf kontrollerine kadar kendi bünyemizdeki ekibimizle hizmet veriyoruz. Yine kendi bünyemizdeki Ar & GE merkezimizle inovasyon odaklı bir yaklaşım sunuyor, depo alanlarınızı ve lojistik süreçlerinizi optimize ederken, en yüksek kaliteli hammaddeleri seçiyor, müşteri talebine göre özel üretim esnekliğinden güç alarak uluslararası standartlarda üretim yapıyoruz. 

Bugün, +3 Milyon m2 depo raf kurulumu +200.000 metal palet üretimi deneyimi ile Heber Mühendislik olarak 200’den fazla ulusal ve global müşterinin tercihi olmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

Name: Speedrack Products Group, Ltd.
Description:
Speedrack Products Group, Ltd. is a company that is...and always has been revolutionary. Revolutionary in thinking, and revolutionary in products and services. Speedrack has been at the forefront of the storage products industry for over 55 years and is one of the leading suppliers of pallet racking and storage systems. Speedrack is committed to providing material handling systems/equipment that maximize our customer's use of space and contribute to effective warehouse logistics solutions – we provide functional designs to ensure safety, productivity and reliability.

Speedrack was the first to develop completely tubular pallet rack, and remains one of the few to provide seamless tubing for columns, beams, horizontals, and diagonal bracing. Few rack manufacturers offer this style due to the higher production costs and greater precision requirements compared to open shapes. Tubular designed rack allows us to provide our customers with greater strength per pound of steel and higher resistance to damage than conventional open shape sections. This means increased safety, longer life, and lower maintenance of your rack solution.
  
The results—superior products and storage solutions that combine the best initial value with low maintenance and damage resistant features that save money long after the installation is complete.

Fra idé til ferdig lager

Gjennom vår lange erfaring i kombinasjon med fleksible produkter er et skreddersydd oppbevaringssystem for din virksomhet og dine behov en selvfølge for oss. Vi er med deg fra førstegangsrådgivning til montering av ferdig oppbevaringssystem. Vi er bare fornøyde når du er fornøyd!

Vi har ressursene som kreves!

Vår styrke er å tilby fleksible løsninger sammen med raske leveranser og å alltid bruke vår kunnskap til kundens beste. Vi legger stor vekt på sikker materialhåndtering og for å sikre de høye kvalitets- og sikkerhetskravene som kreves, er produktene våre dekket av produktsertifisering NO-EN 15522. Name: TEMESİST ALGÉRİE Systèmes De Rayonnage D'entrepôt İndustriels
Description:
Systèmes De Rayonnage D'entrepôt - Systèmes D'entrepôt İndustriels 
Temesist est devenu une compagnie leader dans le domaine de dépôt et de rayonnage industriel pas seulement en Turquie avec sa vision entrepreneuriale innovatrice, mais aussi sur le marché international.

La compagnie TEMESİST fondée 1980 avec un capital 100% turc, continue d’être le fournisseur principal en technologie de dépôt et de rayonnage industriel grâce à des ingénieurs turcs.

TEMESİST possède une manufacture 17000 m² dans la zone industrielle de BİLECİK, travaillant sous le standard TS EN İSO 15512.

Le siège de notre  société est situé en Turquie  à Istanbul  et nous avons des bureaux de ventes à Adana, aussi bien qu’en Ouzbékistan, en Géorgie et d’autres bureaux régionaux à l’étranger.

Pour contribuer à la croissance de la Turquie par nos exportations, nous avons décidé d’établir notre propre division d’exportation à TEMESİST.AŞ  afin de renforcer notre société et bien le placé dans cette industrie.

TEMESİST, le leader en Turquie dans l’industrie de système de stockage et de rayonnage prouve son succès en exportant ses produits dans 55  pays. Notre croissance rapide sur un court période de temps a transformé TEMESİST en une des compagnies les plus respectée dans l’industrie de rayonnage.

Notre compagnie accorde une importance vitale dans la recherche et développement des systèmes industriels de stockage et de rayonnage. Les nouveaux produits offerts sur le marché par notre compagnie, conçus par nos ingénieurs sont approuvés par de prestigieux universités nationaux qu’internationaux.

Ces études sont réalisées en coordination avec des universités notables où les nouveaux  produits que nous concevons sont transférés de notre unité de recherche et développement à des universités pour les tests finaux.

Nos produits sont conçus et fabriqués selon les normes de la TSEK, et a permis à notre société de remporter des prix de qualités international.

TEMESİST offre une expérience hors du commun en fournissant la meilleure solution à nos clients nationaux et internationaux, en gestion de projets avec un personnel qualifié et un travail d’équipe.

TEMESİST est un partenaire commercial de confiance qui avance en toute sérénité vers ses objectifs avec des capacités technologiques supérieures et qui compte travailler aux cotés de ses clients sur le long terme. C’est notre priorité de répondre rapidement aux demandes de nos clients avec les projets les plus appropriés qui sont dignes de notre crédibilité dans le secteur.

Notre compagnie a adopté un principe de croissance continue à travers ses projets qui sont développés et réalisés par ses employés et en utilisant des technologies modernes sensible à la santé publique, à l’environnement afin de garantir la sécurité de l’emploie.

Name: Ganesh Benzoplast Ltd. (Infrastructure Division)
Description:
Ganesh Benzoplast Limited (GBL), established in 1986, is a leading liquid storage solutions provider and specialty chemicals manufacturer based in Mumbai, India. With strategically located bulk liquid storage terminals at Jawaharlal Nehru Port Trust (JNPT) in Navi Mumbai, Cochin Port Trust in Cochin, and Mormugao Port Trust in Goa, GBL offers a combined storage capacity of 352,000 kiloliters (KL) across 98 storage tanks. These tanks, constructed using stainless steel, mild steel, and pre-coated steel, ensure secure handling of diverse liquid products for industries such as oil and gas, chemicals, and food processing.

In addition to storage, GBL is a trusted name in specialty chemicals manufacturing, producing sodium benzoate, benzoic acid, and lubricant additives. These products are essential in sectors like food preservation, pharmaceuticals, and automotive lubricants, with manufacturing facilities located in Tarapur, Maharashtra.

GBL's extensive client portfolio includes industry leaders such as Asian Paints Ltd, Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd, and Jubilant Life Sciences Ltd, reflecting its reputation for reliability and excellence.

Led by Mr. Rishi Pilani, a second-generation entrepreneur and experienced chemical engineer, GBL combines global expertise with a commitment to innovation, operational excellence, and customer-centric solutions. With a robust infrastructure, dedicated team, and strong industry presence, GBL is well-equipped to meet evolving market demands and solidify its role as a trusted partner in the liquid storage and specialty chemicals sectors.

Name: Smart Factory Solution
Description:
ยินดีต้อนรับสู่ Smart Factory!

สวัสดีครับ ยินดีต้อนรับเข้าสู่ Smart Factory แหล่งรวมข้อมูลและที่ปรึกษาด้านการนำ หุ่นยนต์ (Robot) และ ระบบอัตโนมัติ (Automation) ไปปรับใช้ในโรงงานของคุณ!

เรามุ่งมั่นที่จะช่วยให้โรงงานของคุณก้าวสู่ยุคอุตสาหกรรม 4.0 อย่างเต็มตัว ด้วยการให้คำปรึกษาที่ครบวงจร ตั้งแต่การประเมินความพร้อมของโรงงาน การเลือกเทคโนโลยีที่เหมาะสม การวางแผนการติดตั้ง ไปจนถึงการสนับสนุนหลังการขาย เพื่อให้มั่นใจว่าการลงทุนของคุณจะเกิดประสิทธิภาพสูงสุด

Smart Factory ช่วยอะไรคุณได้บ้าง?

ให้คำปรึกษาเบื้องต้นฟรี: ไม่ว่าคุณจะเพิ่งเริ่มต้นศึกษา หรือกำลังมองหาโซลูชันเฉพาะ เราพร้อมให้คำแนะนำเบื้องต้นเกี่ยวกับศักยภาพของหุ่นยนต์และระบบอัตโนมัติในการเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพการผลิต ลดต้นทุน และยกระดับความปลอดภัยในโรงงานของคุณ

แนะนำโซลูชันที่เหมาะสม: เราจะช่วยวิเคราะห์ความต้องการเฉพาะของโรงงานคุณ และนำเสนอโซลูชันหุ่นยนต์และระบบอัตโนมัติที่ตอบโจทย์ ไม่ว่าจะเป็นหุ่นยนต์อุตสาหกรรม, Collaborative Robots (โคบอท), ระบบลำเลียงอัตโนมัติ (AGV/AMR), ระบบควบคุมอัตโนมัติ, หรือการบูรณาการระบบต่างๆ

ข้อมูลอัปเดตและเทรนด์ใหม่: ติดตามข่าวสาร เทคโนโลยี และเทรนด์ล่าสุดในอุตสาหกรรมหุ่นยนต์และระบบอัตโนมัติ เพื่อให้คุณไม่พลาดทุกความเคลื่อนไหวและสามารถนำไปปรับใช้กับธุรกิจได้ทันท่วงที

เปิดโอกาสสู่การร่วมมือ: เราเป็นพันธมิตรกับผู้เชี่ยวชาญและผู้ให้บริการชั้นนำในอุตสาหกรรม เพื่อให้คุณเข้าถึงโซลูชันและบริการที่มีคุณภาพสูงสุด

ไม่ว่าโรงงานของคุณจะมีขนาดเล็กหรือใหญ่ Smart Factory พร้อมเป็นส่วนหนึ่งในการขับเคลื่อนธุรกิจของคุณให้เติบโตอย่างยั่งยืน ด้วยนวัตกรรมและเทคโนโลยีอันทันสมัย

พร้อมยกระดับโรงงานของคุณแล้วหรือยัง?

หากคุณมีข้อสงสัย ต้องการคำแนะนำ หรือสนใจที่จะปรึกษาเกี่ยวกับการนำหุ่นยนต์และระบบอัตโนมัติมาใช้ในโรงงานของคุณ สามารถทักเข้ามาพูดคุยกับเราได้เลย! เรายินดีให้บริการและพร้อมเป็นที่ปรึกษาคู่คิดของคุณเสมอ

Name: Tidão Indústria & Atacado
Description:
No mercado há mais de 35 anos, a empresa iniciou suas atividades em 1987 na fabricação e comercialização de telas de alambrado. Ao longo desta trajetória, vêm buscando por parcerias de grandes marcas, reconhecidas no mercado brasileiro, atuando como distribuidor atacadista, indústria e prestador de serviço. Atualmente a Tidão encontra-se em uma área construída de 6.200 metros quadrados.

 

No ramo da distribuição, atua com presença marcante nos comércios varejistas de Santa Catarina e Rio Grande do Sul. Contando com uma frota própria para distribuição de seus 5000 itens, direcionados as linhas de construção civil, materiais elétricos, ferragens, ferramentas, máquinas e acessórios, abrasivos, ferramentas de corte, telas, agropecuária, lonas e filmes, jardinagem, irrigação, EPIs e utilidades domésticas.

 

No ramo industrial além de atender o comércio varejista com os seguintes produtos, churrasqueira americana, estribos de aço, gradil, telas de alambrado, telas hexagonais e telas de aviário. Também atende os atacadistas em todos os estados do Brasil, nas vendas de baldes de metal para construção civil e caixa metálica para massa.

 

Na prestação de serviços são realizados processos de repuxos e conformações em materiais de aço carbono, alumínio, cobre, latão e inox, e na confecção das mais variadas peças como: automotivas, paellera, frigideiras, tachos, antenas parabólicas, ou seja, produtos cônicos

A Tidão preza pelo respeito de seu trabalho e pela qualidade de seus produtos e serviços prestados, reconhecidos por seus parceiros.

Our warehouse management system has full RF capability and all product (pallets or cases) is identified with a unique barcode offering highly accurate traceability throughout all of our operations.

We hold an “AA” British Retail Consortium Global Standard accreditation in Storage & Distribution covering our frozen, chilled, ambient and packaging storage and our blast freezing and tempering facilities.

Con los años y con la experiencia de operar almacenes, incursionamos en el rubro depósitos para mercaderías nacionalizadas, atendiendo a un sector que depende exclusivamente del espacio y la agilidad para la distribucion de las mercaderías.

Name: Accrediting Bodies Association for Workplace Transport (ABA)
Description:
In partnership with industry, the ABA sets national standards for the basic skills and underpinning knowledge required to safely operate workplace transport equipment in line with all relevant, current legislation and approved codes of practice for the benefit of industry.

The ABA's mission is to contribute to an increase in workplace transport productivity and profitability whilst also reducing workplace incidents, injuries and deaths.

The ABA has robust membership criteria and each member is independently audited and measured against the criteria. 

We hold an annual summit to gather feedback and input from the industry. Regulators (including the HSE), trade associations and industry stakeholders attend our events and quarterly meetings. 

We are committed to helping and supporting industry to deliver the safest training possible, you can contact us anytime, with any feedback, thoughts and suggestions on info@abawt.co.uk.

Name: ALDEFE - Asociación De Explotaciones Frigoríficas, Logística Y Distribución De España
Description:
Está formada por empresas individuales dedicadas a la congelación, conservación, transporte y distribución de productos perecederos a temperatura controlada y por la Asociacion Frigorífica de Cataluña , teniendo su sede en Madrid.

ALDEFE es la nueva denominación, que en adaptación a las tendencias de las demás asociaciones europeas y para contemplar más adecuadamente las actividades de sus miembros, ha adoptado la anterior Asociación Nacional de Explotaciones Frigoríficas de España, fundada en 1977 al amparo de la Ley 19/1977 de 1 de abril para la representación y defensa de los intereses profesionales de las empresas que realizan las actividades de almacenamiento frigorífico, logística y distribución.


En la actualidad aglutina alrededor de 74 empresas del sector siendo la capacidad frigorífica total es de unos 2.200.000 m3., de los que un 70 por ciento son de temperatura negativa y el 30% restante de temperatura positiva. Los túneles de congelación alcanzan una capacidad de unas 1.200 Tm./24/h. y la producción de hielo, tanto tradicional como en cubitos o escamas, se cifra en torno a las 1.500 Tm./día.


ALDEFE forma o ha formado parte de diferentes Comisiones y Subcomisiones Ministeriales y de Grupos de Trabajo de distintos ministerios, como la Subcomisión del Transporte de Mercancías Perecederas, la Comisión para la Modificación del RD sobre Instalaciones Frigoríficas, o miembro de los grupos de trabajo de la AESAN.

En el ámbito social negocia el Convenio Colectivo de Frio Industrial de ámbito estatal. Desarrolla y ofrece diferentes programas de formación a través de la Comisión Paritaria de Frío Industrial de la Fundación Tripartita, y diferentes acciones para la Prevención de Riesgos Laborales a través de la Fundación para la Prevención de Riesgos Laborales .

Pertenece a la Confederacion Española de Organizaciones Empresariales (CEOE) y a nivel internacional pertence a la European Cold Storage and Logistics Association ECSLA

Name: CFFT - Logistics
Description:
CFFT is a logistics powerhouse located at the heart of Civitavecchia's commercial port. Boasting a water-bound terminal with two berths, CFFT Spa offers an array of services including stevedoring, diverse storage solutions, and a rail-connected intermodal terminal—unique to the port. Specializing in 3PL logistics, CFFT Spa's strategic location serves as a nexus for Mediterranean distribution, enhanced by comprehensive customs services. The company's offerings span tailored logistics, warehousing, over-land transport, project logistics, e-commerce fulfillment, and intricate customs administration.  It is higly  specialized in storage and distribution throughout the whole of Italy and the Western Mediterranean region of food products, FFV (fresh fruit and vegetables) with in particular bananas and pineapples.
CFFT SpA is a subsidiary of the Antwerp based holding NOORD NATIE, which is a diversified port group founded in the 16th Century.

The terminal of CFFT SpA is located inside the port of Civitavecchia, at quay 24 and 25, next door to the “RTC” container terminal and the “RCT” cruise terminal.
The port of Civitavecchia is commonly considered as the port of Rome due to its proximity to the capital of Italy. It is built on the ancient city of Centumcellae, founded by the Trojans to expand the trade in Rome.
The state-of-the-art warehouse is ideally positioned to allow a fully integrated service package, covering container – warehouse activities – ship operations.
Customers have tagged our logistic concept as Kilometer Zero, as many cruise ships are actually berthing in front of our warehouse.
The CFFT terminal covers 16,000 square meters and offers chilled, frozen and dry storage space in combination with all the necessary permits and authorizations for customs, veterinary and phytosanitarian inspection.
As such, CFFT can meet all logistic and customs requirements of the market – including storage (chilled and frozen) of non-EU goods.

Name: Nepal Warehousing Company Limited
Description:
Nepal Warehousing Company Ltd is established under the Company Act, 2063 of Nepal to cater to the warehousing needs of the farmers, traders, millers and businessmen who deal in trade of grains for their commercial and industrial purposes. These actors more often face post-harvest losses, degraded quality of the product for further use and most frequently face problems of keeping grains in healthy environment for long time period.

In order to keep the quality of grains stored intact for long time, the Nepal Warehousing Company Ltd (NWCL) has brought the solution by installing high quality silos of 55,000 MT capacity at three different places in the province number 1, province number 2 and in Lumbini province. With this installed capacity of 55,000 MT, the company has entered into the business of grain trading with specialized services such as storing, auctioning, bulk transporting, warehouse financing, guaranteeing the quantity as well as quality, insuring the risk and bank financing. It is also expected that the installed warehousing capacity at three different locations would pave the way for industrialization of grain mills, feed mills and overall agriculture as all three warehousing locations have abundant field for grain production. At present the company has target of warehousing maize, soyabean and wheat which are mostly consumed as raw materials for feed millers. In long run, in warehousing premises the company has plan to install silos for paddy rice, cold storage for vegetables, fruits and other perishable agri-products.

Busydo WMS is a warehouse management system (WMS) conceived to address challenges observed in various warehouse operations. Its development was inspired by the shortcomings noticed in existing systems, particularly the absence of adaptability, scalability, real-time data tracking capabilities, and the need for electronic proof of delivery.
The concept of adaptability refers to the system’s ability to accommodate diverse warehouse environments and their unique needs. Scalability emphasizes the system’s capability to grow and handle increased demands or changes in warehouse operations effectively.
Real-time data tracking is a crucial aspect of Busydo WMS, aiming to provide immediate and accurate insights into inventory movement, orders, and other essential warehouse data. This capability enables timely decision-making and enhances operational efficiency.
The incorporation of electronic proof of delivery (EPOD) in Busydo WMS addresses the need for a digital confirmation mechanism for deliveries. This feature typically includes functions such as digital signatures, timestamps, and documentation to verify and confirm deliveries electronically.

Asimismo, las zonas francas son una herramienta para impulsar la exportación e importación, contribuyendo al crecimiento económico regional, mejorando la eficiencia logística y disminuyendo los costos de operación de las empresas usuarias.
Zona Franca Zapala, permite a sus usuarios; almacenar, fabricar, montar, ensamblar, fraccionar, comercializar, certificar mercaderías; así como también establecer laboratorios, centros de desarrollo tecnológico, call centers y servicios bancarios dentro de sus instalaciones. Otorgando beneficios financieros y reducción de costos operativos de gran importancia, que contribuyen a mejorar su cuadro de resultados.

Es la Zona Franca de Vaca Muerta, se encuentras dentro del reservorio de Vaca Muerta, única en su tipo, sirve principalmente al negocio de Petróleo y Gas, Minería y Agroindustria, es un hub logístico estratégico con acceso bi-oceánico, conectando los Puertos de Aguas profundas del Pacifico, como los del Atlántico, vía ferrocarril, Aeropuerto y rutas terrestres.

Name: CarbonLocked Technologies Inc.
Description:
CARBON S AFE TECHNOLOGIES INC. hereinafter also referred to as CARBONLOCKED is in the business of carbon sequestration and storage solutions. Using innovative technology and novel storage methods, CARBONLOCKED aims to provide a revolutionary solution to Carbon Dioxide emissions.
Currently, Carbon Dioxide (CO2) accounts for 72% of total greenhouse gas emissions globally. Although CO2 is a naturally occurring compound in the atmosphere., increased concentrations due to human activity has had detrimental effects on the environment Excess carbon dioxide leads directly to increased global temperature by trapping heat in the atmosphere. According to recent data. this increase in global temperature leads to increased incidences of extreme weather, famine and flooding1.   CARBONLOCKED aims to provide a carbon storage solution that will safely store excess carbon produced as manufacturing byproducts underground.

Another increasingly concerning problem surrounds unstable oil wells and mine shafts left from resource extraction. Recent research finds that there are over 97,000 oil wells that have not been properly closed in Canada alone. In addition, reports indicate that the pace of abandonment of oil wells is only accelerating. Inactive wells increased by more than 50% from 2015 to 2020'.! (b). These underground cavities are susceptible to toxic leaks which contaminate the surrounding environment and groundwater. Using CARBONLOCKED., manufacturers will be able to effe.ctive.ly fill these underground reservoirs to prevent harmful leaks. with effective technology, CARBONLOCKED will structurally reinforce underground cavities and increase the structural integrity of surrounding areas. Additionally. CARBONLOCKED's durable chemical compound will be able to store carbon for centuries unlike current methods which have limited lifespans.

Name: HOBİM Arşivleme ve Basım Hizmetleri A.Ş.
Description:
Hobim Arşivleme ve Basım Hizmetleri A.Ş. bilgisayar destekli dijital basım ve zarflama, ofset basım ve zarf üretimi, çağrı merkezi, fiziksel arşiv, elektronik arşiv, veri kayıt, danışmanlık ve yazılım geliştirme alanlarında hizmet vermektedir. 
1997 yılında bilgisayar destekli dijital basım ve zarf dolumu işlemlerini gerçekleştirmeye başlayan firmanın, dijital basım ve zarflama alanında 100 milyon imaj/ay tam renkli siyah beyaz (S/B) mürekkep püskürtmeli,  49 milyon imaj/ay S/B magnetographic, 500 bin imaj/ay tam renkli lazer ve 3 milyon imaj/ay S/B lazer baskı ile 37 milyon zarf/ay zarflama kapasitesi bulunmaktadır.
2006 yılında ofset basım ve zarf üretimi faaliyetlerine başlayan firma telekomünikasyon, internet, medya, banka ve sigorta sektörlerindeki kurumsal müşterilerine matbaa hizmeti sağlamaktadır. Firma, hizmet sağladığı sektörlerdeki firmaların talepleri doğrultusunda sürekli form üzerine kurumsal kimlik bilgilerini ve logolarını içeren ofset baskı hizmeti sağlamaktadır. Hobim Arşivleme, 115 milyon imaj/700 ton form basım kapasitesine sahiptir. 
Firma, yüksel işlem hacimli kurumlarının büyük miktardaki dokümanlarının, fiziki ve elektronik ortamlarda saklanarak kullanıma sunulması çerçevesinde arşiv yönetim hizmeti sağlamaktadır. Ayrıca, dijital baskısı yapılan içeriklere yönelik çıktıların elektronik ortamlarda saklaması ve çeşitli kanallardan kullanıcı hizmetine sunulması, bilginin oluşturulup elektronik ortama aktarılarak kullanıma açılması, fiziksel olarak saklanması ve gerçek zamanlı raporlanması konularında da hizmet sağlamaktadır. 
Hobim Arşivleme, 35 bin M3 kapalı arşiv alanında yaklaşık fiziksel olarak 1,9 milyon kutu, elektronik olarak 3 milyar adet belge depolamaktadır.

Name: Twenty 5 Logistik GmbH
Description:
Die Twenty 5 Logistik GmbH, mit ihrem Hauptsitz in Gotha ist ein regionaler Logistikanbieter in Europa.

Als ehemalige Thüringer Verlagsauslieferung Langenscheidt KG (TVA), Tochter des Langenscheidt-Verlages, entstand die heutige Twenty 5 Logistik GmbH im Jahre 1994. 

Durch unsere Branchen-Expertise und unser Produktportfolio entschied sich die Rhenus-Gruppe 2010, die Thüringer Verlagsauslieferung Langenscheidt KG (TVA) zu übernehmen. Fortschritt heißt Veränderung, was uns zu neuen Wegen inspiriert. Nach einem Jahrzehnt der Zusammenarbeit traten wir Anfang 2021 aus der Rhenus-Gruppe aus. Heute sind wir ein eigenständiges Unternehmen.

Wir sind ein Logistik-Unternehmen mit fast 30 Jahren Erfahrungen und realisieren an unseren zentralen Standorten in Thüringen maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für unsere Kunden und haben uns in Richtung E-Commerce-Dienstleistungen sowie im Verlagswesen stets weiterentwickelt.

Ob Prozesse in der Lagerung, Kommissionierung, Versand, Retourenmanagement, Value-Added-Services und vieles mehr. Dabei hat die Twenty 5 Logistik GmbH immer einen gemeinschaftlichen Standard aufgebaut. 

We keep your business in progress.

Die ganze Logistik - so wie Sie sie brauchen. Für uns steht nicht in erster Linie die Frage im Raum, wie viele Pakete Sie am Tag versenden, sondern wie Ihr Business funktioniert und wie wir dabei logistisch helfen können. Das ist Prozessanalyse. Das ist Business Consulting. Das ist Customized Fulfillment. Wir bezeichnen das als smarte Logistik.

Datenschutz: www.t5-logistik.com/datenschutz

Firmamız 1995 yılından beri 2. el sektöründe faaliyet göstermektedir. Kartal’da 300 m²’lik bir alanda faaliyete başlayan firmamız günümüzde Şekerpınar'da 6.000 m²’lik bir alanda her geçen gün büyüme sağlayarak çalışmalarını sürdürmektedir.
Başta 2. el depo raf sistemleri olmak üzere 2. el depolama ekipmanları ve istif makinaları alım satımında ülkemizin öncü ve lider kuruluşudur. ZMF, 2. el raf sektörünü oluşturmadan önce ülkemizde 2. el raf sistemleri genellikle geri dönüşüme atık olarak verilmekteydi. Rafını satan firmalar düşük meblağlara ürünlerini verirken, alım yapacak diğer firmalar ise sıfır ürünlere yüksek ücretler öderdi. ZMF, bu raf sistemlerini atık fiyatının çok üzerinde alıp, hasarlı parçalar var ise müşterilerinin ihtiyacına yönelik revize ederek ülke ekonomisine büyük katkı sağlamaktadır.

Certifié ISO 9001 depuis 2009, le système de management de la qualité de Locabri guide toutes les actions de conceptions, fabrications, location, vente, installation et maintenance de bâtiments modulaires et démontables avec pour objectif la satisfaction des clients.

Avec son bureau d’étude intégré, l’entreprise anticipe les besoins du marché et propose des structures en adéquation avec les spécificités de l’industrie et de la grande distribution.
Aujourd’hui, trois gammes de bâtiments modulaires existent,  
- RFX , Le réflexe modulaire, 
- Flexibat, et 
- Modubat, 
allant de la structure métallo composite au bâtiment tout isolé. Cette gamme complète permet  de répondre aux besoins spécifiques des professionnels, en location comme à la vente avec un panel d'équipements et de services adaptés et/ou adaptables. 
Les structures modulaires démontables permettent aux  professionnels de bénéficier de surfaces supplémentaires évoluant en fonction des fluctuations de l’activité de leur entreprise sans immobilisation de capitaux.

Locabri est inscrite au registre du commerce de Lyon et son siège social ainsi que son site de production sont basés à Brignais (Rhône). L’entreprise emploie 70 personnes.

Description:
The Document Warehouse, Namibia’s premier archiving and onsite/offsite document storage Specialist Company now offers you the ultimate solution in data management. In the modern-day information age fast, reliable and effective data management is everything. Time wasted looking for documents is money wasted and opportunity lost.

We are a proud partner and reseller of the Enterprise Content Management system, M-Files and therefore we can provide a work class service to our clients in both paper and electronic services.

To remain competitive you need to focus on core business activities and let us do what we are good at for you: Records Management.

The Document Warehouse was launched on the 8th of March 2006 and opened its doors on the 1st of April 2006 in Windhoek, the 1st of September 2010 in Walvis Bay and the 3rd of January 2012 in Ongwediva.

Our services includes:
  
 • Archival and long term storage of documents and drawings. We store all business documents - both non-current documents (obliged by law to be kept but rarely used) and current documents (documents in regular use) for companies that have outsourced their filing departments .
• Long and short term storage of digital data in a secure environment, involving daily or weekly pick-up of digital data on tapes, DVD’s, etc.
• Consultancy service related to filing systems, file plans, archival policies, document storage solutions, etc.
• Training in all aspects of paper and electronic filing systems.
• Bulk scanning and indexing of hard copy documents
• Design and implementation of Document Management Systems including software solutions for archived material.
• Secure destruction of documents and data
• Filing solutions - where we manage your filing system for you

Name: SmartStorage, O Self Storage Inteligente

O self storage para você e para a sua empresa.
Soluções inteligentes para ampliar espaço, reduzir custos e preservar histórias.

ajudar empresas a crescerem com mais eficiência e ajudar pessoas a guardarem o que importa – histórias, memórias e conquistas – com segurança e conveniência nas grandes cidades.

Name: INLOG - Integração Logística
Description:
Transporte · Armazém · Tecnologia · Químicos

Primamos pelo atendimento dos itens críticos para o cliente: baixa sinistralidade; prazos de coleta; tempo de trânsito e prazos de entrega.
DISPONIBILIDADE

COMPETITIVIDADE
Estamos em constante interação com o ambiente, trabalhando na aprendizagem, nos processos e adaptação da estrutura organizacional para melhorar a qualidade das decisões estratégicas e alinhar as operações as reais necessidades do negócio.

Name: Storage Authority Franchise
Description:
We have created a "turn-key" Self Storage business model to help you harness the full potential of owing SELF STORAGE.

business cycle from land acquisition to marketing and sales

Regardless of your situation, we can help guide you every step of the way by surrounding you with a management team that has more than 50 years of experience in self-storage and franchising.
Our knowledge reduces your learning curve – and strengthens your foundation for success.

Name: Warehouse Systems Limited
Description:
Storage systems from start to finish from an independent supplier 

Warehouse Systems Ltd (WSL) is the largest independent provider of storage systems and mezzanine floors in the UK. With a head office in Leeds we can easily manage your project, wherever you're based. Established for over 30 years, we have the knowledge and expertise to design and install the very best system to suit your needs. 

A broad product range 
WSL supplies racking, shelving and other storage systems for everything from small parts to pallets, chilled items, documents, clothing and large industrial loads. If you need extra space for storage, production, handling, office work or retail sales, we can also design a single or multi-tier mezzanine to expand your floor area. 

Reliable, expert service 
Our service doesn't stop at design and supply, we can handle the entire installation on your behalf. Our turn-key packages incorporate electrical works, sprinklers, ground works and buildings works, which really helps the efficiency of a project.

Independent advice 
Because WSL doesn't manufacture products, we're entirely independent. We'll take time to understand your needs, and then use our extensive knowledge of the products available to recommend exactly the right solution for you. 

We truly enjoy what we do and we want you to enjoy working with us.

Name: GP LOGISTICS
Description:
Somos un grupo orgullosamente mexicano, que por más de 30 años ha brindado una gama de soluciones integrales en toda la cadena de suministro. 

Nuestra infraestructura, tecnología de punta aplicada a todos nuestros procesos y  un equipo de trabajo altamente capacitado y comprometido con la gestión logística, nos permite ser la mejor opción de servicio a Nivel Nacional e Internacional.

Name: NITCO
Description: Nitco is an integrator of material handling solutions with over 50 years experience in delivering customer satisfaction.  At Nitco, we know the value of one stop shopping, and aim to provide solutions, backed by local service & support.  Our footprint extends throughout New England and into Upstate New York.

Name: Ice Cube Cold Storage & Logistics
Description:
Ice Cube Cold Storage and Logistics is a premier provider of temperature-controlled storage and comprehensive logistics services. With facilities in Fall River and New Bedford, Massachusetts, we offer a combined 500,000 square feet of storage space, conveniently located near major New England highways.

We specialize in the storage and preservation of temperature-sensitive products, providing state-of-the-art refrigerated and frozen storage solutions. Our extensive services include dry storage, refrigerated and non-refrigerated transportation, freight retrieval, customs bonded carrier services, and liquor transportation. Additionally, we offer waterfront dockage, offloading, e-commerce fulfillment, co-packing, repacking, and blast freezing.

Our commitment to excellence is driven by a customer-centric approach and the integration of cutting-edge technology. We prioritize quality, safety, and efficiency, ensuring real-time inventory management and personalized service to exceed customer expectations. At Ice Cube Cold Storage, we are dedicated to providing exceptional service and innovative solutions to meet all your storage and logistics needs.

Name: 1001 LİDAŞ
Description:
Lisanslı Depoculuk sistemi ile;

1- Hasat dönemlerinde tarım ürünlerindeki arz yığılması nedeniyle oluşan fiyat düşüşlerinin önlenmesi ve piyasanın dengelenmesi,
2- Özellikle finansman sıkıntısı çeken çiftçiler ile ürün sahiplerinin, lisanslı depolara verdikleri ürünleri karşılığında aldıkları ürün senetleri aracılığıyla bankalardan kredi ve finansman sağlamaları,
3- Tarım ürünleri ticaretinin herkesçe kabul gören standartları belirlenmiş ürünler üzerinden yapılması, kaliteli üretimin teşvik edilmesi, güvenli bir piyasanın oluşturulması,
4- Tarım ürünleri ticaretinin kayıt altına alınması,
5- Ülkemizde halihazırda uygulanmakta olan tarım reformunun başarılması ve tarım ürünleri ticaretinde özel sektör katılımının artırılması,
6- Üretimde ve fiyatlandırmada Devlet müdahalelerinin asgariye indirilmesi, bu alana yönelik yapılan yüksek harcamalardan önemli tasarruf sağlanması, serbest piyasa ve fiyat oluşumunu bozan müdahalelerden uzaklaşılması,
7- Tarım ürünleri üreticileri açısından kolay pazarlanabilen, iyi muhafaza edilen ve nakliye masrafları en aza indirilmiş bir sistemle istikrarlı ve daha yüksek bir gelir seviyesi elde edilmesi,
8- Yatırımcılar için dövize, altına, hisse senedine, faize ve benzerlerine alternatif yeni bir yatırım aracı sağlanması,
9- Ürün ticareti ile uğraşan tacir ve sanayicilerimizce, kalitesi bilimsel kriterlere göre belirlenmiş ve fiyat istikrarı sağlanmış ürünlerin kolayca temini,
10- Tarım ürünlerinin, fizikî mal ve numune gösterilmesine ve teslimine gerek olmaksızın ürün senetleri veya elektronik ürün senetleri aracılığıyla ticaretinin yapılması,
11- Standardı belirlenmiş ürün ve lisanslı depo sistemiyle tarım ürünlerinde vadeli işlem ve opsiyon piyasalarına geçilmesi,
12- Ürün depolanması, bankacılık ve sigorta sektörü açısından yeni iş alanlarının oluşturulması hedeflenmiştir.

Name: Logistics Park (India) Private Limited
Description: Logistics Park provides best in class infrastructure for Sustainable Warehousing. Logistics, Supply Chain and Allied Services. More than 280 Awards & Accolades from various  National & Multinational Organizations.

Name: Leap India Food & Logistics Limited
Description: Leap India is one of India’s leading Agri Infrastructure company. Leap India works with the Govt of India in developing and operating long term PPP Projects for storage of Agri produce. Leap India is currently developing and operating over 700,000 Metric tons of storage capacity across 12 states in India & is currently the 2nd largest company in India for bulk grain storage

Name: META Sisteme de Rafturi S.R.L.
Description:
META Regalbau – The Foundation of Your Logistics                                                             

Since our inception, META Regalbau has evolved from a traditional manufacturer into one of the leading players in European warehousing technology. What began with standard shelving has grown into a comprehensive portfolio covering the entire spectrum of intralogistics; from the versatile, boltless META CLIP, our META Multipal  pallrtracking, systems and high-density META Multibloc rolling racks to complex, structural steel multi-tier installations and automated warehouse infrastructures.

Quality as a Constructive Principle We design, calculate, and produce our systems largely in-house at our production facilities in Germany and the Czech Republic. This allows us to guarantee the renowned ‘Made in Germany’ quality. Our products meet the strictest safety standards, including the rigorous RAL-RG 614 quality marks, ensuring structural integrity and durability that go far beyond legal minimums. Our systems are trusted worldwide, forming the backbone of distribution centers for e-commerce giants, the automotive industry, and retail chains.

International Network, Local Expertise Our strength lies in our proximity to the market. From our headquarters in Arnsberg (Germany), we operate a tight-knit network of subsidiaries and strategic partners across Europe and beyond.
Despite this international scale, we maintain a culture of continuity. Many of our engineers and consultants have been part of the META family for decades, fostering a spirit of partnership where new colleagues and clients are welcomed with open arms and deep expertise.

Storage. Systems. Solutions.

We operate in an era where every squar meter counts and supply chain velocity determines profitability. META’s mission is not simply to supply steel, but to transform raw space into operational return on investment. 

Our core values centre on Reliability, Precision, and Partnership.

Name: Merit Logistics
Description:
Merit Logistics is partnered with many of the nation’s leading grocery chains, retailers, and 3PLs to provide flexible, skilled warehouse labor solutions that assist them in optimizing efficiency, throughput, and profitability for their distribution centers.

We strive to help our clients succeed by providing the most reliable, responsive, expert warehouse labor services available to support their supply chain goals, while providing our warehouse associates with opportunities to grow, succeed, and prosper. We offer highly personalized service, making each client feel like our only customer, while also maintaining a national footprint to service their warehouse requirements anywhere in the USA.

Trusted, Reliable, Expert Warehouse Services

* Sorting/Hauling/Put Away
* Order Selection
* Palletizing/Stackdown
* Micro Fulfillment Center Labor
* Travel Teams/Contingency Labor
* Sanitation
* Security
* Pilot Program/Special Project +

Find out how Merit will help you to streamline operations and increase the profitability of your distribution centers. Call 888.311.3909 today.

Name: Inlogsys Techno Pvt Ltd
Description: Inlogsys is incorporated as a Private Limited Corporation in  the year 2009. The group is actively involved in the field of – LOGISTIC Equipments Since 1990. Inlogsys provides creative and cost effective warehouse design, distribution, supply chain execution and material handling solutions to a broad range of Industries. Company's expertise, a central team of research and solutions delivery managers, Integrated Solutions (“one-stop-shop”), Strong industry and supplier partnerships, access to the latest technological tools are some of the key factors in success of Inlogsys. Extensive experience in creating  warehouse layout, design and implementation of conventional and highly automated material handling solutions for warehouse, distribution, and manufacturing operations.

Name: THE 3PL INTERNATIONAL LIMITED
Description:
The3PL - Delivering your goods worldwide.

Packing and shipping your products around the globe: reliably, securely, fast.
If you’re selling your merchandise online and shipping it overseas, you need a third party logistics (3PL) and order fulfilment specialist operating on a global level.

Operating across several continents, The3PL.com manages stock and delivers goods all over the world for emerging and major brands like yours.  We have major distribution hubs in Europe, Latin America, USA, Canada, India and Australia.

We are highly adept at seamlessly integrating with both established and new e-commerce platforms, couriers, marketplaces and inventory and accounting systems.  We can give you access to multiple channels and globally recognised platforms to increase sales.

Areas of expertise:

International logistics and shipping:

	Warehousing with scalable storage facilities
	Pick, pack and distribution of goods anywhere in the world
	Customs clearance across international borders
	Shipping, cargo consolidation and multi carrier options
	Real time order tracking for total logistics control
	Returns handling, processing and reverse logistics.

Integrated e-commerce software to fulfil your orders - start to finish:

	Seamless integration with all the major e-commerce platforms, shopping carts and marketplaces
	Accessible cloud based software with real time order management information
	Barcode scanning and labelling technology to track every order and stock movement 
	e-commerce and 3PL fulfilment accounting systems with automated inventory and billing.

Delivering your goods with outstanding customer service:

	Scalable, adaptable services to match your business size and growth
	An agile, highly experienced e-commerce, order fulfilment and 3PL team
	On the ground presence and expertise across key strategic continents.

So if you want a fulfilment and logistics partner who can deliver to your customers on time, every time

Name: Backsafe Australia
Description:
Over 7,000 products to choose from. One talented design and fabrication team. Unlimited potential for materials handling and storage solutions that transform safety and efficiency for businesses across Australia - from Rio Tinto, Fortescue, BHP and FMG to Sodexo, Amazon, Bunnings and Komatsu.

At Backsafe, we’ve been working and innovating on the commercial and industrial frontline since 2004, providing human-centred engineering (HCE) advice and solutions that keep workers safe and businesses running productively.

While the challenges we help you tackle are practical, our reputation for saving clients time, stress and money hinges on our personalised approach and human-centred ethos as much as our product sourcing, design and fabrication expertise.

Instead of simply looking at the task, we focus on the human performing it. We listen to you. We understand the workplace safety and efficiency challenges your people face: the hazards, WHS risks, workflows and opportunities. Then, we openly share our industry expertise and advice on choosing the simplest, smartest product, system or site-wide solution.

No hard sell. No over-engineering.

Put a world of workplace optimisation products at your fingertips and a wealth of human-centred problem-solving smarts and product-development capabilities at your beck and call. Stop jeopardising WHS and your KPIs and start reaping the rewards of a safer, more efficient workplace.

Name: AR Shelving - Storage Solutions

This knowledge plus the continuous improvement in product quality and innovation, has become AR Shelving in one of the leading companies in the sector in Europe.

Description: First launched in 1968, SEMA has forged its reputation for excellence to become the lead voice on safe storage practice. SEMA’s mission is our commitment to promoting and extending the safe design, installation and use of storage equipment manufactured and supplied by our members.

Notre société se développe autour de deux pôles :

- L’aménagement de surfaces commerciales: nous sommes distributeur de matériels, reconnu dans différents domaines d’activités: Bricolage, Alimentation, Négoce de matériaux, Jardinerie, Bazar, Jouet, Textile, Pharmacie, Automobile...

- L’équipement de surfaces de stockage: afin d’optimiser au mieux votre réserve, nous vous proposons différents systèmes de stockage: palettier, semi-lourd, cantilever, plateforme, cloison....

Kollirama Maroc met à votre disposition tout son savoir-faire et son professionnalisme dans la réalisation de vos projets :

- Enfin nous disposons également d’une équipe de monteurs performante, pour assurer toutes les prestations liées à la pose, l’entretien et le SAV de vos installations.

Notre politique commerciale intègre en permanence les valeurs de l’entreprise : le respect de nos engagements, la réactivité et la préoccupation de servir au mieux nos clients.

C’est grâce à ces valeurs et à notre savoir-faire, qu’aujourd’hui nous comptons parmi nos référencements de grandes enseignes nationales et internationales.

Name: Prime Distribution Services
Description:
Prime Distribution Services provides a comprehensive suite of Retail Consolidation solutions to help companies comply with complex big box retailer delivery requirements.  

With over 2.5 million square feet of dry and temperature controlled warehousing space strategically located across the nation, our retail logistics solutions help deliver your products to retail distribution centers on-time to avoid penalties and maximize your profits. 

Our team of retail supply chain experts have helped countless clients achieve compliance with top U.S. big box retailer delivery requirements while delivering transportation cost savings.

Name: Serviap Logistics
Description:
We help our customers bring efficiency, effectiveness, and the highest standards of compliance to their warehouses and logistics centers.

Our warehouse setup services include supplying and installing racking, floor marking, signage, collision protection, and labels. 

We also offer project management services whereby we help plan the setup of a warehouse or distribution center and then supply and install a tailored package of the features mentioned above.

Name: Precision Warehouse Design
Description:
Precision Warehouse Design (PWD) is a leading material handling integrator and solutions provider with extensive expertise in design, engineering, and implementation of rack and storage systems, automated material handling and conveyor solutions, and controls software. 
PWD’s unique business model of speed to market, technical competency, and employee empowerment has allowed the company to complete thousands of projects that deliver holistic systems including order fulfillment, AS/RS, conveyance, carousels, pallet rack systems, sortation systems, picking modules, mezzanines, controls software, and after-market services. 
In 2024, PWD joined Sammons Warehouse Solutions, a subsidiary of Sammons Industrial. Sammons Industrial is a subsidiary of Sammons Enterprises, an employee-owned family of businesses dedicated to becoming the preferred single-source solution for industrial operations through service, community engagement, and integrity. The Sammons Industrial family of businesses include PWD and the following brands: Briggs Equipment, Briggs Earth & Ag, Briggs Truck & Rail, Sync Storage Solutions, and SitePro Rentals, giving PWD the ability to connect clients with everything they need to build and run their facility.
PWD’s priority is to build relationships with clients and understand how to solve their material handling challenges. Learn more at www.precisionwarehousedesign.com.

Name: Link51 Storage Systems
Description:
Link51 has been producing innovative storage solutions in the UK since 1951. Whittan’s original trusted brand started out as The Handy Angle over 70 years ago, and has grown to become the UK’s largest manufacturer of steel shelving and pallet racking.

Link 51 also offer a range of storage related services from no obligation site surveys and space planning to design, installation and safety inspections.  The company's comprehensive range of products and services is suitable for all types of markets including; manufacturing, distribution, education, healthcare, food & drink, heritage and retail sectors.

Our manufacturing facilities all benefit from running integrated ISO9001, ISO14001 and ISO 18001 quality and environmental control systems and being UK based, keep our customers’ carbon footprint to a minimum.

Our particular commitment to health and safety in design and construction means Link 51 works in partnership with a growing number of clients, for whom Link 51 provide peace of mind – particularly when it comes to the implementation of large-scale or technically complex schemes.

Link 51 is part of Whittan Storage Systems, which manufactures an extensive range of pallet racking, shelving, lockers, cupboards and other storage equipment for clients around the world.

Name: BHD VIETNAM RACKING FACTORY
Description:
BHD is one of leading supplier of a comprehensive range of Warehouse Storage Equipment in Vietnam. Our focus is to assist clients in maximizing warehouse space to reduce cost and increase their satisfactions.

We are specialized in producing various US standard teardrop pallet racks, Australian standard pallet racking, European standard pallet racking and cantilever racking. With the continuous improvement of the company's production capacity, we will have more and more products to supply such as push back racking, drive in racking and so on.

BHD Vietnam has unique advantages. It is no import duty to United States. The port city Da Nang is only 45 mins drive from our factory. And there is the direct shipping lane from Da Nang Port to Long Beach & Los Angeles Port. We expect to establish long term business relationship with all racking distributors and buyers.

Name: HOLD Self Storage
Description:
HOLD is a new self storage business helping Londoners and local businesses make more space for what matters. 

We lead with service first and people at the heart. We want us storing your belongings to have a direct, positive impact on your life which is why at H*LD Self-Storage, we're reimagining the way you think about space. 

 More Than Storage: We don't just rent out storage units; we create room for your life. Your space, your canvas, your sanctuary.

 Elevating Lives: Our mission is to empower you with the freedom to live, work, and thrive. We believe space should be accessible, not a luxury.

 People-first Service: With top-notch security, 24/7 access, and a commitment to your peace of mind, we want to become London's self-storage champion.

 Join the Movement: Welcome to the future of self-storage. Join us in making space for life and reclaiming the joy of clutter-free living.

 Serving London: Proudly located in the heart of London, we're here to serve our vibrant community.

 Connect With Us: Join our network for updates, tips on decluttering, and the latest in self-storage solutions.

Discover how 'Hold Self-Storage' is creating space for brighter, more organised, and happier lives.

Name: StorBox Self-Storage
Description:

Name: Djibouti International Free Trade Zone
Description:
L’APFZD en partenariat avec China Merchant Group (CMG) and Dalian Port (PDA) a lancé un projet ambitieux de construction  d’une zone franche commerciale et industrielle d’une superficie de 48km2, activement dans l’exploitation, la construction, la gestion et l’opération de la zone franche Internationale de Djibouti s’appuyant sur les expériences réussies en Chine.

Cette zone franche suivra le modele du PPC (Port-Park-City) caractérisé par un développement intégré du « port à l’avant, des parcs industriels au milieu et des villes ».Elle sera une plateforme moderne fournissant différentes services de qualité pour les entreprise qui seront installées dans la zone.

La Zone franche internationale de Djibouti s’étendant sur 48.2km2, dont 6km2 pour la première phase est 2.4km2 pour la pilot zone à proximité des principaux ports de Djibouti.

L’objectif principal de la Zone franche Internationale est de devenir un nouveau moteur du développement économique de DJIBOUTI d’un centre logistique, Commercial, industriel et financier en Afrique de l’Est.

Elle se focalise sur le développement d’industries telles que la logistique, le commerce, la production et la transformation.

Cette dernière est constituée par les matériaux de construction, l’électroménager, l’automobile et ces accessoires, la machinerie, l’ameublement, l’industrie électrique etc...

La zone franche Internationale de Djibouti s’attache à établir un environnement commercial en conformité avec la règlementation internationale.

Elle s’engage aussi à rechercher de nouvelles idées et nouvelles voies pour élargir l’ouverture et approfondir la reforme, et pour mieux servir les entreprise internationales.

 Ready to transform your warehouse? Connect with us today to explore how Safer Storage Systems can help you build safer, stronger, and more sustainable warehouse operations.

Careers | Partnerships | Growth through automation

Name: Rightbot Technologies
Description: Full Stack Warehouse Automation - AI-driven robotics platform

Name: Self Storage India
Description:
Access to adequate space, at home or office, is always an issue. Unused items tend to lie around and kill productivity. They also take up valuable space. Self Storage India was created with the idea of putting an end to all this.

Self Storage India was born out of the vision to bring the concept of self-storage to India. We realized that with the transformations that were taking place in the country, it was time that a push was given to self-storage.

Self Storage India offers flexibility and convenience when you pick a storage option. Your items stay secure, and you can access them whenever you like. There are restrictions on who can get access to your storage space so that you can stay worry-free.

We have a dedicated staff at every warehouse who are there to guide and assist you. Right from the time you call or visit us for an inquiry, our experienced executives will be there with you till the time you rent a room. Leasing a storage unit is as easy as one-two-three.

As a company, we take pride in knowing our business and our customers. We are well aware of the needs of Indian households and businesses. We know precisely how Indians think about keeping items, what makes them hoard things, and what do people look for when renting a storage space. This makes us suitably positioned to cater to the needs of our customers, whomever they may be.

If you are a business, you may have unused boxes taking up valuable real estate. Instead, you could rent with Self Storage India and clear out your office for better use.

As an individual, your home may need restructuring for a variety of reasons. At such times, we can come to your help. Take up a renting space with us and experience the thrill of a new and more spacious lifestyle.

For further details, feel free to check out https://selfstorageindia.com/company-profile-self-storage-india/

Name: 3PL Worldwide, Inc
Description:
3PL Worldwide is a trusted third-party logistics provider offering tailored fulfillment services for direct-to-consumer (DTC), business-to-business (B2B), and social media-driven commerce. Our capabilities are designed to support brands and sellers of all sizes by delivering scalable, efficient, and reliable logistics solutions across multiple channels.

For DTC brands, we handle every aspect of the fulfillment process—warehousing, inventory control, pick and pack, shipping, and returns management. Our systems integrate with major e-commerce platforms like Shopify, WooCommerce, and Amazon, providing real-time inventory updates, fast order processing, and detailed visibility for both clients and customers. With a focus on accuracy and speed, we help brands deliver outstanding experiences to their end users.

On the B2B side, 3PL Worldwide supports wholesale fulfillment with deep experience in routing guides, EDI compliance, palletizing, and custom labeling for retail partners. Whether you’re shipping to boutiques or major retailers, we ensure on-time, compliant deliveries that meet every spec.

We also specialize in fulfillment for social media-driven commerce. Our technology connects with platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook Shops, enabling creators and influencers to scale product sales with ease. From viral launches to daily orders, we make fulfillment seamless, so you can focus on growth.
Location: East and West Coast Locations, CT and CA

Name: Warehouse Now
Description:
Warehouse Now is a warehousing & supply chain Company which caters to all kinds of warehousing needs of its customers. 

WH Now has warehouses available to be used for storage by its clients for flexible periods of time which can be from 10 days to 9 years. 

It has in its inventory 1000 plus warehouses in more than 100 cities of varying sizes from 100 sft to 2 Lac sft. 

WH Now offers to its clients consistency and standardisation of services across all its warehouses. 

WH Now takes care of end to end Operations and also provide logistics solutions as per client’s requirement.

Name: Warehouse Services, Inc.
Description: As a privately held, Certified WBE, Warehouse Services, Inc. (WSI) has national 3PL coverage offering warehousing, transportation and added value services for many Fortune 100 and 500 Companies.  Currently WSI has over 100 operations in 18 states with a strong presence in the West, Mid-West, South, and South East U.S.  Utilizing 6-sigma methodology WSI's expertise is proven in distribution, client system integration and domestic and international supply chain (SC) enhancement.  The WSI Consultant Team is available to evaluate your current SC, determine risk and efficiency variables and identify opportunities for improvement; the WSI asset management team can bring flexible asset utilization allowing for business challenges and variability; and the WSI operational team will meet your day-to-day operational excellence requirements.  WSI - an aggressive solution driven supply chain partner.

Name: GoodStorage
Description:
A maior empresa de armazenamento do Brasil. Somos especialistas em espaços inteligentes que proporcionam mais qualidade de vida para pessoas e mais eficiência para negócios. 
Com unidades localizadas nos bairros mais estratégicos, estamos sempre a poucos metros de onde há grande demanda por áreas, tanto de auto armazenamento pessoal, quanto para estoques e centros de distribuição.
Oferecemos soluções de 1m² a 10.000m², sempre sob medida para a necessidade de cada um. Gerenciamos as melhores formas de utilização de espaços para garantir que a cidade possa se desenvolver de forma dinâmica e sustentável, otimizando a infraestrutura existente e reduzindo deslocamentos entre pessoas e pertences, entre produtos e o destino final. 
Vamos consolidar São Paulo como referência em Smart City, um local mais integrado, próspero e condizente com os desafios do século 21.
A GoodStorage foi idealizada e fundada em 2013 pelo atual CEO Thiago Cordeiro, com investimento da Evergreen Investment Advisors, gestora de private equity.

Name: BITO-Lagertechnik Bittmann GmbH
Description:
BITO is a medium-sized company with about 890 employees, specialising in the areas of warehouse equipment and picking systems.
Disclaimer: http://bit.ly/BITO-Impressum

Founded nearly 170 years ago, today we rank among Europe's top providers in the storage technology industry. The secret to our success: Tradition, reliability and the continual development of new product ideas. But success alone is not our goal – we take our social responsibility to our employees and their relevant regions seriously, too.

At our locations in Meisenheim and Lauterecken in South West Germany, we have over 140,000 m² of production facilities devoted to customer-oriented, ground-breaking, top-quality products. BITO is one of the few end-to-end suppliers of warehouse systems in the intralogistics industry. We focus on direct business – fast processing of orders through catalogue, shop or sales centre. Our other focus is on the planning, project management and implementation of complex and demanding warehouse concepts.

Name: Agility Logistics Parks
Description:
Agility Logistics Parks is one of the largest private owners and developers of warehousing and light industrial parks in the Middle East, Africa and South Asia. It funds, builds and manages international-standard facilities that help companies operate and expand in the world’s fastest-growing markets. Agility Logistics Parks offer unmatched infrastructure and ready access to transportation networks in strategic locations, with ready access to markets and with services that include 24/7 security, power, connectivity and facilities management. ALP’s 1,000+ customers are multi-nationals, regional and local champions, and small and medium-sized companies.

Agility Logistics Parks has 40 years of design, contracting, engineering, project management and facilities maintenance experience. It engineers world-class structures and complexes with sustainable design features that lower costs and improve efficiency.

ALP has $1.5 billion of real estate assets, 10 million sqm of land and more than 3 million sqm of logistics facilities.

ALP is part of the Agility group, a world-leading provider of logistics solutions with 26,000 employees, 500+ offices and revenue of more than US$5.3 billion.

Name: Zona Franca Barranquilla
Description:
Zona Franca de Barranquilla, Pionera en Colombia, cuenta con una extensión de 1.000.000 M² ubicados en el corazón portuario de la ciudad de Barranquilla, con una Puerta de Interconexión con la Sociedad Portuaria Regional de Barranquilla se convierte en la única Zona Franca de Colombia con ingreso directo de ¨Puerto – Zona¨ permitiendo con esto el acceso ágil y seguro de la carga.

Con su tradicional perfil industrial de bienes y servicios ,comercial, logístico y portuario es uno de los polos de desarrollo industrial de la región Caribe colombiana.

Historia

Zona Franca de Barranquilla, pionera en este sector; se crea en 1958 gracias a la ley 105 del año en mención; en el año 1991 se inicia el proceso de privatización; dos años mas tarde (1993), tres empresas licitan en busca de la adjudicación del contrato, en 1994 se expide la resolución 0978 otorgando la calidad de usuario operador a Sodezona S.A, quien cambia su razón social a Zona Franca de Barranquilla S.A (ZFBQ), este ultimo firma su contrato inicial de arrendamiento en el año 1994 con término al año 2009, y amplia este en el año 2006 hasta el año 2024.

Name: Aeropuertos Argentina Cargas
Description:
Somos la unidad de negocio de la unidad de negocio de Aeropuertos Argentina especializada en almacenamiento y logística integral para el comercio exterior. Administramos las terminales de carga de los principales aeropuertos internacionales del país, brindando soluciones a agentes de importación y exportación, operadores de carga y compañías aéreas.

Nuestra sede central está en el Aeropuerto Internacional de Ezeiza, y sucursales en Córdoba, Mendoza, Mar del Plata, Aeroparque Jorge Newbery y Tucumán.

Eficiencia, seguridad y tecnología en cada operación.

Name: Dexion - Gonvarri Material Handling
Description:
Dexion – Gonvarri Material Handlingis a leading European provider of industrial storage and automation solutions. With 70+ years of experience and strong brands like Dexion, Constructor, Kasten, and Kredit, we deliver tailored racking systems and steel structures across Europe. 

We operate in two divisions: 

Industrial: Manual and semi-automated storage systems for logistics, retail, and manufacturing. 

Automation: Engineering and steel construction for system integrators in automated warehouse projects. 

With 1,200+ employees, 20+ sites, and 6 production facilities, we offer end-to-end solutions—from design to installation. Our focus: customer proximity, engineering excellence, and sustainable innovation. 

We are committed to: 

Reducing CO₂ emissions by 50% by 2030 

100% recycling of production waste 

A zero-accident safety strategy 

As an employer, we foster diversity, collaboration, and continuous development in a future-driven industry. 

Let’s shape the future of intralogistics together

Name: Pragati

Name: Bozzuto's Inc
Description:
Bozzuto's Inc. is a leading total service wholesale distributor of food and household products to retailers in New England, New York, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania. Established in 1945, the company is headed by Chairman, President, and CEO Michael A. Bozzuto. Based in Cheshire, Connecticut.

Among its many professional awards, Bozzuto's has won the IGA International President's Cup seven times. This prestigious award is the highest honor that an international IGA organization can receive and identifies Bozzuto's as a leader among IGA distributors.

Name: Cisco-Eagle
Description:
We help companies take control of their operations through smart, scalable material handling systems. From conveyors and automation to storage and safety, we design and implement solutions that solve real-world challenges like reducing downtime, increasing throughput, improving safety, and optimizing labor.

Our customers span warehousing, distribution, manufacturing, and commercial environments. They count on us for more than equipment…they trust our people to deliver deep experience, honest guidance, and exceptional service.

As a 100% employee-owned company, every team member has a stake in your success. That accountability shows up in every design, every installation, and every service call.

We’re a long-term partner committed to helping you streamline today’s operations while planning for tomorrow’s growth.

With locations in Dallas, Houston, San Antonio, Tulsa, Oklahoma City, Austin, Little Rock, Florida, Charlotte, Michigan, Missouri and Tennessee, we serve customers nationwide and in over 70 countries.

Name: Damon Technology
Description:
Damon is a leading high-tech enterprise specializing in smart logistics systems and intralogistics equipment manufacturing. Since 1997, we have been deeply focused on intelligent manufacturing and industrial automation, building over 20 years of expertise in system integration and large-scale project implementation.

We provide a one-stop solution for logistics automation, covering:
Core conveying components such as rollers and motors；
Key equipment including conveying systems, sorting systems, storage systems, handling systems, and logistics automation software；
Smart warehousing solutions from conveying & sorting systems to four-way shuttle dense storage and intelligent control & dispatch platforms。

With strong R&D and manufacturing capabilities, Damon has delivered successful projects for global leaders such as Amazon, Shein, Shopee, Temu, Anta, Coupang, and MercadoLibre. Our solutions serve industries including e-commerce fulfillment, express parcel hubs, retail & omnichannel logistics, apparel, pharmaceuticals, and in-plant logistics for manufacturing.

Today, Damon’s intelligent solutions are deployed in more than 30 countries across South America, Australia, Asia-Pacific, the Middle East, Europe, and North America — helping customers transform warehouses into smart factories and achieve supply chain automation.

Our vision: To become a global leader in smart logistics equipment and system solutions, enabling businesses worldwide to upgrade with reliable Chinese manufacturing and services.

Name: PROCER
Description:
Desde 2011, nós da Procer traduzimos nosso domínio tecnológico em prol de um único propósito: preservar os lucros no pós-colheita. Quando o grão sai da colheitadeira, todos os resultados passam a depender da gestão de desperdício. É por isso que cercamos o grão com o máximo cuidado. Usamos a mais avançada combinação de hardware e software, e de forma inteligente conservamos cada grão colhido. 

É simples: no agro, você ganha onde não perde, e cada 1% preservado torna você 1% mais competitivo. E tornar você mais competitivo é nosso negócio. 

AGROINTELIGÊNCIA DE PÓS-COLHEITA.

Name: Bodegas San Francisco Chile

Montt) y 3 en Lima, Perú.

a 2km do Terminal Portuário de Navegantes - Portonave,

Name: Grupo Porto Seco Centro-Oeste
Description:
O Porto Seco Centro-Oeste S/A é um terminal alfandegado de uso público, destinado à armazenagem e à movimentação de mercadorias importadas, ou destinadas à exportação, sendo utilizado como facilitador das Operações de Comércio Exterior. 

Foi o primeiro Porto Seco da região centro-oeste, criado por meio de concorrência pública, em que empresários goianos formaram um consórcio vencedor da licitação, obtendo assim, a licença para a prestação dos serviços aduaneiros.

Da permissão à implantação foram dois anos, tendo em vista as adequações exigidas pela Receita Federal, constantes do Edital de Licitação. Alfandegada em setembro de 1999, a instituição incorporou na região uma nova e importante alternativa logística, desempenhando papel fundamental no desenvolvimento do Estado, aproximando-o do mercado globalizado. 

Possuidor de uma ampla e moderna infra-estrutura e pessoal altamente especializado, o Porto Seco Centro Oeste oferece aos seus clientes, a solução ideal em Estação Aduaneira, dinamizando as operações de importação e exportação com a conseqüente redução de custos e otimização de resultados. Em parceria com a Log-In, Logística Intermodal S/A (Companhia Vale do Rio Doce), presta serviços de logística integrada com os mais modernos padrões internacionais de qualidade, segurança e agilidade.

Name: SPAT - Port Toamasina [Officiel]
Description:
La Société du Port à Gestion Autonome de Toamasina (SPAT) est l’autorité en charge de la gestion et de l’exploitation du Port de Toamasina. Suite à la réforme institutionnelle initiée par le gouvernement malgache, les ports de commerce dont celui de Toamasina sont dotés d’une autonomie administrative et financière. L’Etat se désengage ainsi des activités à caractère industriel et commercial dans les ports et les délèguent à des sociétés privées.

La SPAT est le premier et le seul représentant étatique dans le domaine portuaire. Il lui incombe d’attribuer à des sociétés de droit privé au titre de concession, permission et autorisation d’occupation temporaire du domaine portuaire. A Toamasina, la première étape du désengagement de L’État concerne la gestion du terminal à conteneurs du port de Toamasina.

Name: Sohan Lal Commodity Management Ltd.
Description:
Sohan Lal Commodity Management Limited (SLCM) is a global post-harvest Agri-Logistics Group. It is an ISO 9001: 2015, ISO 22000: 2018, ISO 33000, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018 and ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certified Group.  It is an integrated player that provides one-stop solution to the end user with diversified portfolio of services ranging from Warehouse Management, Agriculture Financing and Collateral Management to Procurement. SLCM warehouse management is equipped with technology to offer storage and protection services for the entire range of agri-commodities. Whether your requirement is for few storage boxes, closed units of 100-200 sq.ft or a huge space like 10,000 sq.ft for a month or years, you can rent as per your requirements. 

With an increased rate of urbanization & globalization, and rapidly changing lifestyle, the demand for storage space is growing.
