Name: Tims - Terminal Industrial Multimodal da Serra
Description:
Desde o final de 1996 no mercado, o TIMS destaca-se como o maior e mais completo terminal multimodal do Espírito Santo. A integração entre rodovias, ferrovias, portos e aeroporto é um importante diferencial do ‘condomínio logístico’. A interligação dos modais está intrínseca aos mais expressivos centros de produção e consumo do Brasil, como São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Minas Gerais e Bahia.

Concebido de forma a possibilitar a implantação em áreas específicas (industrial e comercial), de empresas de movimentação e armazenamento de cargas em geral, indústrias, transportadoras, prestadores de serviços e empresas voltadas para atividades comerciais, o empreendimento oferece completa e eficiente infraestrutura física e de serviços.

Name: Shree Shubham Logistics Limited (SSL)
Description:
Shree Shubham Logistics Limited (SSL) is an ISO 9001 & 22000 Certified Company a subsidiary of Kalpataru Power Transmission Ltd. (KPTL). 

SSL undertakes an array of activities in the post-harvest value chain for Agri-commodities based on an integrated business model.Our activities include warehousing, procurement, primary processing, trading, collateral management, funding facilitation, funding, testing & certification, and pest management in relation to Agri-commodities. Our activities are aimed at a wide spectrum of market participants dealing in Agri commodities, including farmers, traders & aggregators, government agencies, banks and electronic commodities exchanges.

SSL has developed 24 Agri Logistics Parks (ALPs), which are warehouses that are scientifically designed and equipped with modern infrastructure conforming to WDRA standards . Our Company manages and operates 149 warehouses through a hub and spoke model across the states of Rajasthan, Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra.

SSL is an early adopter of “Public Private Partnership (PPP)” related to Agri Warehousing and has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Rajasthan State Warehousing Corporation (RSWC), amongst other, for management and operations of its warehouses in the state of Rajasthan. SSL is managing and operating warehouses owned & hired by Rajasthan State Warehousing Corporation (RSWC) pursuant to the MoU at 38 locations in Rajasthan. 

In addition to the above, our testing & certification services are offered through our: (a) Analysis and Certification Laboratory at Jodhpur, Basni Agricultural Produce Market Yard (“Central ACL”), which is ISO 9001 : 2008 and ISO / IEC 17025 : 2005 (NABL) certified, and (b) 36 satellite testing & certification laboratories across the states of Rajasthan, Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra.

Name: NDR Warehousing Pvt Ltd
Description:
Founded by the Late Naidu Dasaradharami Reddy in 1986, NDR Warehousing Pvt. Ltd. constructs and delivers efficient and cost-effective storage solutions to businesses dealing in Industrial, Commercial, and Consumer verticals.
 
The company which had modest beginnings with a warehouse measuring 400 Sq.ft, has now expanded to multiple distribution centers across India measuring over 18 million Sq.ft combined across India. It is spearheaded by Naidu Amrutesh Reddy and has cemented its position as a first-choice provider of Warehousing Space, and Industrial Park Solutions for MNCs, Domestic Conglomerates, and leading 3PL providers.
 
At NDR Warehousing, we promise an experience of unparalleled efficiency, and reliability while delivering unmatched solutions to all your industrial and warehousing needs.
 
Vision
We envision being a leading player in the Infrastructure Sector and being part of India's growth story, by contributing positively to social development and improvement of infrastructure.
 
Mission
Our mission is to be the “first-choice” supply chain partner for our clients by providing the ‘best-in-class’ warehousing and value-added services aimed to bring down the cost of logistics without compromising on safety and the environment.

Name: Dunorte Distribuidora
Description:
A Dunorte Distribuidora foi fundada na cidade de Belém, em 1998. Com uma pequena estrutura em uma pequena sala, onde se utilizava somente um aparelho de fax, uma linha telefônica e com o apoio de somente um funcionário. Atuava no mercado com apenas duas marcas (Leite Manacá e Charque União).

Em 2000, com o aperfeiçoamento das atividades da empresa, surge a proposta da multinacional UNILEVER BESTFOODS para fazer a distribuição dos produtos: Cica, Creme Vegetal Delicata e Margarina Claybom. Para aceitar esse novo desafio foram feitos investimentos para adequar a empresa e atender com eficiência e eficácia o empreendimento proposto pela UNILEVER. Assim, adquiriu-se um prédio para a área administrativa, um galpão para o armazenamento de seu estoque e logística, situada em área de grande circulação em Belém. Investiu-se em dois caminhões e também na contratação de funcionários.

Em 2003, a empresa LEVER IGARASSU, faz a proposta de iniciar o trabalho de distribuição com a linha ALA, produto até então desconhecido. Inicialmente, houve resistência por parte dos clientes em comercializá-lo, sendo, portanto uma dificuldade a ser vencida: girar no ponto de venda um produto novo no mercado. Graças ao incansável trabalho da equipe Dunorte, que desenvolveu um trabalho de base nos principais atacados e varejos formadores de opinião, a linha ALA se tornou em pouco tempo a mais conhecida e mais vendida no segmento Bag. 

Em 2004, a UNILEVER com objetivo de fortalecer a distribuição de seus produtos iniciou dois projetos: DFF – Distribuidor focado no fornecedor; e, DAC – Distribuidor Autorizado da categoria. A Dunorte, após ser aprovada em todos os critérios exigidos, foi a escolhida para desenvolver esse trabalho.

Name: TITAN Containers
Description:
TITAN's global storage solutions enable business clients and consumers to store anything, anywhere.

A leading light in the global storage industry since founding in 1987, TITAN has evolved into the world’s largest containerised storage solutions company. Our focus is on safe, flexible, responsible storage.

With a footprint spanning 90 countries, TITAN has six distinct brands that provide clients with the storage solutions they require to perform at their best.
Our portfolio includes temperature-controlled facilities, self-storage centres and dry storage, which comfortably meet the needs of industries ranging from pharmaceuticals and food to renewable energy and construction.

Clients include numerous industry-leading companies, such as Vestas, Tesco and Sonoco. Alongside these, we offer storage solutions to many thousands of smaller businesses and private clients worldwide.

With more than 50,000 containers available across Europe, Asia and the Americas, we are pioneers
of innovative Storage-as-a-Service solutions that align with today's ever-growing demands on storage space.

Our collection includes both single and inter-modular containers, which can operate independently or as part of integrated systems. These enable us to offer clients tailored storage methods that are highly flexible.

Innovations like these help TITAN set industry standards and expand its global reach – while holding true to the culture and values that have shaped the company for more than three decades.

An exciting period in TITAN's history began in 2019 when Kirk Kapital joined as co-owners to support us through our next chapter.

Bridgestone, Amazon, GM, Honda, Hewitt, Loblaw, Coca Cola, Martin Brower et bien d’autres utilisent les solutions de Damotech et font confiance à Damotech en tant que partenaire en sécurité des palettiers. Name: Bulk Terminal Zeeland B.V.
Description:
Bulk Terminal Zeeland is located at the port of Vlissingen. Vlissingen is centrally situated in the southwest of the Netherlands inbetween Rotterdam and Antwerp. Our terminal can handle vessels with a maximum draft of 11.5 meters llw. The port is an open port without any locks. 

Our terminal in only ten minutes from the highway leading to all inland destinations. All inland waterways are accesable by barge.

At our terminal we have 11.0ha of storage space available of which 3.5ha is covered. Most of the warehouses are especially designed to store bulk products. The terminal is sealed and safe. The gate can only be opened by authorised personnel and there is appropriate theft protection.

From our terminal your cargo can be forwarded all over Europe, by truck or barge. Because of the favourable location of the terminal near to the highway system, trucks can go inland without delays or traffic jams. This makes the transport most reliable. Our terminal is also directly connected to the European waterway system which enables us to ship cargo inland by barge, the most environmental way of transport within Europe.

At our terminal we have the possibility to crush and screen any bulk cargo in exactly the size you want. Repacking in drums, bigbags or containers is possible. Marking, weighing per unit or truck; you name it, we do it!

Various cranes are available to load and discharge your cargo. We can also handle board/board cargoes. Discharging and loading of bulk cargoes is one of our specialities. For ship owners it is interesting to know  that the port charges are approx. 30% cheaper than in the surrounding ports. Of course our terminal is ISPS certified. Apart from this we are GMP+, SKAL and ISO9001 certified.

Please feel free to contact us at anytime for more information and our best terms and conditions.

Looking forward to meeting you!

Name: BOXIT A/S
Description:
BOXIT er en dansk familieejet virksomhed med rødder i det nordlige Danmark. Virksomheden har udlejet depotrum siden 2003 og har desuden udlejet i omegnen af 50.000 containere.

Vores koncept hos BOXIT er blevet til med inspiration fra USA og deres self-storage begreb. Siden BOXITs tilblivelse har vi oplevet en stigende efterspørgsel efter opbevaringsløsninger til private og erhverv.

Vi udlejer depotrum i vores 11 afdelinger i Jylland og på Fyn. Her bliver kunderne mødt af personlig betjening i vores butikker tilknyttet afdelingerne. Hos os står vores kunders ting sikkert og tørt, vi har overvågning, minimumstemperatur og lav luftfugtighed. 

I vores butikker kan du købe et stort udvalg af flyttetilbehør til brug for opbevaring og flytning – ligesom det er muligt at leje en flyttetrailer.  

BOXIT containeren kom til i 2009, og dermed blev vores produktsortiment udvidet med containerleje til private og erhverv. Nu har vi over 7.000 containere i flåden, som løbende bliver skiftet ud, således at de altid fremstår rene og pæne til vores kunder.

Vores produktsortiment inkluderer også vores populære Flyttebox. Flyttebox er en flyttecontainer, som gør flytningen nem og fleksibel, idet den kan tilpasses vores kunders eget flyttetempo og tidsplan.

Udover almindelige containere producerer vi også specialdesignede containerløsninger i tæt sparring med vores kunder, lige fra idefasen til den færdige løsning står klar til brug.

For at kunne imødekomme behovet i Danmark og Sverige har vi egne chauffører og 7 BOXIT lastbiler. Det betyder, at vi selv, så vidt det er muligt, leverer og afhenter containere hos vores kunder. 

I vores depotrumsafdelinger i Risskov og Aalborg C, har vi desuden kontorhoteller med i alt 93 selvstændige kontorer, der lejes ud efter samme enkle principper som depotrummene.

Vi brænder for at yde en ordentlig service til vores kunder. En service, som er god, hurtig og fleksibel - og vi investerer hver dag i, at gøre det lidt bedre end dagen før.

Name: Asociación Española de Self Storage

Es una organización que representa tanto a los grandes operadores con varias instalaciones en España, como a empresas mas pequeñas y a operadores independientes con trasteros en alquiler, muchos de los cuales son empresas de reciente creación. Los proveedores del sector también pueden ser miembros asociados.

Somos una asociación proactiva que busca informar e influir en el mercado y sus inversores, con la firme determinación de apostar por el avance de nuestra industria utilizando todos los recursos que estén a nuestro alcance.

La AESS es una asociación profesional al amparo de la Ley Orgánica 1/2002, de 22 de marzo, y forma parte de la Federación Europea de Self Storage (FEDESSA) con la que mantiene posturas muy próximas.

Name: Hänel & Co.
Description:
Hänel Lagersysteme, 1953 in Deutschland gegründet, ist ein führender Hersteller von automatisierten Lager- und Kommissioniersystemen. Die Schweizer Niederlassungen von Hänel befinden sich seit ihrer Gründung im Jahr 1972 in Altstätten (SG). 

Die Hänel Lagersysteme sind effiziente Organisations- und Materialflusssysteme, die Arbeitsstunden, Lagerplatz und Kosten reduzieren. Unsere Systeme, einzeln oder in Kombination mit z.B. stationären Transportsystemen bieten produktivere, zuverlässigere und ergonomischere Lösungen als herkömmliche Lagersysteme. Unser Ziel ist es, die interne Logistik in den Bereichen Auftragsabwicklung, Lagerung und Verfügbarkeit zu verbessern.  

Vorteile der Hänel Lagerlösungen sind unter anderem: 

1. Bis zu 70% mehr Stellfläche  
2. Verbesserte Bestandskontrolle und Genauigkeit
3. Höhere Produktivität und Geschwindigkeit
4. Erhöhte Sicherheit und Gefahrenabwehr 
5. Richtige Ergonomie für den Benutzer
6. Schutz vor unberechtigten Zugriffen

Hänel Storage Systems founded in Germany in 1953, is a leading manufacturer of automated storage and order picking systems. The Swiss branches of Hänel has been located in Altstätten (SG) since it was established in 1972. 

Our systems, individually or in combination with e.g. stationary transport systems, offer more productive, reliable and ergonomic solutions than conventional storage systems. Our aim is to improve internal logistics in the areas of order processing, storage and availability. Hänel storage systems are efficient organisational and material flow systems that reduce working hours, storage space and costs. 

Advantages of the Hänel storage solutions are among others:

1. Increased floor space for other uses (often over 60% more)
2. Improved inventory control and accuracy
3. Greater productivity and speed
4. Enhanced safety and security 
5. Proper ergonomics for users
6. protection against unauthorised access

As part of SureStore’s mission, we aim to deliver innovative, future forward storage solutions with high sustainability targets, including net zero carbon operations, whilst also acknowledging the social obligations of ethical businesses today. Every year we serve thousands of customers who are often dealing with a range of challenging circumstances. Name: Green Storage
Description:
Green Storage finns av en anledning: vi vill med teknikens hjälp göra det enklare att förvara de saker du gillar på ett så hållbart sätt som möjligt.
Idag sköter de flesta en stor del av sina liv i mobilen och självklart ska du kunna göra detsamma med ditt förråd.

Hos oss sker hela kundresan i mobilen. Från bokning av förråd, avtalsunderskrift och betalning. Vårt fokus på Green Storage är att göra allt så enkelt, smart och hållbart som möjligt för dig. Därför har vi t ex digitala lås på våra förråd så att du slipper köpa ett onödigt dyrt lås som sedan slängs. Istället laddar du enkelt ner vår mobilapp som du öppnar och stänger anläggningen och ditt förråd med. Busenkelt och praktiskt.

För miljöns skull lyser vi upp förråden med LED och de tänds bara när det är någon i lokalen. Våra förråds- och försäkringspriser är dessutom riktigt låga för att vi vill ha en långsiktig relation med dig. Vill du av någon anledning avsluta relationen, då låser vi inte in dig med långa bindningstider eller krångliga äktenskapsförord. Vi vill helt enkelt att du ska förvara de saker du inte vill göra dig av med hos oss för att du gillar oss! Så enkelt är det.

Green Storage leds av Stefan Nilsson VD, som tillsammans med teamet har över 20 års erfarenhet från både Self Storage-branschen och fastighetsmarknaden.

P.S Är du så omtänksam mot miljön att du har elbil? Då har vi laddstolpar som väntar.

Name: Yes Equipment & Services, Inc.
Description:
Company Profile

At Yes Equipment & Services, Inc. there is a familiar saying, “If you drive it, sit on it, walk on it, wear it, live it, or eat it, it’s probably been handled by a lift truck.” The company, located in Menomonee Falls and Madison Wisconsin, supplies and services new and used lift trucks, as well as personnel carriers, aerial work platforms, material handling equipment and electric forklifts for industries that typically use them to lift and move items throughout a warehouse.

     Yes Equipment offers at their Wisconsin locations high-quality, American-made new and used forklifts and lift trucks backed by an international company, one of the largest in the industry. Some competitors have farmed out the production and, years later, the necessary parts are unavailable. By manufacturing and servicing what it sells, Yale Forklift and its distributors, such as YES provide a chain of original parts and custom service. Yes Equipment still services a 1946 Yale lift truck, as well as material handling equipment manufactured by competitors.

“The largest customers come to us and stay with us because our focus is service,” Cliff Anglewicz (Owner) says. “We understand that their equipment has to work all the time because down time and lost productivity are extremely expensive.”

“We've heard over and over again that we are the most technically advanced Yale dealership,” Cliff says. “Typically, the industry is not technologically advanced, so we have an edge with our customers. I came from the automotive business where everything is computer automated. I'm always looking for ways to do things better for less money.”

In 2001, the Open Invoice System website was implemented, moving Yes Equipment to a paperless system. The Open Invoice System features secured reporting and electronic invoicing, coupled with a unique scanning system.

• mehr Ladeeinheiten auf gleicher Fläche lagern möchten

Wir freuen uns mit Ihnen in Kontakt zu kommen, wenn Sie…

• eine fachgerechte Beratung von einem erfahrenen Lagertechnik Spezialisten wünschen
• nicht nur nach Standardlösungen, sondern auch individuellen Lösungen suchen

 Wir sind das Team der Lagertechnik.de
Bei uns arbeiten knapp 40% der Kollegen schon über 10 Jahre im Unternehmen (Stand 2022)

Name: RISE Commercial District
Description:
The story of RISE Commercial District began with a simple but powerful idea: To change the way businesses think about commercial space.

We saw a growing need for more flexible, affordable, and scalable spaces that could help businesses thrive without the financial burden of long-term leases. In 2010, we opened our first facility in Indianapolis (Castleton), with 7 buildings and 38,500 square feet. What started as a small, practical solution to a common problem quickly grew into something much bigger.

As of the start of 2025, we have expanded to 13 locations across the Midwest, and our aggressive growth plans continue. We’re not just adding buildings; we’re building communities where businesses can thrive. Every location is designed to give businesses the flexibility, support, and resources they need to scale quickly and efficiently.

Our journey is driven by one core belief: that businesses of all sizes need flexibility. Whether you’re a small business just getting started or a larger company looking to grow without the burden of long-term commitments, RISE is here to provide the space you need to succeed.

As we look toward the future, we remain committed to empowering businesses by providing them with the tools, space, and support they need to thrive. The work we do today lays the foundation for tomorrow’s success. We are proud to stand by our tenants and grow alongside them— because RISE is more than just a place to work. From automated inspections to advanced analytics for Material Handling Equipment (MHE), RAMS delivers actionable insights that drive efficiency, reduce risks, and support better decision-making.

Rack Audit: Backed by our parent company Salt Design and Infra Services Pvt. Ltd. and RAMS Technology in providing comprehensive rack audit and Stability Certification.
IRDS (Integrated Racking Diagnostic Suite): Automates inspections, tracks issues, and ensures compliance for End Clients to carry out rack inspections.

MEPS (Mobile Equipment Positioning Suite): Optimizes MHE tracking and route management.
RTSS (Real-Time Safety Suite): Provides real-time alerts and impact analysis.

With a growing footprint across industries and geographies, RAMS is more than a technology provider; we are your partner in achieving operational excellence.

Join us as we create a future where warehouse safety and efficiency go hand in hand.

Name: CNAGA Armazéns Gerais Alfandegados Ltda
Description:
Em 1967, a CNAGA foi fundada na cidade de São Sebastião, litoral norte paulista, com o objetivo de incrementar as transações comerciais no porto local, até então desprovido de armazéns e consequentemente, alijado das operações do Comércio Exterior.

Alternativa ideal para o já congestionado Porto de Santos, a CNAGA de São Sebastião foi o primeiro armazém alfandegado do País a receber, em 1972, a permissão do Ministério da Fazenda para operar o regime especial de entreposto aduaneiro na importação. Mais tarde, a permissão foi estendida à exportação e, em 1981, suas unidades de São Sebastião e São Paulo receberam habilitação da Receita Federal para operar também na qualidade de Depósitos Alfandegados Públicos - DAPs - de importação e exportação; atualmente chamados de Porto Seco.

Hoje, a CNAGA representa um Complexo de Terminais Armazenadores, totalmente informatizado, operando sob Regimes Especiais Aduaneiros e especializado na armazenagem de Carga Geral, Contêineres e Grãos. Mantém unidades de operação em São Sebastião, na Grande São Paulo e em Conchas.

Name: Prontometal S.A.
Description:
Prontometal fue fundada en el año 1969 comercializando equipamiento para almacenaje y exhibición de productos, así como también especializándose en equipamiento de logística e integral.

La ingeniería y profesionalismo fue y es el corazón de la empresa, ya sea en sistemas robóticos, automatismos o incrementos en resistencia de racks porta pallets dinámicas.  

Fue precisamente nuestra empresa quien introdujo en tan temprana época el concepto de mejor aprovechamiento del "Espacio" así como facilitar almacenaje, carga, descarga y distribución en Uruguay. En aquellos tiempos cuando la palabra logística no se conocía, Prontometal introdujo al mercado ese concepto de optimización logística.

Más allá de la calidad y la oportunidad de sus productos, fue la "cultura" empresarial que se inauguró con el concepto de "vocación de servicio y excelencia" como primer postulado.

Ese vértigo, fue uno de los diferenciales de la empresa y le valió el "Pronto" de su nombre, que junto al "Metal", que no requiere explicación, identiﬁcaron e identiﬁcan a la propuesta más económica y eﬁciente en soluciones de espacio; “la logística para ganar espacio”.

Prontometal exporta a los países de América Latina así como también amplió su comercialización al resto del mundo.

Nuestras alianzas estratégicas con lideres mundiales indiscutibles en tecnología y automatización nos hace cada vez mas sólidos en nuestros mercados. Es por ello que Prontometal realizó junto con Advance el proyecto mas grande de América latina en 2009. Y sigue realizando proyectos de gran porte a través de nuestras alianzas con Automha, Dexion e Interroll.

Name: easyStorage
Description:
easyStorage is a member of the easy family of brands, offering the no-frills approach to storage. The storage industry in its current form is hugely inefficient and therefore much more expensive than it needs to be. If there was ever an industry that the ‘easy’ brand was made for, it is storage.

easyStorage offers a no-frills approach to pricing. Customers will pay a sensible margin for storage and then pay for all the extras as they need them. These would be packing materials, packing, insurance, as well as collection and delivery (with cheaper slots for when a delivery is already booked in the area). Each priced sensibly and on an ‘as needed’ basis.

Unlike traditional self-storage, we bring self-storage to the customer’s door by delivering flat-pack boxes in advance, and then when the items are ready for collection we collect them directly from customers. Unlike walk-in self storage, we take advantage of storing high in a warehouse, using cubic meters that are often otherwise wasted.

Customers manage their accounts online, where they can upload photos and descriptions of what is in each box. This inventory process makes it easy to select particular boxes for return, which can be booked for a preferred date.

Sir Stelios has partnered with entrepreneur Tim Slesinger, the Founder and CEO of easyStorage who has a proven track-record for building a substantial storage business covering 37 cities in 11 different countries.

Name: Nowoczesny Magazyn
Description:

Koszty gospodarki magazynowej można zmniejszyć nawet o 20-30 procent, nie tracąc przy tym na jakości obsługi, szybkości dystrybucji towarów lub na bezpieczeństwie składowanych produktów. Trzeba tylko wiedzieć, jakie w tym celu zastosować metody zarządzania magazynem (także tym niewielkim), jaki sprzęt dobrać i co istotne – mieć czas na to, aby takich rozwiązań poszukać.

„Nowoczesny magazyn” to profesjonalne czasopismo o magazynowaniu i systemach składowania, wspierający specjalistów branży od 1999 roku. Nasi eksperci to profesjonaliści, których wiedza i doświadczenie od lat pomaga firmom w poszukiwaniu nowych, najlepszych rozwiązań. Szczegółowo poruszamy takie zagadnienia jak wyposażenie magazynu, bezpieczeństwo składowania produktów, nowoczesne technologie oraz zarządzanie magazynem. Realizowany w ramach czasopisma portal www.nm.pl to pierwszy na polskim rynku portal dla branży magazynowej.

Wydawcą „Nowoczesnego Magazynu” jest FORUM MEDIA POLSKA Sp. z o.o. - wiodący wydawca czasopism specjalistycznych w Polsce, spółka-córka międzynarodowego holdingu Forum Media Group.

Name: Porto Romano Free Port Zone
Description:
Porto Romano Free Port Zone

Porto Romano Free Port Zone is located in Durrës, Albania in a specific area, which is not separated from the rest of the territory, into which all kinds of goods are shipped. As long as they remain under special terms — there is no storage time limit — products are not subject to import duties, internal taxes (VAT or excise tax duties) or commercial policy measures.

Porto Romano Free Port Zone is at the service of companies with international trade relations who wish to leverage competitive tax advantages.

Concessionaire MBM Port (MBM Port) is a joint company established in 2015 assigned to administrate Porto Romano Free Port Zone in accordance with the Decree no. 493 of Council of Ministers dated 11.07.2019 “On the definition of a free zone of a part of the customs territory of the Republic of Albania in Porto-Romano”.

The tax-free zone covers an area of 1,034,552 m2 and a port is included in the free zone. A private security company ensures safety 24 hours a day, every day of the year.

Free Port Zone is highly attractive area thanks to its geographic position in the Dalmatian coast, greatest port capacity for loading/unloading and its proximity to the neighbor countries. It is also a voting member of the World Free Zones Organization.

Name: Lakshmi Steel Shopee

Lakshmi Steel Shopee, founded by Mr. Pankaj Goel, is more than just a steel supplier. It's a testament to commitment, quality, and vision. We're more than just a supplier; we're a partner in growth. Lakshmi Steel Shopee is aligned with a vision to become the first choice for our customers. Our extensive product range includes everything from M.S. Bright Hexagon to TMT Bars, ensuring we're your one-stop solution for all steel needs. CNC cutting and bending services further enhance our offerings, providing tailored solutions for every requirement.

We are proud of our long-standing partnerships with industry giants like VSP, TATA, Essar/AMNS, SAIL, JSW, and more. These partnerships reflect our commitment to quality and reliability.

With Mr. Samaksh Goel gearing up to lead, we're poised for even greater heights. Guided by our visionary founder and fueled by dedicated employees, we are committed to providing quality services with integrity and dedication to our clients.

Lakshmi Steel Shopee isn't just a steel supplier; we're your trusted partner in progress.

What we do, and how we do it
We take the complexity out of product storage, assembly, and distribution so you can focus on running your business. Whether you need secure warehousing, efficient order fulfillment, or custom blending, our team tailors solutions to your specific needs, helping you save time and deliver consistent results. We are ITAR compliant and in the process of obtaining certification to the international Standard ISO 9001:2015 for Quality Management Systems, which we plan to receive in Q2 of 2026.

Our capabilities
Precision blending: At MCMILLANCO, we specialize in custom blending blending for chemicals, industrial powders, construction materials, and animal feed, supported by our specialized tanks, mixers, and silos.
Assembly, co-packing, and kitting: Complete solutions to prepare your products for market, freeing your team and facility for core operations.
Warehousing, inventory, and distribution: Flexible storage, inventory management, and order fulfillment in over 200,000 square feet of space, including rail spur and silo access for bulk materials with fulfillment directly to the end customer.

O que é Self Storage?

Self Storage é o mais avançado conceito de armazenagem do mundo, realizado pelo próprio cliente em espaços fechados e individuais, onde somente o locatário tem acesso, garantindo conforto e segurança.

Utilizar os espaços da Guarda Bens significa praticidade e tranquilidade, pois aqui você encontra as melhores soluções para atender à sua necessidade de armazenagem, proporcionando um melhor custo benefício.

É muito simples: você escolhe a área que precisa, a Guarda Bens preenche o contrato e, após o pagamento do primeiro aluguel, o espaço já fica disponível para você guardar suas coisas. Tudo muito rápido, prático, sem fiador e sem taxas adicionais como IPTU, luz, água enfim, sem burocracia.

Palletstellingen:
•	Stellingen ontworpen voor de opslag van pallets.
•	Variërende configuraties beschikbaar, zoals selectieve, dubbelzijdige en doorrolpalletstellingen.

Draagarmstellingen:
•	Stellingen met lange armen voor opslag van lange, zware items zoals buizen, planken, en balken.
•	Verkrijgbaar in enkel- en dubbelzijdige configuraties.

Gondelrekken:
•	Veelzijdige rekken voor detailhandelopstellingen.
•	Geschikt voor het tentoonstellen van verschillende producten in winkels.

Mezzaninevloeren:
•	Extra vloerniveaus voor het optimaliseren van de ruimte in magazijnen of fabrieken.
•	Verhoogt de opslag- en werkruimte zonder dat extra bouw nodig is.

Verlichting:

Veiligheid & Identificatie:

Name: Port of Wilmington Cold Storage
Description:
Port of Wilmington Cold Storage (PWCS) is a cold storage warehouse facility containing roughly 3 million cubic feet, located directly on terminal on the Port of Wilmington, NC.  This is the only cold storage facility located on a port in the State of North Carolina. PWCS’s strategic location on the Port of Wilmington provides our import and export customers with logistical benefits.

PWCS is a full-service, public refrigerated warehouse operation with roughly 11,000 pallet positions. We are now a Customs and Border Protection approved warehouse as well as a Bonded warehouse. Our facility is located near ideal distribution channels including water, interstate, and rail. PWCS has the resources and experience to store, ship and stage your products at competitive rates in all the markets we serve. Our people are experienced and our systems are best-in-class.

Jsme mezinárodní společnost zabývající se návrhem a instalací průmyslových skladovacích systémů. Otevřenost nestandardním řešením, lidský přístup a především kvalita a bezpečnost našich konstrukcí nás činí jedinečnými.

Pracujeme tak, aby naši partneři vnímali uspokojení jak z výběru produktu, tak ze vzájemné spolupráce. Na každém projektu pracuje motivovaný tým lidí, kteří se respektují.

Našimi zákazníky jsou společnosti otevřené inovativnímu a profesionálnímu přístupu k návrhu i k realizaci. Na území České republiky a Slovenska realizujeme jak standardní projekty, tak i na míru navržené “high-tech“ technologie. Naše sesterská společnost Nedcon Silesia působí na území Polska a Ruska.

V každé fázi investice – od úvodních konzultací a návrhu až k instalaci systému – striktně dodržujeme postupy pro zajištění kvality. A výsledek – poskytujeme Vám ty nejlepší produkty a profesionální služby v oblasti skladování.

Name: RECYCLIM
Description:
RECYCLIM, créé en 2013 et installé à Jouy le Moutier dans le département du Val d'Oise (95), vous propose le recyclage de vos déchets et la vente de pièces détachées et matériels de froid et climatisation.

L'entreprise RECYCLIM est le partenaire stratégique des Recycleurs du BTP. Elle est donc spécialisée dans l'accueil, le traitement et la valorisation des déchets issus du génie climatique et frigorifique. Elle vous propose également ses services pour les déchets industriels.

Notre métier : Spécialiste en collectes, valorisation et distribution de pièces détachées d'occasion pour l'équipement des chambres froides de l'industrie agro-alimentaire, de la restauration, de l'hôtellerie et des collectivités.

Distributeur et fournisseur des pièces d'occasions, de matériel frigorifique et climatique, de matériel de cuisine, de matériel de boucherie ou encore de matériel de restauration. RECYCLIM est à votre service.

Nous proposons aux professionnels de se dépanner eux-mêmes en achetant directement sur la boutique en ligne toutes sortes de pièces détachées et d'équipement froid pour réparer, entretenir et faire la maintenance de sa chambre froide soi-même, pour que la maintenance de la chambre froide soit la moins chère possible.

Nos produits : Nous proposons à la vente à l'unité toutes les pièces détachées et équipements de matériel froid. Il s'agit uniquement de matériel professionnel pour les équipements frigorifiques et climatiques industriels, les chambres froides situées dans les sites agro-alimentaires, les CHR (Cafés Hôtels Restaurants) ou les collectivités.

Nos points forts : Nos pièces détachées remanufacturées sont testées et sous garanties afin de pouvoir vous proposer les meilleurs prix et les meilleurs conditions. Ainsi, vous êtes sûrs de trouver sur notre site, le matériel froid et climatisation ou encore le matériel pour la restauration et l'hotellerie aux prix les plus bas.

Name: LogistCompare Ltd
Description:
When looking for the right warehouse provider we are still using manual benchmarking processes which are slow and inadequate. Unnecessary time is spent in waiting to receive quotations from various providers and data integration can seriously impact the outcome. 

 “The average time the forwarding industry took to provide a quote was 90 hours”.

Also the agile supply chain is calling for fast, efficient and transparent logistics processes to address and satisfy customers requirements. This is still not in line with our “internal logistics processes”. Currently available internal logistics processes have not met these needs.

Marketplace solutions are increasingly giving customers opportunities to get fast solutions both in terms of timing and costs. 

“Studies suggest that there is a price differential from forwarders of 41% in quotes for the same shipment”.

LogistCompare is a Warehouse Marketplace platform aimed to support both Retailers and Warehouse providers. It solves the following problems:

Retailers
•	Compares rates at the touch of a button
•	Provide full cost breakdown with every quotation 
•	Gives access to “chat” buttons for a seamless communication with warehouse providers.
•	Provide instant users reviews 
•	Offer an easy and secure booking system

Warehouses Providers
•	Gives the feasibility to rent space out on-line
•	Increase their visibility in the market
•	Promote their service
•	Allow to gain good customers reviews to improve market positioning

LogistCompare is coming soon! 

Contact us now for more information.
serafina@LogistCompare.com
Tel : +44 7956 664569

Name: Omnitek Warehouse Automation
Description:
Omnitek Warehouse Automation and Robotics is a UAE-based provider of advanced warehouse automation, robotics, and intralogistics solutions, helping logistics, distribution, manufacturing, and e-commerce companies across the Middle East streamline warehouse operations for greater efficiency and profitability.

We deliver automation technologies for every stage of material handling from goods receiving and putaway to order picking, packing, palletizing, and dispatch. Our solutions include:

- Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs) and Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) for flexible, scalable goods movement.
- Robotic palletizing systems.
- Automated Storage and Retrieval Systems (ASRS), pallet shuttles, and high-density racking for space optimization and fast retrieval.
- Conveyor systems and automated sortation equipment for continuous, high-throughput workflows.
- Labeling, print-and-apply, and packaging automation to ensure traceability, accuracy, and compliance.
- Robotic cleaning machines with scrubbing and sweeping for automated facility maintenance.

We partner with leading global manufacturers to deliver high-performance systems tailored to operational needs, throughput targets, and facility environments. Our end-to-end project management covers site assessment, ROI analysis, system design, installation, integration, and after-sales support — ensuring scalable, future-ready solutions aligned with Industry 4.0 standards.

By leveraging robotics, AI-driven warehouse control systems, and real-time data analytics, we help businesses cut labor costs, boost throughput, reduce errors, and improve order accuracy and safety.

Headquartered in Dubai with deep knowledge of Middle Eastern supply chains, Omnitek is committed to innovation, reliability, and long-term partnerships — enabling clients to thrive in today’s competitive intralogistics landscape.

3PLG successfully and rapidly embraces and adapts to changes in technology, warehousing and beauty industry standards, vendor compliances for Omni-Channel distribution, packaging postponement strategies, TMS implementations, EDI platform changes, storefront integrations, brand trends, continuous team education and development. Die Herstellung der Thur Metall Produkte basiert auf folgenden normativen Grundlagen: ISO 9001:2008 Qualitätsmanagement, ISO 14001:2004 Umweltmanagementsystem und OHSAS 18001:2007 Arbeitsschutz- und Gesundheitsmanagementsystem.

Mittels modernster Pulverbeschichtungstechnik garantieren wir für hohe Abriebfestigkeit. 15 Standardfarben sind ohne Mehrpreis auch als zweifarbige Kombination verfügbar. Die individuelle Farbgebung führt zu einer positiven Einstellung der Mitarbeiter zum Arbeitsplatz und zu Ihrem Unternehmen.

Auf unsere Qualitätsprodukte können Sie vertrauen. Deshalb bieten wir unseren Kunden auf das gesamte Thur Metall Sortiment eine Garantie von 5 Jahren. Für Werkbankplatten und Elektronikteile gilt eine Garantiefrist von 1 Jahr.

C’est en ce sens que le groupe B-RACK est le seul prestataire français ayant choisi de maitriser son domaine : le rack, de l’étude à la conception, de la distribution à l’installation, de l’audit à la maintenance. En favorisant toujours l’ergonomie des usagers et la préservation de la marchandise de nos clients. 

Le groupe B-RACK va jusqu’au bout du rack avec sa solution de réemploi. Ainsi, notre groupe est totalement entré dans cette nouvelle ère et axe son travail sur l’efficacité, la durabilité et la sécurité.

Established in 1994, PPD (Pick, Pack, Despatch) has become a trusted partner to hundreds of private and public sector organisations in need of reliable and cost-efficient storage and fulfilment services including new start-ups and those operating in sectors such as e-commerce, food and drink, alcohol, Government bodies and charities.

Furthermore, customers are assigned a dedicated fulfilment manager to assist with any queries so they can be assured of smooth and hassle-free operations.  

Fully licensed and compliant, the company operates from a secure 15,500 sq. ft. warehouse in the strategic location of Perth, Scotland. It offers a wide range of flexible storage solutions, quick processing and despatch services throughout the UK.   

Competitively priced, PPD keeps operational costs low without sacrificing service quality. With a focus on efficiency, accuracy and customer satisfaction, it provides customisable storage and fulfilment options tailored to customers’ specific business needs.  

Our variable pricing model (‘pay for what you use’), is particularly beneficial for new business startups, scale ups and SMEs. PPD also offers competitive dispatch rates, ensuring minimal costs to operations.  

PPD’s services include:  
- E-commerce Fulfilment and Stock Management 
- Alcohol Fulfilment House 
- Food and Drink Fulfilment House
- Business Start Up Assistance  
- Third Party Logistics

Crating:

Pierce has crated parts ranging from assembly line machines being sent overseas for production, to engines and transmissions, glass, cabs, hydraulic cylinders, and body panels for vehicles, to name a few. Government and Military Packaging:

Possui localização estratégica, com distância reduzida para acesso às rodovias que cortam o estado do Espírito Santo, o aeroporto de Vitória e próxima do principal porto de atracação de cargas conteinerizadas e soltas com grande volume. A Hiper Export encontra-se a aproximadamente 150 metros de distância do Porto, em Capuaba, no município de Vila Velha, pertencente ao complexo portuário de Vitória, o que facilita o acompanhamento das cargas em menor espaço de tempo.

Conta com equipe exclusiva para acompanhamento do trânsito aduaneiro nas operações de importação e exportação, programação junto ao Porto, registros diversos, alcance de resultados logísticos até a saída e encerramento do processo.

Em constantes mudanças para melhorar o atendimento aos clientes, amplia continuamente os serviços oferecidos, bem como investe em infra-estrutura e treinamento das equipes. Conta atualmente com cerca de 450 clientes nas atividades de comércio exterior na importação e exportação, operando com uma variedade de produtos, como: mármores e granitos, máquinas e equipamentos em geral, acessórios e insumos de informática, telecomunicação, eletroeletrônicos, bebidas, cosméticos, perfumes, medicamentos, tecidos, fios têxteis, dentre outros.

Name: k2 Armazéns Gerais
Description:
A K2 Armazéns Gerais nasceu com o propósito de atuar no mercado de armazenamento e vem de uma história de experiência no ramo, há mais de 20 anos.

O proprietário da empresa, Fernando Milan Sartori, criou a FMS Agro, no ano de 1997, com o intuito de suprir as necessidades dos produtores rurais locais, no armazenamento de sementes de batata. Por ser uma das regiões mais produtivas do país no plantio desta cultura, a procura por espaços ideais para o armazenamento das sementes produzidas se tornava cada vez maior.

Fernando Milan Sartori, na qualidade de produtor rural, construiu sua primeira câmara frigorífica direcionada para tais sementes, obtendo grande êxito quando aliou tecnologia ao entendimento.

Com a expansão do mercado, outros setores da indústria de alimentos começaram a procura por espaços de armazenagem com temperatura controlada.

A partir daí, deu-se início a construção de um complexo frigorífico de grande renome no meio atuante, oferecendo ao mercado logístico serviços agregados, diferenciados e de qualidade.

Ao longo dos anos, Fernando Milan Sartori expandiu seus negócios, aumentando seu portfólio de prestação de serviços logísticos, atuando também no mercado de transporte, co-packers, picking e cross-docking, atendendo desde pequenas empresas, até multinacionais.

Com a diversidade de serviços oferecidos, a criação, modernização e expansão das plantas para outras localidades foram de extrema importância para a continuidade dos negócios.

No ano de 2017 Fernando Milan Sartori vendeu suas participações relacionadas ao complexo frigorífico para um fundo de investimento. Com isso, um novo quadro organizacional foi formado, criando assim a K2 Armazéns Gerais.

Desde o início desta história, Fernando Milan Sartori atende clientes que são líderes de mercados nas áreas em que atuam e estão sempre inovando. Este é um ponto de extrema importância para a empresa, uma vez que tem seus processos baseados na qualidade e segurança alimentar. Devido a isso alguns de nossos clientes firmam conosco parceria de décadas, alinhando nossa capacidade produtiva de acordo com suas necessidades.

Name: SafeCloak
Description:

Name: MeerMagazijn magazijninrichters
Description:
Een vakkundig bedrijf met een flexibele instelling, adviserend en doelgericht. Dat zijn wij. Onze grote voorraad magazijnstellingen, transportmogelijkheden, eigen productie en gekwalificeerde montagediensten realiseren iedere gewenste magazijnstelling of verdiepingsvloer. U kunt uw project bij ons veilig uit handen geven. Wij beschikken over een eigen verkoopteam, productieafdeling, gediplomeerde monteurs en vrachtvervoer. Het totale traject van advies, design, productie, transport, montage, oplevering en aftersales houden wij volledig in eigen beheer. Door deze persoonlijke aanpak bent u verzekerd van optimale kwaliteit.

De kwaliteit van al onze diensten en producten is 100% gegarandeerd, dat spreekt voor zich. Minstens zo belangrijk vinden wij serviceverlening. Uitgangspunt van ons klantgerichte servicebeleid vormen professionaliteit, betrouwbaarheid en persoonlijke betrokkenheid. Onze medewerkers zijn gediplomeerd en gecertificeerd waardoor we voortdurend anticiperen op toekomstige brancheontwikkelingen. Wij leveren iedere magazijnstelling of verdiepingsvloer op maat, volledig aangepast aan uw wensen en specifieke bedrijfsbehoeften en informeren u periodiek over relevante branche- en bedrijfsontwikkelingen. Wij voelen ons persoonlijk verantwoordelijk voor het geleverde eindproduct. Onze medewerkers staan klaar om u te adviseren, aftersales is voor ons niet meer dan vanzelfsprekend. Siddhi Cold Chain is a leading cold chain supply solution provider in Delhi and NCR. Our comprehensive services cover the entire spectrum of cold chain storage and logistics, encompassing temperature-controlled warehousing, deep freezing facilities, refrigerated logistics, distribution services, and Carrying & Forwarding (CFA) solutions.

Our Vision
At Siddhi Cold Chain, our vision extends far beyond being a successful business entity. We are dedicated to making a meaningful contribution to humanity by addressing one of the most pressing global challenges - food wastage. Our vision is to create a strategically located cold chain network that ensures food is kept fresh from the farm to plates, significantly reducing food wastage and ensuring that every human is nourished.
In pursuing this vision, we aim to make a positive impact on the world by not only providing exceptional cold chain solutions but also by actively participating in the greater mission of reducing hunger and ensuring that no one goes without access to fresh and nourishing food.

Our Mission
Our mission at Siddhi Cold Chain is to provide businesses with best-in-class cold chain services, tailored to their unique needs. We are committed to maintaining the highest standards of quality, safety, and environmental responsibility in our operations. Our mission is to empower our clients by offering innovative and cost-effective solutions that enhance their competitiveness, reduce waste, and minimize their carbon footprint. We aim to foster enduring relationships with our customers, employees, and partners, ensuring their success aligns with ours.

Description:
Sig Sys, Inc. and its dedicated team of professionals understand the racking industry from the top to the bottom. Racking is used in virtually every industry and it’s critical that the installation is congruent with the specifications of the engineered drawings.

Selecting a quality installation company should not be treated lightly. Is the best price your motivation? Or is industry “Best Practice” your concern?
 
¨ Know your pallet rack capacities, will it support your materials?
¨ Is your installation crew able to identify a damaged up-right?
Should you attempt to straighten or fix that damaged beam?
¨ Are your employees climbing the racks, if so what is the solution?
¨ Do you have plywood as a shelf in pallet racking?
¨ Are all of your up-rights floor bolted?
¨ When was the last time you had a professional inspect your racking for integrity failures?
 
Sig Sys, Inc., will assist you and your project manager with an inspection and assist in creating solutions to your warehouse requirements.

Name: Portabull Cold Storage
Description:
Portable electric cold storage, nationwide that reduces your emissions and includes 24/7 support and free maintenance.

We help businesses prepare for a season or scale for growth with the industry’s highest-quality electric cold storage container rentals. Our durable units are temperature-controlled so that you can freeze, refrigerate, or maintain a specific temperature range. Whether you’re a local flower shop preparing for Valentine’s Day, a big box store looking to meet your company’s ESG goals, or a national grocer who needs more space, Portabull can tailor units to your industry needs.

En Cityo, nuestro compromiso es claro: facilitar y eliminar obstáculos para brindar claridad, control y máxima autonomía a nuestros clientes.

Nuestra misión es ser un aliado estratégico, proporcionando herramientas y servicios que simplifiquen la vida diaria y potencien la eficiencia.
Únete a nosotros y descubre cómo Cityo puede transformar tu entorno, liberándote de preocupaciones y permitiéndote disfrutar de una mayor tranquilidad y orden.
En Cityo, tu bienestar es nuestra prioridad.

Name: Container One
Description:
At Container One, our vision is to provide customers with a seamless and efficient experience in acquiring the containers they require for commercial, residential, and agricultural needs. Having sold and delivered over 50,000 containers in the past three years, we have established ourselves as a trusted and reliable single-source supplier for all container needs.

We achieve this by offering fast and accurate online pricing and ordering systems, ensuring a hassle-free process. Transparency and integrity are at the core of our values. Name: AW Baxter Ltd
Description:
AW Baxter Ltd. A family owned, independent company providing export packing, UK transport and freight forwarding to warehousing and storage. Based in Wolverhampton, UK, we operate globally across land, air and sea and thanks to a wealth of in-house expertise and over 30 years experience, we’re trusted worldwide to move your cargo wherever it needs to go, on time and on budget.

Our services include:
•	UK FORS Silver Transport
•	National Part Load Service
•	Sea Freight
•	Air Freight
•	Export Packing
•	Warehousing and Storage
•	European Road Freight
•	Cargo Handling

UK Transport fleet of flatbed trailers, curtain & euroliners, extendable flatbed trailers, low loaders and wafer bed trailers.
FORS Silver Compliant.

Ireland & European - Accompanied and unaccompanied shipping options between the UK, Ireland & mainland Europe providing flexibility and convenience for your cargo transportation requirements.
In house customs services ensuring efficient clearance for your cargo at both ends of the journey.

From export case manufacture, loading and unloading containers, global freight and long-term contracts our work is varied and broad. Whether it’s providing a bespoke export packing service, freight or storage, we deliver every time.

The Complete Supply Chain - online solutions to complex demands

Overcoming languages, cultures and organising relevant documentation often means that export orders are difficult to manage, however with our online web tracking facility you are never more than a click away from your cargo’s progress. Online web tracking provides order information, shipping schedules and communicates any deviations from the agreed plan directly to you and your customer.

Our complete supply chain package allows a single-source solution to imports, export packing, distribution and freight forwarding anywhere in the world.

A Sociedade de Rolamenos é uma empresa capaz de fornecer serviços técnicos e logísticos ajustados à real necessidade do seus parceiros, em actividade desde 1932. Implementada em 7 cidades no território nacional, trabalha uma vasta gama de produtos de marcas premium reconhecidas mundialmente.

Através da sua rede de distribuição, fornece ao sector industrial soluções como rolamentos, movimento linear, transmissão de potência mecânica, lubrificação e sistemas de vedação, ferramentas e máquinas, manipulação de fluidos e serviços de reparação, entre outros produtos complementares.

A Sociedade de Rolamentos auxilia os seus parceiros, orientando-os para a inovação útil, com conhecimento profundo em todas as áreas de atuação.

Com estruturas de armazenagem em Jundiaí–SP e Curitiba–PR, atuamos com separação, conferência, transbordo e transvase, oferecendo soluções completas para a cadeia logística de suprimentos.

Nossa frota própria e tecnologia de gerenciamento garantem precisão, rastreabilidade e operações contínuas — suportando altas demandas com qualidade e agilidade.

Há mais de 8 anos no mercado, somos reconhecidos pela confiabilidade, pela atuação dedicada ao cliente e pela capacidade de integrar processos logísticos do início ao fim.

Name: Christer Nöjd AB
Description:
Nöjd AB erbjuder förpacknings- och emballagelösningar, främst inom transportemballage. Vi är totalleverantör och bistår i hela förpackningskedjan från förbrukningsmaterial via maskiner och service till lagerhållning.

Nöjd AB präglas av personligt engagemang för kunder och samarbetspartners. Genom ett nära samarbete hittar vi totalekonomiska lösningar som möter och matchar kundens behov. 

Vi är glada över att idag vara ett av landets ledande företag inom transportemballage, med kunder i de flesta branscher. Vi tycker om långa samarbeten i alla våra relationer; såväl kunder och leverantörer som medarbetare tenderar att stanna länge hos oss. Det gillar vi!

Vi som jobbar på Nöjd AB har ett gemensamt drag; vi drivs av kundfokus och har ett högt personligt engagemang i vårt jobb. Flera har jobbat på Nöjd AB så gott som sedan starten, medan andra har tillkommit på senare år och tagit med sig sina erfarenheter från andra områden och branscher.

Nöjd AB är ett familjeföretag, grundat 1982, och drivs sedan 2005 av mig, Thomas Nöjd. Tillsammans med företagets sexton medarbetare vill jag fortsätta att utveckla Nöjd AB till att bli det stora och det mindre företagets självklara val av emballageleverantör!

Thomas Nöjd
VD

Ofrecemos espacios de 20 a 2000 metros, destinados al arrendamiento temporario de naves y plantas industriales, depósito de mercadería en tránsito o alquileres de oficinas. Buscamos adaptarnos siempre a las necesidades de nuestros clientes.   
Los predios se ubican en el Partido de San Martín (a pocas cuadras de Avenida General Paz), en el Partido de Avellaneda y en Olivos. 
Poseemos una amplia playa de maniobras cubierta, destinada a la carga y descarga de camiones y camionetas y brindamos la posibilidad de acceder por calles internas dentro de la nave. 
Contamos también con otros servicios tales como: recepción, control y almacenamiento con/sin la presencia del cliente, control de stock, alquiler de auto elevadores para diferentes cargas, alquiler de pallets, personal para carga y descarga, servicio de picking y packing, servicio de movimientos internos, estampillado de productos, desconsolidado de contenedores, servicio de palletizado, control de inventario y servicio de portería.

Name: Instala
Description:
INSTALA was established in 2018. And although our company is still relatively young, the team’s cumulative years of experience in Lithuanian and foreign companies have nevertheless helped the company to move quickly into the European as well as Lithuanian market and to earn the trust of some of the largest European and global firms.

The company’s main focus is installation and removal of storage systems. Instala’s team of professional installers quickly and thoroughly performs installation of storage equipment of various complexity, regardless of the manufacturer, and if needed our designers can design your warehouse in accordance with your particular needs. Instala’s team of installers has all certifications necessary for working at height as well as for operating loading or lifting equipment.

INSTALA values each client and has the objective of establishing long-term business relationships, and it is precisely for this reason that we set the most demanding standards for our work, in terms of quality as well as in terms of satisfying a customer’s needs.

Name: American Surplus Inc.
Description:
American Surplus Inc. buys and sells used warehouse storage and used material handling equipment, and has an outstanding reputation of working with our customers to get them the right equipment they need quickly, and at the most competitive price available. Since 1992 we have been providing used pallet racking, used conveyors, used steel shelving, used mezzanines, and much more.  

Challenge us to get answers to your warehouse storage or material handling problems, issues, or concerns. We have an incredibly large inventory of used equipment on hand and should have no problem finding you the right product in a timely fashion.

With over 530,000 square feet of inventory in our warehouse, ASI is the largest used material handling dealer in the country. All of our inventory is stored indoors, so weather damage is not a concern when buying used equipment from us. Our main facility is located in RI, but we have shipping locations throughout the nation. This allows us to ship nationally while still maintaining competitive freight rates. 

ASI also buys used material handling equipment, warehouse equipment, and industrial storage equipment. All used equipment must be in good working condition for ASI to consider purchasing it. We regularly buy large quantities of used conveyor, used mezzanines, used steel shelving, used pallet rack, and much, much more! Call us today to speak with Mike Cienava II from our Purchasing Department. 

Call us today for a free quote, and quantity discounts are available. All pricing is listed as "as low as". The prices that are displayed are dependent on the quantity desired, the capacity required, and the condition. Installation services are also available, ensuring that your used material handling equipment is installed properly in as little time as possible

Name: Dixie Cullen Interests

Dixie Cullen was founded by Catherine James in November of 1995. Our first facility was located on Dixie Drive and Cullen Boulevard, thus how we got our name Dixie Cullen Interests. In the 28 years we have grown immensely, we started with minimal storage capabilities to having seven locations in the Houston, Tx area with an array of services. A few services that we offer are, FTZ storage, Climate Controlled Storage, Inside Storage, Outside Storage, and heavy lift capabilities.

We handle numerous types of equipment and material, from single items to entire projects, as small as a box to Out Of Guage items. Our clients are offered a well-rounded service package that we tailor to each clients’ specific requirements. Here at Dixie Cullen, we offer a wide variety of equipment to handle any material in our care.

We have over one million square feet of storage space under roof with 300,000 square feet being climate-controlled storage, with over 60 acres of outside storage.

In September of 2015 Dixie Cullen became a Foreign Trade Zone, we made this choice based on the needs of our clients. Since then, we have grown to be the Largest Foreign Trade Zone within Port Houston Foreign Trade Zone #84

Description:
Montage Fulfillment is a full service 3rd Party Logistics provider. Our unique set up allows our dedicated and passionate team to service our customers’ entire warehousing, pick and pack, value added services and transportation needs, under the same facility.

About Montage Fulfillment
For over 17 years, Montage Fulfillment, LLC has been providing unparalleled quality supply chain management, logistics, distribution and warehousing services to clients within the apparel and retail industries. We have the distinct privilege of shipping to retailers, such as  Walmart, Target, JCPenney, Kohl’s, Neiman Marcus, Macy’s, Bloomingdale’s and Saks Fifth Avenue.  Each year, Montage Fulfillment processes over 90 million garment units and 45 million flat folds for major retailers equaling $2 billion worth of merchandise annually.  

With over 700,000 square feet of dedicated and shared warehousing space, located 20 miles from the Ports of Los Angeles and Long Beach, MONTAGE FULFILLMENT is well-equipped to meet our clients’ needs and expectations.

We offer a vast array of 3PL services. Some of  our services include:  finishing, quality control inspection, WMS, pick and pack, ticketing, folding, pressing, shipping, receiving, drayage and cross-docking.

We believe that providing great customer service and personalized attention is the key to our success.  Montage Fulfillment aims to build lasting relationships with all clients and to serve as an extension of their global enterprises.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 Euro Terminal is a partner in the project "DigiTechPort2030 – Decarbonisation of Small Ports' Ecosystems for Efficient Environmental and Energy Management towards South Baltic Fit for 55" 
 co-financed by Interreg South Baltic Programme 2021-2027. 

 Goal of the project: to improve knowledge and capacities for decarbonisation measures in small and medium-sized ports of the South Baltic Area by equipping them with two solutions until the end of 2026.

The project proposes to deliver two solutions:
 Green Energy Harmonization Toolbox for Small and Medium-Sized Ports;
 EU Regulation and Green Policy Compliance Roadmap of Green Transition for Small and Medium-Sized Ports.

The partnership is also going to implement, test and evaluate two types of decarbonisation pilots. 

 Project duration: 15.09.2023 – 14.09.2026

Onze systemen, ‘stand-alone’ of in combinatie met bijv. stationaire transportsystemen, bieden productievere, betrouwbaardere en meer ergonomische  oplossingen dan de traditionele opslag- en orderverzamelsystemen. Een ander belangrijk aspect is de significante ruimtewinst in vloeroppervlakte, welke door plateauliften en paternosterkasten wordt gerealiseerd.

Onze systemen zijn efficiënte organisatie en materials-handling systemen, die manuren, opslagruimte en kosten besparen. 

Wereldwijd werken talrijke kleine, middelgrote en grote ondernemingen uit letterlijk alle industriële branches succesvol met de Hänel paternosterkasten en Hänel plateauliftsystemen. 

Overtuigende voordelen voor onze systemen zijn o.a.:
- Tot 70% meer vloeroppervlakte beschikbaar dan opslag in stellingen en/of kasten
- Tot 70% hogere picksnelheden en tot 90% minder pickfouten
- Efficiënte afhandeling van het in- en uitslagproces
- Eenvoudige en ergonomische in- en uitslag van (zware) producten
- Nauwkeurig en up-to-date overzicht van de opgeslagen en uitgegeven

The process can be stressful, labour intensive and time consuming.  In some cases, the mere threat of legal action can be debilitating for some storage operators. This can sometimes lead to non-action, with a flow on effect of increased debt levels and the loss of income.

We also know everyone loves a bargain and hunting for treasures and that’s why we launched iBidOnStorage.co.uk.
 

iBidOnStorage is the UK’s only online auction platform dedicated to the storage industry, specialising in storage unit auctions.  A platform that delivers a marketplace where both Sellers and Buyers of storage units can benefit and prosper.  
 

Our site is designed to give the Seller greater control over the auction process, by giving them full access to their own account and allowing them to set their own auction parameters.  Sellers will also benefit through increased exposure.  A bigger audience means the potential of more buyers.  More buyers lead to a more competitive auction, which in-turn drives a higher selling price.  In addition, faster turn-around times mean the Seller can re-rent their storage unit quicker than ever before.

Buyers, whether they be second hand dealers or bargain hunters, do not have to be physically present to place a bid.  They will be able to bid from the comfort of their own home or office.  We will even notify our Buyers when a new auction starts in their area.

And best of all, iBidOnStorage will host nothing but storage unit auctions.  Gone will be the risk of auctions going unnoticed or unfound on sites that sell everything from cars, trucks and boats, through to electrical goods, fine art and collectibles.  iBidOnStorage will be a treasure hunters dream.

First Cold Hamilton is a Transitional Facility accredited for importation of animal products and we have applied for an export RMP license. 

The Taranaki Facility was refurbished in 2021 and utilizes a modern efficient "green" operating CO2 Transcritical system and utilizing the latest technology to monitor and control the engine room. The store is fully fitted out with the latest in LED lighting and a redesigned ELA area designed to create a modern efficient store environment. 

First Cold Taranaki was the first 3PL Cold Store to be fitted with a CO Trans critical refrigeration system in New Zealand. 

First Cold staff are qualified as Transitional Facility Officers and Accredited Persons and have over 40 years experience running Cold Storage distribution facilities.

O diferencial da Ibex está sustentado em três pilares: tecnologia, atendimento e qualidade.

Atendimento: Ibex é a primeira empresa totalmente constituída para suprir as necessidades operacionais e logísticas de clientes de qualquer tamanho no ramo de e-commerce. O atendimento é personalizado, sem que haja um incremento nos custos da operação.   

Qualidade: Está no DNA da Ibex. O serviço depende da qualidade operacional nos processos de armazenagem e transporte. Muitas empresas não têm segurança em terceirizar essa atividade. Uma pesquisa recente publicada pela Associação Brasileira de Comércio Eletrônico (ABComm) aponta que 82% das empresas de e-commerce fazem sua logística própria, simplesmente por desconhecerem uma opção mais eficiente e que lhe permitam maior controle nos custos operacionais.  

Tecnologia: O sistema de gerenciamento de armazenagem e estoque (WMS) utilizado pela Ibex é totalmente integrável com qualquer ERP e permite ao cliente o controle da expedição, das operações convencionais e o cross docking. É uma operação 100% sem papel, que controla por rádio frequência e código de barras a entrada, a armazenagem e a expedição. Isso garante um maior controle operacional, previne erros e é muito mais eficiente na gestão logística.

Name: Casaforte Self Storage
Description:
Casaforte, l’Hotel delle Cose, ha introdotto in Italia la formula del self storage, una soluzione nata per aiutare privati, professionisti e aziende con problemi di spazio. 

Invece di affittare una cantina, un box o un magazzino in molti casi è più comodo e conveniente poter disporre di uno spazio temporaneo dimensionato sulle effettive esigenze del momento: offriamo spazi da 1 a 100 mq e oltre, a partire da 1 mese e senza limiti di durata, garantendo massima privacy, sicurezza e accessibilità.

A cosa serve un deposito temporaneo?
Ad esempio per depositare arredi e scatoloni durante un  trasloco, quando occorre liberare delle stanze per eseguire lavori di ristrutturazione, per svuotare un’intera abitazione prima di venderla o semplicemente per il cambio stagionale degli armadi e quando lo spazio in casa non basta più!
È utile per aziende che necessitino di ampliare la capacità dei propri magazzini per un certo periodo o in una specifica zona o vogliano dotarsi di un deposito protetto e sorvegliato sempre accessibile.
I nostri Hotel delle Cose possono servire a notai, commercialisti, avvocati e tutti gli studi professionali e aziende, che possono ospitare nei nostri spazi i loro archivi liberando spazio nei loro uffici e con la tranquillità che i documenti siano conservati protetti, al sicuro e all'asciutto. I documenti possono inoltre essere digitalizzati e consultabili online da qualunque dispositivo.

Casaforte è presente sul territorio italiano con ben 23 depositi, pronti ad offrirti lo spazio di cui hai bisogno per il tempo che ti serve.

Name: Yorkshire Warehousing
Description:
Yorkshire Warehousing provides secure, flexible warehouse space and 3PL services for businesses operating across Yorkshire and the North of England. Built on partnership rather than a transactional model, the business focuses on delivering dependable warehousing solutions that adapt to changing operational needs.

Operating from a strategically located warehouse facility in Castleford, Yorkshire, Yorkshire Warehousing supports manufacturers, FMCG brands, growing SMEs and national businesses with pallet storage, order picking and fulfilment, container handling, value-added services and secure truck parking. The location offers strong regional and national connectivity, with direct access to key motorway routes including the M62, M1 and A1(M).

The business is led by experienced warehouse professionals with a hands-on, practical approach to operations. Services are designed to scale, offering flexible storage terms, responsive handling and tailored service levels that grow alongside customers’ requirements. From short-term overflow storage to long-term 3PL partnerships, Yorkshire Warehousing focuses on reliability, accuracy and operational consistency.

Security, compliance and infrastructure are central to how the facility operates. The warehouse is equipped with modern racking systems, handling equipment, loading bays and environmental controls, supported by robust security measures and monitored access. Inventory protection and operational integrity are treated as essential, not optional.

Yorkshire Warehousing is backed by an established Yorkshire business and benefits from long-term investment in facilities, equipment and people. Continuous improvement, integrity and trust underpin how the team works with customers, ensuring warehouse space is not just available when needed, but managed properly over the long term.

Name: Schwarze & Consort. GmbH
Description:
The family-run and Hamburg based logistics company Schwarze & Consort. GmbH with over 175 years of expertise is responsible for the storage, handling, packaging and transport of green coffee and other food and pharmaceutical products. 
We offer the entire range including storage, distribution, documentation and customs clearance for import and export containers and conventional cargoes to our customers. Our daily work consists of stripping of containers, cargo inspection and control, receipt, storage, sampling, weighing in our warehouses and the administration around these processes.

Schwarze & Cons. GmbH operates three warehouses in Hamburg with a team of 88 employees. We have over 75,000 m² of indoor storage space and over 120,000 m² of open space. With our own fleet of diversified trucks and chassis, we can conduct any type of transport independently from third parties. 

We take care of green coffee storage for our customers. Industrial raw coffee as well as specialty raw coffee is stored and handled carefully by our qualified staff at our warehouses. With our in-house green coffee silo in Hamburg, we can respond to the wishes of our customers efficiently. Our service comprises of sampling, analysing, weighing and blending of industrial raw coffee. For storing organic green coffee, we work in accordance with the regulations of the authorities, the handling of food products is in accordance with the IFS Logistics certification. We are nominated as a warehouse keeper for green coffee at the stock market Intercontinental Exchange in London and New York. 

The fast-moving world of logistics involves new challenges every day. Our skilled employees can respond to all challenges around cargo handling with due diligence and care. The combination of product-related expertise and industry knowledge over centuries make us a company with the provision of high-quality services. We create great and efficient solutions for our customers in the food and pharmaceutical sector.

Die Dokumentenmanagement-Software von Merak erlaubt lückenlose Nachverfolgung Ihrer Archivboxen, Akten und Dokumente.
Sie wissen nicht, wie lange Sie nach gesetzlichen Vorschriften Ihre Dokumente aufbewahren müssen? Fragen Sie die Spezialisten bei Merak Schweiz!
