Name: ICEPAC LIMITED
Description: We Operate pakistan's largest integerated cold chain system including warehousing, refrigerated transportation and distribution. Our mostly clients are most reputable multinational companies including Pizza Hut, KFC, Nestle Pakistan, Engro Foods, Agility Logistics etc. The range of items in our cold chain system are mostly frequently used items including Ice Cream, Pizza, Vegetables, Chicken Kababs, Paradhas, Yougurt, Butter, Fresh Cream etc. The areas in which we operate are almost all big cities of pakistan like Karachi, Lahore, Peshawar, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Multan, Bahawalpure, Quetta etc. Our company is serving since 1989 and have a very good team of professionals including foreign qualified professionals, Engineers, Accountants.

Name: Precision Warehousing
Description:
At Precision Warehousing, we provide you with short-term or long-term business storage solutions specific to your needs. Precision has a national network of warehouse space integrated into our service model to provide you with last-minute overflow needs or a long term asset management plan.   With our commitment to “No Layers, No Delays.”, we can find your space and put together a custom service model in a short period of time.  Just tell us some basic information about your space needs and we can begin the process.
PFG was started by a team of elite Warehousing and Logistics professionals to disrupt the traditional industry models.

A 100% employee-owned business model was a dream built over 20+ years of working together in the industry. PFG Warehousing is a team that understands how difficult it is to find and maintain custom warehouse solutions in multiple markets. Our team is uniquely equipped to locate space, design logistics models, reduce cost and build custom solutions to fit your company’s needs. We utilize traditional industry experience as well as evolving processes and technology to continue to innovate in our industry.

Name: WareOne
Description:
WareOne is a flexible warehousing and logistics company based in Qatar, serving businesses across the GCC.

We provide on-demand solutions to store, move, and manage goods, enabling e-commerce brands, SMEs, and enterprises to build supply chains that are agile, scalable, and regionally integrated.

Our services span warehousing, transportation and distribution, customs clearance, e-commerce fulfilment within Qatar and across the GCC, and cross-border delivery and returns management.

WareOne delivers these capabilities through a trusted partner network and a unified digital platform that integrates seamlessly with major marketplaces and retail systems. This combination of operational scale and adaptable technology ensures transparency, security, and efficiency, without long-term commitments or fixed capacity constraints.

By offering a more responsive approach to logistics, WareOne helps businesses navigate complexity, meet evolving market demands, and expand with confidence across the region.

Name: AGP Industrial Logistics Parks
Description:
AGP Industrial Logistics Parks (AGPIL) is a leading developer of industrial and
warehousing facilities across India, offering end-to-end solutions through land acquisition, development, leasing, and asset and fund management. With a growing portfolio of 7 million sq. ft. - including India's largest e-commerce facility - we are expanding across key logistics markets to support our stakeholders’ needs.

AGPIL operates across three strategic markets: NCR, Mumbai, and Bangalore, with 5 estates spanning over 250 acres under development. Backed by $3B in group-level AUM and more than 100 years of combined industry experience, AGPIL is shaping the future of industrial logistics in India with institutional governance, on-ground agility, and proven dependability.

As part of the global investor and asset manager AGP Group, we are committed to
upholding the highest ESG standards, developing sustainable, efficient infrastructure that delivers long-term value to both communities and the environment.

AGPIL is your trusted partner in building dependable, future-ready logistics infrastructure across India.

Name: Frankly Fulfillment
Description: Frankly speaking, we know what it feels like to get lost in the shuffle. We want to provide personalized experiences for our customers looking to take a load off without all the extra worries of miss-communication, order mishaps, and inventory uncertainty. Our goal is to enable businesses to grow and expand with peace of mind while using our systems to do their heavy lifting.

Name: DAO Terminal de Granéis Líquidos
Description: Com base sólida e histórica oferecemos soluções de armazenagem e transporte de combustíveis cm elevado padrão de segurança, qualidade e eficiência, seja para grandes operações ou demandas específicas.

Name: PlasticProgress Pharma Packaging
Description:
PlasticProgress Pharma Packaging is specialized in the manufacture of primary plastic packaging and Class I Medical Devices, such as cups and spoons, for the pharmaceutical industry.

We offer:

•A standard range of snap-on bottles, droppers, solid oral formulation bottle containers and Class I Medical Devices - Cups and spoons;

•Development and production of taylor-made primary plastic packaging solutions for your product;

•Contract manufacturing of primary plastic packaging and Class I Medical Devices.

With an innovative production lay-out, we run a flexible and efficient operation using state-of-the-art technology.

We are GMP-compliant, employing a fully documented and monitored quality assurance system. We are certified according to ISO 9001:2008 and  ISO 15378:2011 standards.

Our clean room production facilities are regularly audited and certified, with the main room to ISO Class 7 and the injection and moulding areas to ISO Class 5, according to ISO 14644-1 standards.

Name: Tromans Live S.L.
Description:
Tromans Live es un Centro Especial de Empleo ubicado en Martos, en la provincia de Jaén. Somos una empresa muy joven, que nació de un proyecto ilusionante y del sueño de crear empleo de calidad para personas con diferentes discapacidades, fomentando su integración y colaborando en crear un proyecto de vida sólido. La inclusión en las empresas de personal con discapacidad a través de Centro Especial de Empleo promueve el trabajo en equipo, posibilita un compromiso mayor con los valores, se aprende a ser más inclusivo y a aceptar la diversidad.

Nuestro objetivo es la integración de colectivos con discapacidad, proporcionándoles un empleo competitivo, adaptado y adecuado a cada una de ellas, generando estabilidad e integración social y laboral en un entorno competitivo.

Casi la totalidad de nuestro personal tiene reconocida algún tipo de discapacidad. Calidad, confianza y transparencia son nuestros valores. Generar empleo con una mentalidad de equipo, ayuda y respeto mutuo es nuestra misión. Comprometidos con las personas y con nuestro entorno.

Name: BeSYSTEMS Betriebseinrichtungen GmbH
Description:
LAGER, WERKSTÄTTE, GARDEROBE, BÜRO

„Wir machen mehr draus!“ - das ist unser Motto bei BeSYSTEMS. Wir machen seit über 30 Jahren mehr aus Ihren Regal- und Lagersystemen. Wir machen mehr aus Ihren Werkbänken, Archivsystemen und Büroeinrichtungen. Wir machen mehr aus Ihren Garderoben und Geschäftslokalen.

Wir machen mehr aus Ihren Wünschen und Vorstellungen und sind täglich dafür im Einsatz, die besten Lösungen für Ihr Vorhaben und Anliegen zu finden. Mit Leidenschaft, Spaß und voller Konzentration begleiten und unterstützen wir Sie vom Beratungsgespräch bis hin zur Projektdurchführung.

Unsere Stärke können wir im Projektbereich voll ausspielen - überall dort, wo nicht nur Standardlösungen gefragt sind sondern mit individuellen Lösungen ein Mehrwert generiert und die Effizienz gesteigert werden soll. Individualität definiert sich für uns nicht über die Projektgröße, sondern über die Anforderung jedes einzelnen Kunden. Individualität heißt für uns aber nicht teure Spezialprodukte anzubieten, sondern so weit als möglich genormte Produkte aus einem Baukastensystem kundenindividuell zusammenzustellen und so mit großer Variantenvielfalt funktionale Lösungen zu entwickeln.

Name: Barons Self Storage
Description:
We provide specialist and secure storage space for the Commercial, Document and Residential sectors within our state of the art storage facility. 

The services we offer include:
- Short (min 2 weeks) to long term storage.
- Free move in service.
- Unlimited access to your storage unit during opening hours with up to  24hrs access also available.
- All storage units are fully secure & individually alarmed. Only you or someone authorised by you will ever have access to your unit.
- Sophisticated Access Control  entry to allow secure and quick and easy access to your unit.
- 24hr Closed Circuit Television monitoring the facility.
- Printable access sheet available to monitor activity to your unit on request.
- Drive Through facility & fully covered loading/unloading bays.
- Thermostatically controlled heated building.
- Deliveries can be accepted in your absence.
- Forklift and Driver.
- Document Self Storage.

Contact our Limerick Facility on 061 577 700 or email info@barons.ie for more information.

Name: PT. REKATAMA ALAM MANDIRI
Description:
PT. Rekatama Alam Mandiri kini menghadirkan Gudan Vertikal "Modula" di Indonesia, yang sudah berdiri sejak tahun 1992 di Indonesia untuk melayani kebutuhan pengadaan barang bagi berbagai perusahaan otomotif terkemuka di Indonesia yang berbasis B2B. 

Mengikuti perkembangan era Industry 4.0, PT.Rekatama Alam Mandiri kini menghadirkan produk Modula Automated Vertical Warehouse di Indonesia. Modula adalah produk yang berasal dari Italia yang sudah berinovasi dengan produk penyimpanan otomatis nya selama lebih dari 30 tahun. Produk Modula sudah banyak di gunakan di manca negara termasuk di Indonesia.

 

Unit lift Modula terdiri dari rangkaian modul vertikal dan horizontal yang dapat di konfigurasikan sesuai kebutuhan anda.

Name: Oleoveg S/A
Description:
A Oleoveg está situada na cidade de Cornélio Procópio, no Estado do Paraná. Estamos no mercado desde 1995 e passamos a integrar o Grupo Rutkoski no ano de 2011, quando iniciamos a expansão dos negócios. Passamos a atuar no mercado de agronegócio nos segmentos de armazenamento, beneficiamento, industrialização e comercialização de grãos e seus derivados. 

Somos uma empresa integralmente brasileira e trabalhamos no mercado de commodities agrícolas, produzindo em larga escala e comercializando em nível mundial.

Todos os nossos produtos possuem alto padrão de qualidade que atendem às necessidades e expectativas de lucratividade e crescimento dos nossos clientes. Executamos o nosso trabalho utilizando os melhores equipamentos disponíveis aliados ao investimento em tecnologia de ponta, respeitando o meio ambiente e com foco na melhoria contínua da organização.

Atuamos com responsabilidade e compromisso no que tange o nível de satisfação dos nossos colaboradores, clientes e fornecedores. Investimos continuamente na atualização dos processos e na qualificação e treinamento dos nossos funcionários.

Name: Dawson Robotics
Description: Dawson Robotics apply advanced robotics and smart technologies to realize flexible, reliable, and highly efficient solutions for warehouses, factories, and supply chain management. With Dawson Robotics extensive experience in the industry, our team ensures a seamless journey from initial discussions to full implementation, guaranteeing optimal results.

Name: TEPS | UK Supply Chain Warehousing and Haulage
Description:
Based in the city of #Hull since 1959, within easy access of the city's docks and the UK motorway network, TEPS has all the experience and expertise required to fulfil any haulage, storage and distribution needs.

Combining a tradition of impeccable customer service with a constant desire to exceed expectations, we take great pride in the scale and diversity of projects we have undertaken, from the personal effects of individuals to the specialised products of blue-chip companies.

We are aware that our reputation depends on your satisfaction with the service you receive from every member of our team. That is why you can rely on our highly skilled workforce, trained to meet any size of project and any fresh challenge with confidence, competence and care.

Name: Medley Material Handling

Name: Bartholomews Specialist Distribution
Description:
Bartholomews Specialist Distribution (BSD) are long established independent company with extensive experience in providing warehouse storage, fulfilment and distribution services.

From affordable pallet storage to sophisticated pick and pack operations with associated customer service and administration, we will provide a solution that fits with what you are looking for.

To find out more about how you can benefit from our flexible terms, highly competitive services, and total commitment to helping your company succeed talk to us today 0800 6525 579

Description:

Our team comprises seasoned professionals, including cotton classers and controllers, complemented by our advanced laboratory facilities. We deliver a comprehensive suite of services tailored to meet the specific needs of our clients.

With over 50 years of industry experience inherited from our esteemed parent company, Robertson, and memberships in respected associations such as the French Cotton Association (AFCOT) and the International Cotton Association (ICA), we uphold a reputation for excellence in our field.

For Brazilian businesses seeking reliable solutions, Robertson International is the trusted choice. Our commitment to understanding and addressing the unique challenges of the Brazilian market ensures tailored strategies that drive success and growth.

Name: The Storage Box
Description:
The Storage Box specializes in the rental of portable storage containers for moving and storage to residential customers and businesses throughout Southern Ontario.  The Storage Box has improved the traditional shipping container used as a portable storage container with a new container which has been designed and engineered for moving and storage which has many improved features,

Customers enjoy these improved container features and the many benefits we provide including tilt-free transportation technology, container warehousing, cleanliness and the attention we pay to detail.


To learn more, visit us at www.thestoragebox.com

Name: Dexion Belgium
Description:
Dexion has been providing high-performing storage and logistics solutions since 1947. So, whatever the size and nature of your challenge, we have the knowledge and expertise to help you reach your goals.

Dexion NV is a member of Gonvarri Material Handling. In 2018, Gonvarri Material Handling was formed, after Gonvarri Steel Services acquired the Constructor Group comprising of Dexion, Constructor, Kasten and PSS.

Our technology and logistics solutions will streamline your supply chain management functions without sacrificing your money, time or quality of products.

Description: We utilize over 30 years of combined logistics experience to make the e-commerce fulfillment process smooth and efficient. Description: Somos uma empresa especializada em soluções de armazenamento e serviços auxiliares de transporte. Com foco em segurança, sustentabilidade e otimização logística, buscamos atender às necessidades específicas de cada cliente, oferecendo processos eficientes, ágeis e de alta qualidade. Nossa missão é transformar a logística, criando valor para os nossos clientes e parceiros, sempre com compromisso e excelência.

Name: Prevent Rack
Description:
Spécialiste du contrôle des structures de stockage en acier depuis plus de 15 ans, nous assurons des prestations selon les normes en vigueur.  Cet audit est conforme à la norme NF EN 15 635 et indique que l'installation doit être vérifiée périodiquement. Un rapport de conformité est transmis au responsable de la sécurité des systèmes de stockage pour qu'il envisage une procédure de remise en conformité avec le prestataire de son choix. Vous profiterez donc d'une expertise par un organisme indépendant ainsi que des conseils en matière de remise en conformité. 

Prevent Rack propose 3 modules de formation pour répondre aux normes de sécurité dans les entreprises. Ces formations sont destinées aux personnes en lien avec la structure (responsable sécurité, logistique, opérateurs et caristes).

Name: Warehouse Equipment & Supply
Description: At Warehouse Equipment and Supply, we pride ourselves on being the premier material handling business in Central Florida. Through our dedicated team, we provide customers with the products and services that they need, when they need it and at a competitive price. We specialize in pallet racks, industrial shelving, pallet jacks, rolling ladders, safety accessories and much more. Our expert staff has years of experience in pallet rack design as well as installation. In addition to our expertise in warehouse design, we are one of Orlando's leaders in the buying and selling of new and used material handling systems.

Name: "Save"ty Yellow Products
Description:
“Save”ty Yellow Products is an industry leading producer of facility asset protection and safety products used in manufacturing, distribution centers and warehouse facilities. We take the approach of being a solution provider, so we offer several models for each product line giving distributors and customers a choice when designing and protecting a facility. Its entire product line, including custom applications, is powder coated for long lasting durability.

The Company manufactures safety products to protect employees, facilities, products, & machinery from impact by fork truck, including but not limited to drop-in / lift-out guardrails, highway design, lite rail & deflector series guardrails, overhead door track protection, rack post protectors, curved & low-profile rack end systems, mezzanine safety gates, modular handrails, building column protectors, and steel bollards.

Name: Pebro Petroyannis Bros
Description:
PEBRO - PETROYANNIS BROS O.E. is active since 1972 in the design and construction of storage systems and logistics. Production is equipped with state of the art machinery on sheet metal fabrication. So, whatever the size and nature of your storage needs, we have the knowledge and expertise to help you cover them.
All these years, for any storage and logistics problem, PEBRO has the most efficient and effective solution from simple shelving to most complex warehouses with vast pallet racking systems or mezzanine storage floors to automated pallet flow systems.
Being the official representative of DEXION and SCHAEFER in conjunction with the very experienced team of engineers PEBRO designs and manufactures to the highest standards turn- key storage solutions.
A few years back PEBRO started producing display stands for the most famous international companies exploiting the high tech equipment for sheet metal fabrication and its expertise and knowledge.
More recently PEBRO came to an agreement with Phil Andreou S.A. and acquired their operation of display-stands. Phil Andreou, based in Limassol of Cyprus, has been a very successful company for many years on the design and production of display stands. It was not only dominant in the Cypriot market but it was exporting all over the world customized display-stands for its customers, well known multinational companies. Through this acquisition in fact the production line was relocated from Cyprus to Greece and PEBRO enriched its knowledge and know how. Τhe production line was extended and completed even further being able to offer display-stands in any quantity, of top quality and competitive prices.

With the operating system in Antarrtica, dedicated on-site managers, and the use of smart technology, we help existing reefer owners offer improved consistent service at optimal operational costs and, generate a higher and better quality demand for their assets.

Name: PT UNEX Rajawali Indonesia
Description: PT UNEX Rajawali Indonesia is a leading ground handling and cargo warehouse company based in Soekarno Hatta International Airport, Jakarta. Name: LOCMYBOX
Description:
Bienvenue chez LOCMYBOX, votre solution idéale pour tous vos besoins de stockage, qu’ils soient personnels ou professionnels.

Notre centre de stockage est idéalement situé à Champtoceaux, au cœur du Maine-Et-Loire, le long de la Loire entre Nantes et Angers. À 15 min de l’A11. À 30 min de Cholet.

Notre centre de box de stockage offre des espaces sécurisés, accessibles et adaptés à vos besoins. Que vous déménagiez, que vous ayez besoin de libérer de l’espace chez vous ou que vous cherchiez un lieu sûr pour entreposer vos marchandises, nous avons la solution parfaite pour vous.

Nos box de stockage sont disponibles dans une large gamme de tailles, allant de petites unités pour les objets du quotidien aux espaces plus grands pour du mobilier, des équipements ou des archives d’entreprise.

Chaque box de stockage est propre, bien entretenue, et bénéficie d’une ventilation adéquate pour préserver l’état de vos biens.

Name: Tri State Material Handling
Description:
At Tri State Material Handling, we provide tailored warehouse solutions that boost efficiency, safety, and growth backed by expert, reliable service.

We provide custom warehouse solutions, from layout design to full installation, to optimize space, safety, and efficiency. Servicing areas including but not limited to NJ, NY, & PA.

Name: KL Development

3PL Pro's gives growing brands access to fulfillment optimized for eCommerce at scale. Whether you need dedicated warehouses or just more order fulfillment capacity, 3PL Pro's can optimize your operations and drive growth. Our cloud-based shipping software ensures that your carriers, warehousing and distribution center operations are automatically linked to your eCommerce shopping carts or ERP systems. Our warehouse locations are chosen to offer the best shipping access points in the country. In fact, our facility in Pennsylvania offers 2-day standard ground shipping to over 200 Million Americans.

Contact 3PL Pro’s today to learn more about how we can optimize your operations and drive growth. Our flexible services mean you can work with the same partner throughout all stages of growth, from warehousing and distribution to returns management.

With over 30 years of experience, we are now launching the next chapter in self-storage. Storeinn. For owners/investors we offer specialized services tailored to manage self-storage portfolios. As a specialist third party operator, we manage your storage business daily operations. We also transform existing stores and organizations to automated facilities managed online through our contact centers. 

As operator, we implement dynamic pricing to optimize rates and revenue for increased profitability and data driven analysis and thorough testing to constantly improve the business.

Our business is supported by our Tetra system platform providing seamlessly integrating real time information flows between the customer information, bookings, payments, reporting, customer engagement and hardware such as phone, video, security,  cameras, access control and automated facilities.  Our Tetra system platform enables remote management of customers and facilities.

Uzun yıllardır sektörde aktif rol oynayan Barnmansion, tecrübesiyle sürecinizi güvenle yönetebilecceğiniz ve pazaryerlerindeki kazançlarınızı arttıracağınız bir kimliktir.

Siz de, online satış sürecinde tüm sürecinizi ABD'de sizin adınıza yürütebiliriz. Sizler için oluşturduğumuz sistemimizle birlikte nitelikli ekibimiz ve ekipmanlarımız ile işinizi kolaylaştırmaya hazırız. Böylece ABD'de fiziksel olarak bulunmanıza gerek kalmadan maliyetinizi düşürebilir, daha fazla rekabet şansı yakalayabilirsiniz. Tüm hizmetlerimize göz atarak ihtiyaç duyduğunuz hizmeti tesbit edebilir, anında faydalanabilirsiniz.

Hemen iletişime geçin, size ve ürünlerinize ygun yol haritanızı oluşturalım, hizmet kalitenizi arttıralım.

Una gran ventaja competitiva es nuestra estructura y servicio. Contamos con diversas áreas que hacen que nuestra empresa sea única en sus especialidades.

Construimos proyectos a lo largo de la República Mexicana y en diferentes países del extranjero como Estados Unidos, Venezuela, Colombia, Nicaragua, Chile y Argentina, entre otros.

Description:
Terminal Transfer Inc. is a transportation and warehousing company that has been serving the NW since 1995 with the highest quality in warehousing and transportation. We currently have three facilities located in Portland, OR offering over 375,000sq.ft, with our headquarters located at 15745 North Lombard Street which is less than one half of a mile from Terminal 6, the Port of Portland container terminal. 

Terminal Transfer Inc. also services the Seattle, WA area with a facility located at 25802 74th Ave South in Kent, WA conveniently located near SeaTac. Our facility includes 34 dock height doors, and 3 grade level doors totaling 75,000 sq.ft. Both of our customs bonded CFS warehouses are open Monday thru Friday, 8:00 am to 4:30 pm and after hours on request.

Our Portland and Seattle services include container drayage in Oregon, Washington, and Idaho, trans-loading, de-vanning, and storage of containers; containerized freight, local airfreight and LCL pick-up and delivery. We also pride ourselves in warehousing, distribution, pick and pack, and your consolidation needs. We are also capable of handling all C.E.S. exams for U.S. Customs in our Portland facility.

We handle all of our own transportation in house with over 25 class A CDL tandem tractors. Our drivers are TWIC, Hazardous and TSA certified which allows us to service your needs whether it is airfreight or ocean freight, FCL or LCL. Our fleet also consists of heavy haul equipment, flatbeds, curtain-vans, and van style trailers.

Terminal Transfer Inc. strives to provide the best quality customer service, experience, and dedication to all of our customers in every aspect of the industry. We are able to customize our services and procedures to accommodate your needs as requested.

Equipped with modernized technology, these facilities, including an Automated warehouse (operated by a robotic system of five stacker cranes) and a Traditional warehouse (operated by forklifts), are considered the largest and highest cold-storage facilities in Vietnam. The warehouses are located in Long Hau IP, Long An (31,000-pallet warehouse), Dong Nai, Nhon Trach 6 (7,000-pallet warehouse), and Pho Noi A, Hung Yen (23,000-pallet warehouse).

The SEABRIDGE warehouse is dedicated and designed to store coffee in the best conditions.

Our high-quality standard is furthermore reflected in the building concept, state-of-the-art technology, just-in-time services and a unique track-and-trace system. 

Through on-site green energy production by photovoltaic panels, recycling waste, on-site rail connection and CO2 reduction, we create a sustainable coffee supply chain.

The site also harbours a state-of-the art quality laboratory offering customized analysis of green coffee samples. A team of highly qualified experts carries out physical and sensorial analyses. Q-grading seminars are organized in partnership with the Coffee Quality Institute.

Folyamatos fejlődésünk eredményeképpen 2018. évben Dunakeszi ipari parkjában egy modern, a raktározási és egyedi gyártási igényeket is kielégíteni képes ipari ingatlan komplexumba (raktárcsarnok, irodaház és bemutatóterem) költöztünk.

Piaci erőnk a „Megoldás” és a „Termék” szavak közötti lényegi különbségben rejlik: mi a Zenitben abban hiszünk, hogy jól és célzottan a feladatra rendszert választani nem minden esetben egy adott gyártó felkínált termékportfóliójából lehet, hanem a sokféle célmegoldásból összeválogatva és integrálva valamint szaktudásunkat hozzáadva, így biztosítva Önnek a legmegfelelőbbet – ez a személyre szabott „Megoldás” az Ön számára!

Ebben a szellemben Ügyfeleink igényeivel, működésével, fejlődésével összhangban megoldásainkat, installációinkat igény esetén teljes életciklusukon át kísérjük, a tervezéstől a megvalósításon át az átépítésekig, felülvizsgálatokig, javításokig.

Name: Ibero Stahl GmbH
Description:
Die Ibero Stahl GmbH ist ein Stahlhandelsunternehmen für rost- und säurebeständige Blankstähle mit Sitzen in Mülheim, Vaihingen und Frankfurt.
Das Unternehmen bietet ein umfangreiches Angebot an Edelstahlmaterial, das u.a. Verwendung in der Automobilindustrie findet. Alle sich im Lieferprogramm befindlichen Waren stammen aus europäischer Herkunft und garantieren ein hohes Qualitätsniveau und eine gleichbleibend hohe Güte.Für eine besondere Flexibilität sorgt der eigene LKW Fuhrpark. 
Ibero Stahl ist nach ISO 9001 zertifiziert und arbeitet genauestens nach den vorgegebenen Standards. Alle Artikel sind mit einem entsprechenden Werkszeugnis attestiert.

++++ Produkte +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Ibero Stahl ist Spezialist für Langprodukte in blanker Ausführung. Neben den Lagerprodukten verfügt das Stahlhandelsunternehmen über fest reservierte Vormaterialkapazitäten. Auch Produkte fernab des Lagerstandards können kurzfristig geliefert werden. Darunter fallen auch Sondertoleranzen oder andere benötigte Wunschstablängen.
Neben diesem breiten Lager- und Lieferprogramm zählen diverse Anarbeitungsmöglichkeiten zum Leistungsspektrum.Zur speziellen Endenbearbeitung von Stäben bietet Ibero Stahl drei unterschiedliche Methoden an: Anfasen/Anspitzen, Zentrieren und Überdrehen/Andrehen.Mit unseren Hochleistungsbandsägeautomaten sägen wir alle Werkstoffe sowie alle gezogenen und geschliffenen Lagermaterialien. Wir bieten Serien- und Einzelschnitte, engste Toleranzen und Schnitte von 2–420mm Durchmesser (Stückgewichte bis 2500kg) und entgraten das Material auf Wunsch.

+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

As a steel trading company for stainless and acid proof bright steels Ibero Stahl  concentrates on a broad range of customers in the steel processing industries. Ibero Stahl offers a wide-ranging supply of stainless steel material, which among others is used in the automotive industry.

CMI provides solutions in storage, material handling and industrial supplies to western-Canadian businesses. We specialize in surplus and used racking and material handling products and complete our offering with a broad selection of the industry's most recognized brands in safety and industrial supplies.

Our Warehouse Systems Division stocks new and used racking and shelving systems from Redirack, Interlake-Mecalux, North American Storage Systems and Arpac. These manufactured rack systems are also commonly referred to as rack styles such as Canadian, Teardrop, Master Series, Mastorac, Enrack and Norack. Commercial shelving systems such EZ-rect, Easy-up (cross compatible) are stocked and we are also closely aligned with manufacturers of speciality shelving for workstations, food services, plant nurseries, and parts depots. We have a fully trained installation services team able to help design your next storage space, install it, maintain it and decommission it as needed. Our services can be const effectively delivered to locations across Western Canada from our head office in Calgary. 

CMI's Industrial Supply Division caters to commercial needs in the Material Handling, Safety, Welding, Fabrication, Janitorial and Instruments areas. Our most significant value is the ability to ship the most popular items in our catalog from our local Calgary distribution centre. We offer products from the leading industrial manufacturers as well as cost effective but high quality house brands. An extract from our line card includes Milwaukee, Dewalt, Makita, Hitachi, Weldmate, Kleton, Zenith, Ansell, Stanley, Proto, Vidmar, Lista, 3M, North, Honeywell,

Name: Grupo Inviam S.A. Cajas de Seguridad Privadas
Description:
Primera empresa española de alquiler de Cajas de Seguridad en Cámara Acorazada desvinculada a entidades financieras
Líderes en España desde abril de 2013, somos especialistas en ofrecer un servicio privado e independiente de alquiler de cajas de seguridad en cámara acorazada.
Grupo Inviam nace ante una necesidad del mercado, donde los usuarios necesitaban un espacio donde depositar sus pertenencias, un lugar seguro, accesible y confiable. Un servicio que dejaban de prestar los bancos abandonando a los usuarios.
Así pues, desde nuestra apertura hace más de 10 años nos hemos especializado, ofreciendo un servicio privado e independiente de alquiler de cajas de seguridad en cámara acorazada.
Nuestro compromiso con la seguridad, la confidencialidad y la satisfacción del cliente que nos ha convertido en la elección preferida para aquellos que valoran la protección de sus objetos más preciados.
Nuestros objetivos son
1. Seguridad Absoluta: Garantizar la seguridad de los objetos y documentos de valor de nuestros clientes las 24 horas del día, los 365 días del año, mediante sistemas de seguridad de vanguardia y protocolos estrictos de acceso.
 
2. Confidencialidad Total: Preservar la intimidad y la confidencialidad de nuestros clientes ofreciendo salas confidenciales, seguras y exclusivas, así como un seguimiento personalizado de los contratos para que no tengan ninguna preocupación.
3. Independencia y Flexibilidad: Ofrecer un servicio sin vinculaciones a entidades financieras, brindando a nuestros clientes la libertad de acceder a sus cajas de seguridad de manera rápida y discreta, sin importar el tamaño o el plazo de alquiler.
4. Experiencia y Confianza: Estar siempre disponibles para sus consultas demostrando nuestro compromiso con la excelencia y la satisfacción del cliente mediante un servicio de alta calidad respaldado por más de diez años de experiencia en el sector.

Name: Don's Cold Storage & Transportation, LLC
Description:
With over 2,500,000 cubic feet of cold storage and refrigerated transportation services, DCSL provides a comprehensive supply chain solution for it’s customers. State of the art, real-time data availability allows us to provide customers with the information they need, when they need it. Our facility has been designed with a state of the art redundant Ammonia Refrigeration, mechanical, and electrical systems, allowing us to maintain controlled temperature ranges from -15 degrees to 50 degrees in different storage rooms. Our facility is approximately 40 feet high and fully racked. The facility was also designed with 8 of the largest and highest capacity blast freezers in the world. Our freezers are capable of blast freezing product from 36 degrees to -10 degrees within a 24 hour time span. Our blast freezers can hold and blast up to 20 semi-truck loads daily. Don’s Cold Storage and Logistics offers the following services: 

Managing your transportation needs in today’s tough economy can be difficult; our experienced team is ready to help. Don’s Global Logistics has positioned itself as a true third party logistics provider, assisting the customer with their supply chain needs. We have access to both over-the-road and rail transportation services that help differentiate us from the industry at large.
 
Our logistics division is supported by a network of up to 200 owner-operator drivers using 48’-53’ refrigerated, dry van, and flatbed trailers and delivering product to the 48 continental states.

 The standard of excellence continues with the leadership experience in the industry combined with logistics services which provide customers with supply chain management from shipping to customer receipt.
 
 With an experienced staff, state of the art equipment, and its distinct features, Don’s Global Logistics provides customers with quality and excellent services in warehousing and transportation.

 Ipari kapuk – Energiahatékony gyorskapu, szekcionált kapuk, redőnykapuk
 Dokkolóberendezések – teleszkópos és billenő rámpakiegyenlítők, ollós emelőasztalok, rakodóhidak, mobil rámpák, kaputömítések, rakodóházak, EGD termozsilip

 Ipari szellőzőrendszerek – homlokzati lamellás szellőzőpanelek, időjárásálló tetőszellőzők, zaj-csillapított tetőszellőzők, természetes szellőző- és fénykupolák
 Felülvilágítók – fix kupolák, tripla falú felülvilágító panelek
 Tűzgátló kapuk és szállítópálya-lezárások
 Ütközésvédelmi eszközök – rakodóterek, dokkolópontok védelmére
A piacvezető EGD a forgalmazott termékek értékesítésén túl azok telepítését, karbantartását és szervizelését vállalja a teljes termék életciklus alatt. 
A vállalat piacvezető innovatív, prémium minőségű, kimagasló energiahatékonysággal rendelkező termékeket kínál ipari, logisztikai, kereskedelmi és közösségi épületeket kivitelezői, valamint üzemeltetői számára.

Name: Stockroom London
Description:
Stockroom London – specialist archiving and storage with a personal touch.

We provide secure, zone-based storage and specialist archiving for local authorities, museums and art galleries, legal firms, professional services, and media and production companies from across London.

From valuable art, precious artefacts, props, furniture, and data drives to legal documents, tapes and tech equipment, we store and manage your assets securely and safely. 

Our 120,000 sq. ft warehouse is based in the historic Royal Arsenal in Woolwich, South-East London. Each of our clients gets a designated storage zone, meaning your items are kept safely together, clearly organised and labelled, and ready when you need them. 

Whether you need short-term overflow, long-term archiving, or a partner who understands the value of your assets, we deliver a flexible, personal service you can trust. 

We work with councils, museums, art galleries, advertising agencies, production houses, law firms, and more, offering quick collection and turnaround times arranged to suit each client. 

At Stockroom London, we combine scale, care and clarity, so you always know where your items are and who’s looking after them.

Name: Geral 10 logistica
Description:
Há 25 anos, a Geral 10 constrói sua história com foco em confiança, controle e eficiência logística. Especializada em armazenagem e distribuição de alimentos refrigerados, congelados e secos, atua em todo o estado de Santa Catarina com estrutura própria, equipe qualificada e gestão operacional de alto desempenho.
Em 2012, firmamos contrato com a Frimesa, tornando-nos responsáveis por distribuir seus produtos no Oeste catarinense. Em Chapecó, movimentamos mais de 1.000 toneladas/mês, garantindo qualidade em toda a cadeia de armazenagem.
Em 2018, a operação se expandiu para Biguaçu, onde construímos um centro de distribuição moderno, com 3.800 posições pallet, atendendo o litoral Sul e Norte com mais de 2.000 toneladas/mês em movimentação.
Em 2020, a Vigor passou a contar com nossa expertise em armazenagem e transporte, com 800 toneladas/mês entregues às principais redes do estado.
Também temos orgulho de trabalhar com marcas como Froneri (Nestlé Sorvetes), Paviloche, Saputo, Santa Clara Alimentos, Bacio di Latte, Los Los, SoS Alimentos, Pmi Foods e Nossa Massa, oferecendo soluções logísticas personalizadas e de alta performance.
A Geral 10 é sinônimo de compromisso com o que mais importa: entregar resultado com excelência, dia após dia.

WHY INVEST IN RACK ARMOUR?

Rack Armour's strength is in its simplicity, it simply clips onto your existing or new racking without the need for further fixings and quite simply, it works! It really is that easy!

Rack Armour offer's the most advanced design and the most extensive range of cost effective pallet rack protection systems available to purchase in todayâs market, Our Rack Armour is manufactured using ballistics grade polymer materials, making the protectors suitable for even the most harsh conditions such as freezer conditions at temperatures as low as -40C. Rack Armour is great for the environment as it is fully recyclable and non toxic, it is a flexible system that can be removed and reused on other racking structures of your choice, making it an investment that will last for years and years!

Name: Store-IT Consultants LLP
Description:
Storeit Consultants is a company that provides a range of leasing services to help businesses manage their storage needs. Whether you need temporary storage during a move or long-term storage for excess inventory, Storeit Consultants can help you find the right storage solution to fit your needs.
One of the main leasing services provided by Storeit Consultants is commercial leasing. This service allows businesses to lease storage space for a set period of time, usually several months or years. This option is ideal for businesses that need long-term storage solutions for inventory, equipment, or other materials.

Another leasing service provided by Storeit Consultants is short-term leasing. This option is perfect for businesses that only need temporary storage solutions, such as during a move or renovation. With short-term leasing, businesses can lease storage space for just a few weeks or months, without the commitment of a long-term lease.
Storeit Consultants also provides customized leasing solutions to meet the unique needs of each business. This means that businesses can work with Storeit Consultants to design a storage solution that meets their specific needs, whether that means a customized storage unit or a specialized storage solution for unique materials or equipment.
In addition to their leasing services, Storeit Consultants also provides a range of other services to help businesses manage their storage needs. These include consulting services to help businesses choose the right storage solutions, as well as packing and moving services to help businesses transport their materials to and from the storage facility.
Overall, Storeit Consultants provides a range of leasing services to help businesses manage their storage needs. Whether you need short-term or long-term storage solutions, Storeit Consultants can help you find the right solution to fit your needs. With customized solutions and a range of other services available,

Name: Evolve Fulfilment
Description:
Evolve Fulfilment: Making Global Fulfilment feel Local; Making Logistics feel Human

Fulfilment shouldn’t be complicated. At Evolve, we help brands focus on creativity and growth — not logistics. Our system makes global selling feel local and fulfilment feel human again.

Who We Are
Evolve Fulfilment is a UK-based 3PL partner delivering scalable, tailored e-commerce solutions. From our Cambridgeshire headquarters — just an hour from London — we support DTC and B2B brands in beauty, health, nutrition, toys, pets, and consumer goods.
We simplify fulfilment so you can focus on customers and growth. No bots or ticket systems — just real people who care about your brand.

How We Help Brands Grow
Setup is quick and transparent: no monthly fees, no minimums, no hidden costs. Connect your platforms — Shopify, TikTok, eBay, Amazon — and you’re ready to go.
Our cross-border network gives European and Global customers fast, local-like delivery while we handle duties, taxes, compliance, and Amazon Prep.
From warehouse to customer, we provide precision, visibility, and scalability for brands of all sizes.

Our Difference
Built by founders, operators, and logistics specialists, Evolve was created by people who’ve been in your shoes. We listen, solve problems fast, and scale with you — combining decades of operational expertise with genuine human support.

We’d love to hear from you!

•	Cleaning of containers
•	Light container repairs

•	Receiving bulk cargoes and pack into containers

Name: Herkules Industrial Warehouse Solutions
Description:
At Herkules Industrial Warehouse Solutions, we take pride in being a one-stop destination for complete warehousing, storage, automation, bird control, flooring, and ELV solutions. With over 20 years of industry experience and a fully equipped manufacturing facility in Vasai, Maharashtra, we offer end-to-end products and turnkey project execution for industrial, commercial, and institutional clients across India.

We specialize in Storage & Space Optimization Solutions such as Heavy Duty Storage, Pallet Racking, Two-Tier Racking, Mezzanine Floors, Mobile Racking, Mould Racks, Lockers, Sheet Storage Racks, and Motorized Mobile Racking Systems, all built with a focus on durability, efficiency, and customization.

Our Warehousing Automation portfolio includes Entrance & Gate Automation, High-Speed Roll-Up & Sectional Doors, Docking Bays, Dock Levellers, Dock Shelters, Hangar Doors, Garage Doors, Boom Barriers, Bollards, Tyre Killers, and more to ensure smooth operations and secured access.

We also undertake ELV (Extra Low Voltage) Projects, covering a wide range of intelligent systems like CCTV Surveillance, Fire Alarm & Detection Systems, PA Systems, Building Management Systems (BMS), Access Control, Boardroom AV Automation, and IT & Networking Solutions—ensuring safety and smart infrastructure.

To support safety and compliance, we offer Bird Proofing Solutions like Invisible Bird Nets, Nylon Nets, Repellent & Laser Devices, and Warehouse Flooring Solutions like Epoxy, PU, and Vinyl Flooring.

With our customer-first approach, in-house expertise, and strong focus on innovation, quality, and timely execution, Herkules has become a trusted name in the warehousing ecosystem.

We don’t just build warehouses—we build smart, secure, and scalable infrastructure that drives operational excellence. Let’s work together to power your next project.

#StorageSolutions #WarehouseAutomation #ELVSystems #BirdProofing #SmartWarehousing #HerkulesWarehouseSolutions

Name: Green Storage
Description:
Green Storage is a 100% Canadian owned and operated company offering eco-friendly self storage services at 9 different locations in Southern Ontario.
Not many places for self-storage plant a tree with every rental, but at Green Storage, that’s just the beginning. Our brand new state-of-the-art storage locations come with all the modern features, innovative technologies, and environmental drive to get storage right — and at the right price. 

Our specialty is adding a “Green” experience to our product in the self storage industry. We pride ourselves on our construction innovations which include geothermal heating and cooling, solar power and many others. As we have evolved over the years, our goal has been to create net-zero facilities. This means that our facilities produce just as much (if not slightly more) energy than they consume on a yearly basis. We take this one step further and offer additional eco-friendly initiatives that our tenants can benefit from such as free-to-use EV charging stations on site, planting a tree with every rental, community vegetable gardens and much more.

Companies entrust us to make certain their orders and packages arrive at customer destinations exactly as intended. We do whatever it takes to get the job done right!
 
And, we provide “right pricing". Customers receive exactly the services and processes they need. We take pride in our ability to listen to clients, pinpoint their needs, and use the information collected to build a unique and powerful fulfillment program that fits within budgets. Product Fulfillment Solutions takes the hassles out of order processing so our customers can focus on growing their brands and improving their products.  
 
PFS specializes in all aspects of product fulfillment; kitting, pick and pack, special assembly, warehouse and shipping services, integration with e-commerce and shopping carts, and return management.  We also take pride in our order accuracy and speed of delivery.  Product Fulfillment Solutions has an accuracy rate of 99.75%, compared to the industry average of 98% AND most orders arrive at destinations in the United States within 48 hours.
 
Product Fulfillment Solutions was born of an entrepreneurial spirit that fuels everything we do. Please contact us www.productfulfillmentsolutions.com to schedule a personalized 3PL solution call with you.

Description:
With over a decade of experience since our establishment in 2012, Kenya Racking And Shelves Ltd is proud to offer a wide range of racking and shelving products. Our dedicated team brings extensive practical experience and technical knowledge, ensuring that we can assist you in finding the best storage solutions tailored to your needs. We take pride in providing exceptional after-sales service to both our existing and new customers.

We invite you to visit us and explore our extensive product range, where you can witness the diversity of our racking options. From Heavy Palletized racking suitable for large industries to Selective Pallet Racking, Double Deep Racking, Cantilever Racking, Drive Racking, Shuttle Racking, and Supported Mezzanine Racking for archiving and multi-storage solutions, we offer a comprehensive selection. Our medium-duty and light-duty racks are particularly popular among Small and Medium-Sized Enterprises, solidifying our reputation as a preferred storage solutions provider in Kenya and East Africa.

 All our products come with a guarantee of an extended lifespan, thanks to their powder-coated (Epoxy) finish. This sets them apart from the traditional spray-painted options available locally. We source our products from ISO-certified factories that supply their world-class products to Europe, America, the Middle East, and South Africa. To ensure quality, our products undergo inspection by KEBS-appointed agencies at the factories before shipment to Kenya.

Hoje,  contando já com vasta experiência no mercado, é muito mais do que um terminal de segunda linha que viu abrir as portas há 10 anos, oferece um leque mais alargado de serviços, na área de logística e gestão de mercadoria, ganhando proporções de âmbito nacional, sendo numa plataforma logística única, exemplo de um país estruturado, e rumo à excelência.

Description:
We Believe Different is Cool
Go Fan Yourself is the visionary company that redefined and reinvented the HVLS fan industry with the Z-Tech Fan. In February of 2020 we took Z-Tech further by executing a full partnership with global powerhouse ABB!  Z-Tech is now powered by the ABB Dodge Quantis Z-Tech Drive.  The most advanced "big fan" powerplant in the world and gives GFY the only system solution (motor and drive made by the same company) available in America.  Our passion for innovation and for doing what’s right drives us to create the world’s best big fans that blow our clients’ minds. Go Fan Yourself clients save money, boost productivity and enjoy a partnership with a manufacturer they trust to keep it cool.

GFY clients also trust us when it comes to safety!  In September of 2019 GFY released the Z-Tech SS safety system making our fans 2X safer than every other fan on the market.  Custom straps with a break strength of 16,000lbs easily exceed the dated steel cables used by every other fan in the industry.

In addition to our technology and experience, we differentiate ourselves through the values that drive our corporate behavior. We take pride in our commitment to honesty, authenticity, professionalism and a passion for building trust-centered relationships with our clients. Instead of the quick sale, we focus on selling systems for change, not just standalone products.

Go Fan Yourself released our patented Z-Tech fan in 2014 to address the shortcomings of conventional HVLS fans in the industry. To truly be different and be cool, we needed to design and manufacture our own products. This allowed GFY to be proactive at the highest level and create solutions for inherent gaps in conventional HVLS fan design that our customers brought to our attention. Four major problem and opportunity areas have surfaced that our revolutionary Z Tech technology addresses.

Hochregallager & Automatisierung
Mit Hochregallager-Silos, Regalbediengeräten (RGB) und Mehrebenen-Shuttle-Systemen setzen wir neue Maßstäbe in der Automatisierung. In Kulmbach gefertigt, zeichnen sich unsere Anlagen durch Qualität und Langlebigkeit aus.

Wir spielen in der oberen Liga
Dank unserer neuen Hochregallager-Silos, die über 22 Meter hinausgehen, bieten wir wirtschaftliche und platzsparende Lösungen für Unternehmen mit hoher Umschlagleistung.

Galler – weil effiziente Lagerlogistik den Unterschied macht.

Description:

Name: Retrilog SARL
Description:
RETRILOG est une entreprise d’insertion et une entreprise classique : c’est une entreprise inscrite dans le marché concurrentiel tout en employant des personnes en difficultés d’accès à l’emploi.

Retrilog représente fin 2016 un effectif de 60 salariés dont 38 en insertion pour une chiffre d'affaires de 2,5M€.
RETRILOG s’attache à lutter contre les causes d’exclusion, basant son action sur la conviction que le retour à l’emploi des personnes en difficulté est un moyen de les aider à préserver leur dignité, à retrouver leur autonomie financière et leur place dans la société. RETRILOG participe au développement d’une économie responsable au service des Territoires, RETRILOG œuvre pour la solidarité et préserve l’environnement.

Nos métiers
Le transport et la logistique
La gestion de déchets issus du tertiaire
Offre personnalisée d'Emballage et Expédition toutes destinations

Nos valeurs 
Favoriser l'insertion socio professionnelle des personnes par l'activité économique
Participer au développement d'une économie responsable au service des Territoires
Oeuvrer pour la solidarité et préserver l'environnement dans le respect de la législation

Nos atouts  
Un service réactif et rigoureux qui s'inscrit dans une démarche d'amélioration continue : Retrilog est certifiée ISO 9001 et ISO14001 depuis novembre 2016
Une solution personnalisée : nous vous proposons une étude à la carte de vos besoins et adaptée à vos contraintes techniques et financières.
Une solution respectueuse de l'environnement
Une solution bretonne
La force d'un mouvement national reconnu depuis 60 ans, la souplesse d'un acteur régional

Au final 
Un choix qui vous engage en tant que citoyen et en tant qu’entreprise que vous pouvez valoriser économiquement et justifier humainement par la valeur ajoutée à votre responsabilité Sociale d’Entreprise (RSE).

Name: Order Fulfillment Solutions
Description:

Order Fulfillment Solutions (OFS) - Columbus, Ohio Logistics and Warehousing Every client is unique to OFS, we tailored our warehouse operations to reflect the needs and wants of our clients. We Designed our warehouse as to the specifications of our customers. Nominal values are our customer’s values, tolerance levels are our customer’s tolerance levels. We do not deviate from our customer's specifications unless there is a change order submitted by our customers. 

Being able to move at the demand of our customers is important to OFS. Markets change and we change with our customer’s needs. We are Flexible to service our customer’s needs. What our clients need today, maybe what is needed tomorrow. We are able to adapt to the changing needs of our clients. 

With the ability to service worldwide, our footprint is in Columbus, Ohio. We are able to source other locations nationally with our focus in Texas. The ability to move products worldwide is what makes us unique and the true meaning of Logistics.

Today, OFS is on the radar in every industry that requires warehousing, kitting, order fulfillment, distribution, assembly, and co-packing. We're working closely with customers to look at their entire supply chains, from point of origin to the end-consumers, to identify the opportunities. This collaborative approach is a major reason why customers trust us with a variety of value-added services. Moving at the speed of your business.

Name: Hilonyl
Description:
Somos una empresa con mas de 40 años en el mercado, brindando soluciones integrales de empaque para el comercio, la industria y el agro.

¿Qué nos diferencia? Gracias a nuestro proceso de producción responsable, recuperamos los desperdicios que generamos en la fabricación de hilos para la industria y realizamos productos alternativos como el fleje y cintas para cercos. 

Apostamos a la reutilización del plástico para evitar su desecho y contaminación de los océanos y contribuir así a una cadena de producción más sostenible y amigable con el ambiente.

Desde el año 1983 llegamos a todos los rincones del país y acompañamos a las principales industrias.

Name: Consorcio del Depósito Franco de A Coruña
Description:
El Consorcio del Depósito Franco de A Coruña, institución, de la que forman parte el Ayuntamiento, la Diputación, la Cámara de Comercio y la Autoridad Portuaria, de A Coruña, es una parte de territorio aduanero comunitario, separado del resto del mismo, en el que se pueden introducir toda clase de mercancías, cualquiera que sea la cantidad, naturaleza, origen procedencia o destino, sin perjuicio de las prohibiciones o restricciones que puedan establecerse por razones de orden público, moralidad y seguridad pública, etc.

Pone a disposición de las empresas que lo soliciten más de 4.000 m2 en el Puerto de Coruña, en un enclave logístico con excelentes comunicaciones, prestando el servicio de depósito aduanero y no aduanero, almacenaje y manipulación de mercancías contando con el personal y la maquinaria necesarios. 

Si piensa en iniciar o ampliar su actividad en el campo de la logística, la exportación o importación, o simplemente precisa de un lugar en el que poder almacenar temporalmente sus productos o pretende abaratar sus costes fijos (agua, luz, personal,…), el Depósito Franco ofrece múltiples ventajas y oportunidades

Name: Up North Material Handling Solutions
Description:
UpNORTH Material Handling Solutions, LLC  was founded by Kris Palestrini and Nick Bendas. Kris and Nick started the company to fill a void in the Material Handling Industry. UpNORTH is a privately held systems integrator, installation provider and a heavy machinery trucking provider, headquartered in Roseville, MN. 

Our Story - Prior to going into business together,  Kris and Nick competed for similar business in the Material Handling Industry in the upper Midwest. They quickly developed mutual respect for one another and began sharing stories about the issues they were experiencing in the industry. Kris and Nick decided it was time to build a company that would ‘fill the void’ in the MHI in the upper Midwest. 

UpNORTH opened its doors for business in 2019 - starting from ground zero - UpNORTH has transformed into a growing, successful company that serves Minnesota, western Wisconsin, northern Iowa, North Dakota, and South Dakota. 

Our team approaches every opportunity with the attention to detail it deserves from inception to completion. Our goal is to execute on time and on budget in order to improve your company’s profitability and long term success.

Name: StewardSHIP Warehousing & Logistics
Description:
When it comes to growing your business, you want to be confident your storage, distribution and fulfillment processes are running smoothly. 

What if they ran so smoothly, you didn’t even have to think about it? 

For that to be true, you need a reliable third-party logistics (3PL) partner that cares as much about timeliness and accuracy as you do.

Unfortunately, many third-party logistics providers cause as many headaches as solutions, leaving you stressed and dreading the next issue that will inevitably arise. 

At Stewardship Warehousing and Logistics, we believe your 3PL partner should work so seamlessly with your operations, you don’t have to think about that part of your business. 

Imagine the additional capacity you’d have if you didn’t have to think about these logistics on a daily basis? Our goal is to operate quietly and efficiently in the background of your business so you have that freedom.

Seguimos la filosofía del JIT, "just in time" ("justo a tiempo") y nuestro objetivo principal consiste en minimizar los tiempos, desde la recepción del pedido hasta su entrega, en el lugar debido y con el mínimo gasto y siempre resolviendo las necesidades concretas de cada uno de ellos.

Name: Roberts Supply
Description:
From its humble beginnings as a small family owned retail business, Roberts Supply has expanded to become the leader of the supply industry. Roberts Supply's commitment to providing high quality products and unparalleled customer service has made it the industry's leader.

Early on, Bill Roberts Senior discovered the four ingredients to running a successful business: Facilities, People, Service and Technology. He shared his philosophy with his sons, who have since adopted his strategy and transformed the small retail company into a multi-million dollar supply organization.

 
The Roberts Brothers developed a responsive organization that provides various customers with immediate support, peace of mind and complete satisfaction. Roberts Supply is able to consistently deliver excellent service as well as quality products with the help of its experienced staff. We foster a positive, proactive work environment which flows through to our customers.

This comprehensive quality management focus, from employee to customer, has made Roberts Supply the South's preferred distributor. Period.

Name: Absolute Racking Inspections ltd
Description:
Absolute Racking Inspections Ltd. are specialists in all areas of storage equipment.  

We have over 35 years in-depth knowledge of warehouse storage solutions, both installing and project managing.  Some of our work includes 18.2 meter crane racking and 4 tier pick tower installations for some of the largest warehousing and logistics companies in the UK and Europe.  We can inspect any size site, from multiple sites to just a couple of bays, give us a call or use the contact form and Sean will be happy to discuss your individual requirements.

Sean has been a registered S.A.R.I Inspector for 12 years, working for manufacturers and distributors and has now developed Absolute Racking Inspections Ltd along with his partner Caroline who has over 20 years of experience in co-ordination.  

Absolute Racking Inspections Ltd. are totally independent.  We will endeavor to give every job superior service and attention to detail.

Posteriormente passou a atuar com produtos agrícolas, como grãos, farelo e produtos florestais como: madeira em toras, madeira paletizada e compensados, com forte atuação para cargas de importação como: fertilizantes em Big Bag, granel e demais cargas paletizadas.


A empresa está a apenas 2,5km do porto de Paranaguá e tem toda a estrutura e licenças para movimentação e armazenagem destes produtos, oferecendo a todos os seus clientes um serviço especializado e com confiabilidade, garantindo o atendimento dos volume e prazos contratados, buscando garantir a qualidade de seus serviços.

Name: Seabrook Warehousing Ltd
Description:
The directors and senior management at Seabrook’s have fifty plus years of expertise in warehousing and logistics to provide clients a professional, friendly, personal service, which delivers a flexible range of supply chain solutions across a diverse range of industry sectors.

We operate HM Revenue & Customs approved bonded warehouses for the storage distribution of third party client stock from our warehouse in Thurrock RM20. These sites are ideally located for easy access to central London and motorway network, to service worldwide imports & exports via the UK’s major east coast and channel ports.

Our modern warehouse have sophisticated warehouse management systems which track every case from arrival, through storage to dispatch to ensure full traceability of your goods, combined with high level site security to safeguard your goods whilst in our care.

Seabrook’s have served the Beer, Wine & Spirit Industry for five decades, our depth of knowledge is now serving other business sectors for the storage and transportation of their products, such as Dairy, Food & Beverages, FMCG, Manufacturing and Retail.

Using an excise bonded warehouse can significantly improve your cash flow, by allowing the owner of goods to delay the payment of excise duty and VAT whilst stored duty suspended, then defer this further by utilising a deferment account.

SWL have decades of expertise in providing bonded warehousing and logistic solutions to the international drinks industry.

We provide an ambient storage solution from one case to full load, our client base is representative of, brand owners, distilleries, wineries, brewers, retail & wholesale and also specialist traders.

Our expertise of excise regulations and procedures and our dedicated team of customer service specialists enable SWL to deliver client expectations wherever your market sector.

Spacious and weather-protected container units.

Dedicated units specifically for motorcycle storage.

Our facility is equipped with cutting-edge technology to ensure the highest standards of security and convenience, including AI-enabled CCTV, Bluetooth-enabled locks, and automated access systems.

Name: JiWa Jinvall Inredningar AB
Description:
JiWa är ett företag som sedan starten 1970 specialiserat sig på förvaringslösningar till industrier, laboratorier, kontor, myndigheter och skolor.

Vår målsättning är att bli den självklara leverantören då kunden vill lösa ett förvaringsbehov. Detta genom att erbjuda det bästa produktsortimentet, hög kvalitet och en tydlig kommunikation med våra kunder.

Varje år levereras drygt 10 000 skåp varav en tredjedel exporteras, huvudsakligen till Frankrike, Finland, Norge och Danmark.

// Vi är kvalitetscertifierade enligt ISO 9001 & ISO 14001//

Det är arkitekter, inredare och brukare som löser de specifika förvaringsproblem. Kunderna berättar vilka behov de har eller vilken lösning de skulle vilja se, detta ser vi som en mycket positiv utmaning.

Name: Noamex, Inc.
Description:
Noamex is a privately-owned warehousing, transport, and shipping company based in New York and Florida. 

Founded in 1962, we have maintained a steady and reliable service for clients ranging from small businesses up to large corporations. 

In 2018, we began offering 3rd Party Logistics, followed by an ambitious and successful expansion plan, establishing the Florida branch of our company. 

During the last 5 years, Noamex has scaled consistently and sustainably, an impressive track record for our business. 

Future goals include strengthening our domestic position and establishing an international reputation. We intend to continue growing alongside our existing clients who rely on us to bridge the gap between themselves and their customers. 

A complete list of services Noamex offers is available on request, but our most in-demand include:

> Storage 
> Fulfillment 
> Transportation 
> Inventory management
> Transloading 
> Back-office administration 

Each client receives a tailored service, meaning we work around your company rather than you having to work around our company.

This is a competitive advantage Noamex has over larger companies in the warehousing and storage industry and one appreciated by our clients through the years they’ve been with us.

Visit our website to learn more about our services and how we work.

Name: Warehouse TERRADA
Description:
Established in 1950 and located in Tennoz, Tokyo, Warehouse TERRADA has since expanded into a wide range of fields, with a primary focus on the storage of artworks, which launched in 1975, as well as artwork restoration, transportation, and exhibitions. In 2014, we began operating a bonded warehouse for artworks. We established a new bonded warehouse in the spring of 2022, which we opened as a permanent bonded gallery venue that allows for viewings, storage and more under bonded conditions. 
 In recent years, Warehouse TERRADA has opened several facilities that promote art and culture.

WHAT MUSEUM:the collectors' museum of contemporary art
https://what.warehouseofart.org/en/
WHAT CAFE: An art gallery cafe
https://cafe.warehouseofart.org/
PIGMENT TOKYO: An art materials lab
https://pigment.tokyo/?set_language=en
TERRADA ART COMPLEX: one of Japan's largest gallery complexes. 
https://terrada-art-complex.com/en

Through these broad-ranging art industry operations, and as a leading company in the Japanese art world, we develop services that will play a role in revitalizing its art market and develop Tennoz, Tokyo, as a hub of art together with other cities around the world.

Name: Packageman
Description:
Packageman is an third party e-commerce fulfillment (aka 3PL) center and same-day delivery provider.

1. FULFILLMENT SERVICE

Packageman stores, picks & packs, and ships the merchandise on behalf of e-commerce companies. Fulfillment service covers both B2B and B2C orders. It works with the top national carriers to negotiate lucrative volume shipping discounts, which are then passed on to e-commerce client for both domestic and international shipments.

2. SAME-DAY DELIVERY SERVICE

Packageman offers same-day delivery to New York metro area - 365 zip codes across New York and New Jersey. Its Same-Day Delivery costs less than ground shipping - it saves money to e-commerce clients and gives them competitive edge.

Name: Xpress Logistics
Description:
Xpress Logistics is a leading third-party logistics (3PL) warehouse company that provides comprehensive warehousing and distribution services to ecommerce businesses. Our company was founded with a simple mission: to help businesses optimize their logistics operations and streamline their supply chain processes.

We operate a state-of-the-art warehouse facility that is equipped with the latest technology and infrastructure to support efficient and accurate inventory management. Our team of logistics experts has years of experience in managing complex supply chain operations, and we pride ourselves on our ability to deliver fast, reliable, and cost-effective logistics solutions to our clients.

As a 3PL warehouse company, we provide a full range of services, including pickups, inventory management, order fulfillment, shipping and receiving, and transportation management. We specialize in helping e-commerce businesses scale their operations without the need for costly investments in warehouse infrastructure, personnel, and technology.

Located in Lubbock, Texas, Teinert Metals' customer base widely covers the Permian Basin all the way up to the Texas Panhandle and over into Eastern New Mexico. Name: Active Warehousing Inc.
Description:
Headquartered in Edmonton AB, Active Warehousing offers a wide range of warehousing services including Third-Party (3PL) and Contract Logistics. We offer full scale operations and inventory management, warehousing space leasing and product storage from general merchandise to our specialization in the Forestry and Oil, Gas and Energy sectors. With rail sidings for boxcar loading and unloading our strategically located facilities are just minutes from numerous container yards and both CN and CP rail yards.

Established in 2004 with 40,000 square feet and one client, we have seen our growth occupy ~650,000 square feet and become a multi client company.

This doesn’t mean we’ve forgotten where we come from and the hard work and dedication it took to get here, we continue to honor our foundation of working hard, being honest, being fair and putting all of our assets on the table to ensure our clients are always given the best service we can offer.

Our protocol and mandate to get everyone home safe each day leads us all to foster this focus in our daily duties, to constantly strive to do better and to work with industry to give everyone a chance at a prosperous career.

Name: Atlanta Liquidation LLC
Description:
We, Atlanta Liquidation, is a company whose scope of services is not limited to just the liquidation of a company’s assets. We also specialize in rack and shelving installation and dismantling. The relocation or removal of excess equipment, including pallet racking, conveyor systems, other storage systems and other heavy equipment, are also within the scope of our expertise.

Atlanta Liquidation also guarantees to leave the warehouses clean and free of debris. Whether you have one product or a variety of material to sell, we can help you turn it into cash. 

Our crews travel nationwide and we can pay cash for good warehouse rack and other warehouse shelving and equipment. No quantities are too large for Atlanta Liquidation, since we purchase entire warehouses and specialize in truckload quantities.

Name: Racking Audits Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
Established to fulfill a growing demand for workplace safety of storage systems, Racking Audits Australia is the industry leader of storage systems audting, warehouse design, and maintenance of storage systems.
 
Our services ensure your workplace remains safe and compliant, whilst maximising both warehouse space, efficiency, accessability and product flow.
 
Keeping your Pallet Racking installation in good working condition is essential for safe operation and a long life. A Safety audit is a good way to keep your racking safe & complying with Australian OH&S Standards. A qualified Engineer can be booked to visit your work site to inspect, compile a report & make recommendations to improve/repair your racking. On completion of repairs/alterations a compliance certificate is issued.
 
We can carry out Safety Inspections of all racking types. Racking Audits Australia has over 10 years of experience in the warehousing and racking industry ranging from: 
Managing electronic tracking of palletised outward goods.
 Designing conveyor systems that link storage facilities to production areas and despatch.
 Installation of racking along with auditing & safety inspections.
 Complete redesigns of warehouses to increase flow & productivity.
 Designing complete new warehouse facilities.
 
Racking Audits Australia stays up to date with new technologies via a networking program with other prominent Warehouse/logistics/electronic systems professionals.

Name: FRIGORIFICOS ZARAGOZA, S.A.
Description:
Cámaras en refrigeración y congelación.

Cinco décadas dedicadas al frío, avalan nuestra experiencia en el sector del frío industrial. Para entender nuestros orígenes, los de Frigoríficos Zaragoza, S.A. hay que remontarse al año 1.917, fecha de constitución de Frío Industrial Aragonés, una empresa dedicada a la fabricación de hielo (en formatos de barras de hielo y escamado). La proliferación de las neveras eléctricas durante la década de los años 60, hizo que Frío Industrial Aragonés tuviera que cambiar de actividad. 

En 1.965 se constituye la sociedad llamada FRIGORIFICOS ZARAGOZA, S.A., en la que en el transcurso del tiempo hemos estado dedicados a la a la conservación de alimentos a granel, frutas, verduras, carnes, pescados y otros mediante su congelación.

Name: REGO STORE
Description:
В REGOSTORE може да разгледате пълната гама подемна механизация, почистваща техника и складови системи на фирма "Инжконсулт ЕООД''.
Ние сме компания с дългогодишен опит в продажбите и сервизът на качествена техника на конкурентни цени.

Продуктовата ни гама в REGOSTORE се състои от три основни групи: подемна, почистваща техника и стелажни системи. 

Подемно-транспортната или складова техника е съставена от мотокари, газокари, електрокари, стакери, ордер-пикъри, електрически палетни колички, специализирана почистваща техника за закрити и открити площи, стелажни системи, части, консумативи и други.

Непрекъснато развиваме обхвата си на дейност, за да сме максимално гъвкави и полезни за нашите клиенти.

Производителите, с които работим са утвърдени световни марки и предлагат гарантирано качество на изгодни цени.

За нуждите на нашите клиенти, разполагаме с представителства в София, Варна и Габрово, сервиз и оборудвани мобилни сервизни групи и склад за резервни части.

Desde 1978 Grupo Sedei se a consolidado como un proveedor independiente de servicios de transporte multimodal y logística con el objetivo de proveer valor agregado a la línea de servicios de nuestros clientes .

Name: Intellisyncs
Description:
IntelliSyncs is the engineering-driven warehouse automation partner built for companies that can’t afford failed go-lives, vendor lock-in, or “black box” solutions.

We don’t just install robots and conveyors—we design, integrate, and own complex, multi-vendor programs from concept to go-live and beyond. Our cross-functional team unites mechanical, electrical, controls, WMS, and cloud expertise under one roof, so you get one accountable partner instead of coordinating a dozen suppliers.

What we do:

AI-powered warehouse automation – AMRs, AGVs, robotics, AS/RS, conveyors, and sortation engineered around your real flows, not vendor slides.
Material flow optimization – Data-driven layout, buffering, and conveyance design to eliminate bottlenecks and maximize throughput.
End-to-end integration – WMS, WCS, IoT, ERP, and automation equipment orchestrated into a single, real-time “system of truth.”
Cloud migration & WMS modernization – Transform legacy environments into scalable, analytics-ready, cloud-native platforms.
Warehouse design & retrofits – From mezzanines and racking to full brownfield/greenfield redesigns for capacity, safety, and growth.
How we’re different:

Outcome-driven, not equipment-driven – We measure success by labor reduction, throughput, space utilization, uptime, and ROI—not by how much hardware we sell.
Technology-agnostic – Best-of-breed solutions without vendor lock-in; we protect your future flexibility.
Phased, low-risk execution – Start with high-ROI pilots, prove the business case, then scale with confidence.
Total ownership of execution – You set the strategy; we manage design, vendors, site work, commissioning, and optimization with full transparency.
In a $60B+ and rapidly growing automation market, IntelliSyncs closes the execution gap—turning complex warehouse programs into predictable, measurable performance gains.

Ready to future-proof your floor and turn bottlenecks into breakthroughs?

CARGA MANUAL

PALETIZACIÓN
- Rack Convencional

Además, disponemos de un servicio post venta formado por un equipo propio de especialistas técnicos altamente cualificados preparados no solo para dar una respuesta inmediata a cualquier incidencia sino para prevenirlas anticipándose a ellas, y ofrecemos un servicio de mantenimiento mediante inspecciones detalladas, proporcionando informes del estado de las instalaciones y sugiriendo en su caso las modificaciones o reparaciones necesarias, trabajando según las normas europeas.
