Name: DW Forklift
Description:
Jsme rodinná firma, která byla založena v roce 1994. Tehdy jsme byli dealerem japonské manipulační techniky, který od počátku poskytoval spolehlivé servisní služby na prodané vozíky. Máme tedy opravdu dlouholeté zkušenosti v této oblasti.

Prodejem manipulační techniky se zabýváme i nadále. Nyní spolupracujeme převážně s čínskými výrobci. Jejich výrobky jsme si předem otestovali a můžeme vám tak ručit za jejich kvalitu. Technologická úroveň, jízdní vlastnosti, produktivita, ergonomie i parametry včetně standardní a doplňková výbavy jsou zcela srovnatelné s prémiovými značkami, které jsou aktivní na českém trhu manipulační techniky. Navíc naše vozíky nabízíme za bezkonkurenčně nízké ceny.

V oblasti skladové techniky spolupracujeme s dnes už velmi renomovanou značkou Noblelift. Předmětná společnost  vyrobila v roce 1996 svůj první paletový vozík a nyní je největším producentem ručních paletových vozíků na světě. Výrobní program zahrnuje bohatou nabídku skladových vozíků s důrazem na Li-ion bateriová řešení.

V oblasti čelních vysokozdvižných vozíků je naším partnerem společnost Maximal Forklifts. Ta byla založena v roce 2005. Současný sortiment společnosti zahrnuje několik typových řad čelních akumulátorových, plynových a dieselových protizávažových vozíků v nosnostech od 1,5 t až po těžké vozy s nosností do 32 t.

Našim zákazníkům nabízíme klasickou obchodní poradenskou činnost, počínaje prvotní konzultací, jaká manipulační technika je pro jejich provoz nejvhodnější.

Na vozíky poskytujeme záruku 12-36 měsíců. Předprodejní servis, včetně uvedení do provozu a zaškolení obsluhy a následný záruční i pozáruční servis provádí náš zkušený servisní partner s celorepublikovou působností.

Oba uvedení čínští výrobci mají v Evropě sklad náhradních dílů a servisní podporu na úrovni prémiových značek. Veškeré vozíky nabízíme jak k prodeji, tak k dlouhodobému pronájmu.

S konkrétní nabídkou předložíme informace o zajímavých referencích. Veškeré nabízené vozíky jsou vyroben

Name: Mission Critical Storage
Description:
Mission Critical Storage (MCS) provides secure, climate-controlled, and heavy-duty equipment storage for industrial, data-center, construction, utility, and infrastructure projects across Chicagoland and Northwest Indiana. Located in Crete, IL, our 85,000 sq. ft. indoor facility and 14 acres of outdoor space are engineered to handle what standard warehouses can’t: oversized, sensitive, and mission-critical equipment that requires protection, organization, and reliable movement.

We store and manage a wide range of assets, including servers, generators, HVAC units, electrical gear, mechanical assemblies, switchgear, skids, machinery, rooftop units, and oversized construction components. Our climate-controlled environment, fire protection, 24/7 security, gated access, and advanced handling capabilities ensure your equipment stays protected, documented, and ready when your project needs it.

What sets MCS apart is our turnkey capability. Because of our strategic partnership with Stevenson Crane Service, Inc., we offer built-in cranes, trucking, rigging, lifting, staging, and final-mile delivery—all coordinated from a single source. Contractors save time, reduce risk, and avoid juggling multiple vendors. Your equipment arrives, is stored safely, and when you’re ready, we handle the delivery, placement, or lift with precision.

Our team supports general contractors, mechanical contractors, data-center builders, electrical and industrial firms, utilities, municipalities, and project managers who need a dependable logistics hub. Whether short-term or long-term,MCS provides secure storage, organized staging, transparent inventory management, and seamless movement of your most important assets.

At MCS, we deliver reliability, flexibility, and peace of mind—allowing your team to stay focused on execution while we manage the storage, safety, and logistics behind the scenes.

If your project demands secure storage, heavy-equipment handling, or turnkey delivery, MCS is ready.

Name: Patronus Services GmbH
Description:
In uns stecken über 60 Jahre Berufserfahrung und mehrere erfolgreiche Unternehmen, daher entstand Patronus-Datenservice wie so oft als Lösung zu einem Problem. Über die Jahrzenhte drohten die Aktenberge uns unter sich zu begraben und nicht nur uns, sondern wir merkten schnell, dass fast jedes Unternehmen mit der Herausforderung der Aktenarchivierung zu kämpfen hat. Daher schloßen wir uns zusammen um die Lösung Patronus-Datenservice ins Leben zu rufen.

www.patronus-datenservice.de

Patronus-Netzwerk

Wir sind Bestandteil des Patronus-Netzwerks. Patronus (lat. Für Schutzherr, Verteidiger) steht für Schutz und Sicherheit und ist gleichzeitig das Leitbild unseres Netzwerkes. Unter dem Schirm von Patronus sammeln sich Firmen und Experten, die alle der Schutz und die Sicherheit ihr anvertrauter Werte eint. Patronus ermöglicht seinen Mitgliedern gemeinsam Synergien zu heben und stellt eine Infrastruktur für den Wissenstransfer zur Verfügung. Darüber hinaus ergänzen sich die Patronus-Mitglieder in Ihren Geschäftsmodellen gewinnbringend, um den Anspruch eines Full-Service Netzwerks für unsere Kunden erfüllen zu können. All diese Netzwerk-Effekte folgen dem Ziel, das Qualitäts- und Leistungsniveau für unsere Kunden stets hoch zu halten und zu verbessern.

Name: Storage Designs Telford Ltd
Description:
Suppliers of storage systems including mezzanine floors, pallet racking, steel shelving and steel partitioning.

Based in Telford, Shropshire, we supply storage systems and solutions not only across Telford and Shropshire but also throughout Staffordshire, West Midlands, North Wales and also across the UK.
With over 50 years combined experience in the Storage and handling industry we can provide you with the best service coupled with the lowest prices, from design through to installation.
We don't employ pushy sales staff, just dedicated engineers who can advise you on the best solution to your storage problems. Whether its a mezzanine floor, new or used pallet racking, steel shelving or steel partitioning.

Mezzanine Floors
 
We design and install mezzanine floors. Raised mezzanine platforms can maximise or available space. Suitable for use as a storage, additional office accommodation, additional production area and shop display.
Mezzanine floors provide a second storey to an existing unit and will save you a substantial amount of money against the cost of moving premises.
 
Pallet Racking

We are specialist suppliers of adjustable pallet racking. Maximise your available warehouse space. Pallet racking can be used traditionally to store pallets directly or beams can be boarded to create hand picking shelf locations.
Our used industrial pallet racking systems are available from many different manufacturers including Link 51, Dexion and Apex. Available from stock on a 3-5 day turnaround.
 
Steel Shelving
 
Our industrial steel shelving is high quality, robust. Our longspan shelving system is ideal for archive storage or hand picking storage locations. Our office shelving is sleek and strong. Ideal for archive document storage within an office environment.
Our longspan shelving features a bolt free, height adjustable system, allowing speedy build and easy relocation.

2. Prostowanie słupów regałowych metodą ROS - to nowatorski system napraw uszkodzonych lub odkształconych słupów magazynowych. Uszkodzone i odkształcone regały magazynowe stanowią duże ryzyko związane z bezpieczeństwem oraz przeładunkiem towarów w każdym magazynie. Wymiana uszkodzonych słupów jest często skomplikowanym, pracochłonnym i kosztownym zadaniem.
System opatentowany przez firmę ROS umożliwia przywrócenie uszkodzonym słupom oryginalnego kształtu:
 - PROSTO - Bez konieczności rozładowania palet i demontażu regału
-  SZYBKO - Bez konieczności przerywania pracy magazynu, naprawa w ciągu 30 min
 - ŁATWO - Bez dodatkowych części zamiennych
 - TANIO - Redukcja kosztów do 80% w porównaniu z wymianą.
Po naprawie słup regału odzyskuje swoją pierwotną nośność i jest zgodny z NORMĄ PN-EN 15635, dajemy 5-letnią gwarancję na każdy naprawiony słup.
Naprawa systemem ROS została sprawdzona w zakresie bezpieczeństwa przez niezależne jednostki certyfikujące m.in. DEKRA ( Niemcy), Instytut Dr Moll ( Niemcy), Uniwersytet Techniczny w Oxfordzie ( Wielka Brytania) oraz Packer Engineering ( USA).

endemos novo e queremos apoiá-lo ao máximo! Só precisamos de saber o seu espaço, o seu produto e o fluxo da produção.

Name: The Fulfilment People
Description:
Welcome to TFP – People-Powered Fulfilment to Unleash your Business

Looking for a logistics partner who takes the hassle out of fulfilment? Need a solution that helps you scale, improve efficiencies, and keep customers happy? Want to speak to real humans who are accountable team and whom you can contact directly? Talk to us!
At TFP, we make logistics seamless, so you can focus on growing your business with confidence.

We understand that fulfilment isn’t why you got into business. Managing warehouses, stock, and deliveries can be a time-consuming distraction. That’s where we come in.

Why Choose TFP?

1 – We Help You Grow

By taking care of the complexities of logistics, we free up your time to focus on what you do best - expanding your business and serving your customers.

2 – We Help You Focus

Picking, packing, and delivering orders is essential, but it shouldn’t consume your energy. Our expert team ensures your products reach customers efficiently, so you can focus on driving innovation.

3 – We Reduce Financial Risk

Investing in warehousing and staff is a big commitment. With TFP, you get a fully scalable solution - no upfront investment, no risk. As you grow, we grow with you.

The TFP Difference – People Power

Great fulfilment is about more than just systems and automation—it’s about people. Our team is made up of intelligent, empowered professionals who work closely with you, making informed decisions to ensure smooth operations. We don’t just move boxes; we build partnerships.

We see ourselves as an extension of your business, handling your products with the same care and attention as you would. Whether you need day-to-day fulfilment, last-minute stock changes, or a bespoke solution, we’re here to help.

For more details on all of our services please see below or call us on +44(0)1273 400092  or email us at info@fulfilmentpeople.co.uk.

Description:
Studiamo forme audaci. Elaboriamo concept creativi

Operiamo nell’ambito del packaging dal 1971, distinguendoci fin da subito come azienda di riferimento in Romagna e nelle Marche. Puntando su uno sviluppo continuo della struttura produttiva e un parco macchine costantemente aggiornato, Stilef ha vissuto un processo di costante crescita che le ha permesso di raggiungere clienti in tutta Italia.

Esperienza, puntualità e varietà nei prodotti offerti sono le caratteristiche che porteranno i grandi marchi ad affidarsi a noi, inizialmente come clienti a cui fornire un servizio efficiente e preciso, poi come partner, con cui siamo integrati a livello informatico così da svolgere test sui prodotti e materiali per verificarne l’idoneità. Tutti i prodotti Stilef sono riciclabili e la nostra azienda è attualmente partner Comieco.

Il nostro obbiettivo primario è quello di realizzare prodotti pienamente conformi ai requisiti contrattuali e in grado di soddisfare in ogni aspetto le esigenze del singolo cliente, che è per noi il punto di riferimento fondamentale per la definizione delle politiche e dei processi aziendali. Il personale è parte integrante del processo di miglioramento della linea produttiva, che viene costantemente aggiornata insieme alla strumentazione e alle politiche interne. Abbiamo messo in atto, a tutti i livelli, procedure di esecuzione e verifica della produzione tali da influenzare positivamente il prodotto finito.

At Direct Pallet Racking, we are dedicated to transforming warehouses with innovative and efficient storage solutions. With over 15 years of experience in the industry, we specialize in designing and implementing storage systems that optimize space, enhance operations, and improve safety.

Our Products and Services:

Pallet Racking Systems: Tailored to meet the unique needs of your warehouse, our pallet racking solutions maximize storage capacity and streamline operations.

Cantilever Racks: Ideal for storing long and bulky items, our cantilever racks offer flexibility and easy access.

Safety Rail: Ensure the safety of your team with our robust safety rail systems, designed to prevent accidents and improve workflow.

Shelving: From heavy-duty to light-duty shelving, we provide versatile options to organize and store a variety of items.

Dock Levelers & Truck Restraints: Enhance the efficiency and safety of your loading and unloading processes with our dock levelers and truck restraints.

Our core service lines — XactStock and XactData — are designed to be practical and system-aware:

XactStock focuses on inventory behavior, bin velocity, and stock positioning to surface where excess, shortages, and risk actually originate

XactData turns fragmented operational data into trusted, usable signals teams can act on with confidence

INVEX does not replace existing systems. We help teams understand what their systems are already telling them — and act before issues turn into fire drills.

Name: Racing Green Car Storage
Description:
Racing Green Car Storage is the world's first carbon-conscious car storage facility. 

Set in a secluded, entirely private location, we include carbon-balancing for every car placed with us, and our purpose-designed, dehumidified storage facility is solar-powered, as we raise standards and improve environmental impact in the car storage industry. 

Our service is all-inclusive, with vehicle valeting, a custom soft-stretch car cover, battery smart charger and vehicle health checks all included. It also includes insurance for all vehicles, and complimentary collection of each car (see terms) using our Brian James Race Transporter 6 enclosed trailer.

We also offer a complete concierge service for vehicle owners, taking the practical strain out of vehicle ownership, and offer management of larger collections.

We are located near Smarden in Kent, and serve London and the South East and further afield, and are convenient for the Channel Tunnel. Our facility offers electric car charging for visitors, ample parking, and is scaled for HGV car transporters with 7-metre high load bay doors.

Founded by James Mills, a motoring journalist of 30-plus years, and Oliver Hagger, a car collector and entrepreneur with a background in shipbroking, Racing Green Car Storage is redefining collector car storage.

Name: Active Industrial Fire Protection LLC
Description:
Active Industrial Fire Protection LLC is a full service fire code consulting firm specializing in High Piled Combustible and Hazardous Materials Storage occupancies.  Our services include fire code consulting, fire protection systems design, warehouse layout and design, plans development and project management, and material handling sales and services.

What sets Active Industrial Fire Protection apart is our ability to work alongside the participants in a warehouse lease transaction seamlessly in order to provide a successful project resulting in the delivery of a valid certificate of occupancy or certificate of compliance.

We work with end users, professional service providers such as architects and MEPs, industrial tenant rep and landlord brokers, and building owners to bridge the gaps in communication between the business community, brokerage community, building department, and fire marshal's office.  Having experience in all of these areas allows us to accomplish projects that other firms cannot.

Therefore, if you are an end user looking to permit your warehouse, and architect looking to assist your client, or an broker representative looking to qualify your building, we can help.  We can provide as little as a code language report to as much as a full turnkey project including plans development, submittals, approvals, and inspections.  If you are a sprinkler contractor we can provide sprinkler and alarm designs for you.

If you are involved in a warehouse lease transaction, give us a call today and find out how we can help.  Thank you, and we look forward to serving you.

Designed to meet diverse storage needs, Aakash Warehouses features seven well-structured blocks, each equipped with high asbestos roofing, enhanced ventilation, and a robust stacking capability of up to 16 feet.

Key Features:

Prime Location: Easily accessible from major highways, ensuring efficient logistics and transportation.

Advanced Infrastructure: High truss heights of up to 11 meters, asbestos roofing, and air inlets/outlets to maintain optimal storage conditions.

Security and Accessibility: Single entry gate, 6-foot boundary wall with additional barbed wire fencing, and parallel shutters for each block.

Comprehensive Facilities: On-site offices, guest house, 24-hour water supply, express power availability, and a dedicated firefighting system.

Customization and Compliance: WDRA accreditation and custom clearance services available upon request, tailored to meet specific client requirements.

At Aakash Warehouses, we are committed to providing secure, efficient, and adaptable storage solutions to support your business growth. Contact us to learn more about leasing options and how we can partner in your success.

Name: Chin's Import Export Co., Inc. 陳氏出入口有限公司
Description:
In 1939, with little capital investment, Leland H. Chin build and started the Pagoda Restaurant in Portland, Oregon.   In 1946, Leland sold the Pagoda Restaurant for $16,000, and used the money to purchase an old house at the corner of NE 42nd and Broadway.  Two years later in 1948, he tore down the building in order to construct a new commercial building, which would be the home to Chin’s Kitchen Restaurant and Chin’s Import Export Co., Inc. (Chin’s).

Chin’s Kitchen was sold in the 1970’s, and Chin’s relocated to a 10,000 square foot building in NW Portland, purchased by Fred & Betty Jean Lee.  The business then relocated to a 15,000 square food facility on Swan Island for seven years, before a new building was constructed in 2008 in the Port of Portland’s Rivergate Industrial Park in North Portland.  The new facility has enabled Chin’s close proximity to the Port’s Terminal 6 container facility and (3) container transfer terminals, as well as 20,000 square foot office warehouse complex.  The Rivergate warehouse facility has enabled Chin’s to stock over 2,000 SKU’s (dry, refrigerated, and frozen), for distribution to its customers throughout the Pacific Northwest region.

Oman aspires to leverage its infrastructure development to become one of the world's top ten logistics  hubs  by  2040  and  is  witnessing  a  rapid  evolution  and  expansion  of  its  e-commerce market, primary retail markets and cargo scalability capacities.
WarehouseTech  Oman  2025  (WTO25)  is  an  innovative  event  at  the  forefront  of revolutionizing  warehousing  practices  and  technologies  in  the  Sultanate.  This purpose-driven conference aims to discover the significance of warehouse solutions and technologies in enhancing efficiency, inventory management, order fulfillment, reducing  costs,  optimizing  data  analytics,  and  ultimately  elevating  customer satisfaction, accuracy, scalability, and safety. 
WarehouseTech Oman 2025 aims to bring together industry visionaries, technology innovators, logistics, warehousing & supply chain leaders for a dynamic exchange of ideas and insights that are reshaping the future of warehousing. 
From cutting-edge technologies such as Robotics, Drones, and Digital Warehousing, to  the  transformative  impact  of  Industry  4.0,  the  Internet  of  Things  (IoT),  AI, Automation, Cloud Computing, Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), and Data Analytics, WarehouseTech Oman 2025 aims to stand as the epicenter of innovation and  serve  as  the  ultimate  platform  to  delve  into  the  very  latest  trends  propelling warehousing into the digital age.

Name: DAY & MEYER, MURRAY & YOUNG CORP.
Description:
Pioneering technology, a century of experience & perfect manners

When peace of mind is your most precious possession, you want a moving company that will baby your Baby Grand, and provide you with a peaceful night's sleep.

Welcome to Day & Meyer, Murray & Young Corp, where we offer unique solutions to your moving and storage needs.

Our fifteen story fireproof warehouse is conveniently located the Upper East Side of Manhattan. Constructed in 1927, it was designed by the architectural firm of Moores & Dunford whose Deco masterpiece from that same year was the original Queen's Quay in Toronto. It's a beautiful building; come see for yourself.

But what's interesting, and not so readily apparent, is that it was designed to accommodate our exclusive Portovault storage system: steel vaults which travel by truck and are conveyed to racks in our warehouse, to minimize handling and afford the utmost in owner control. (Think Mini Storage for Monets.)

The DMMY Portovault system also predates containerization by decades-which is pretty amazing when you consider that Day & Meyer started with a horse and cart!

Today, the Day & Meyer, Murray & Young Corp. building remains the most efficient warehouse in existence for the specialized storage of art and other valuable household effects.

And Portovault is not the whole story, either. We offer a complete range of services: moving, packing, shipping, installations, specialized storage for artwork and rugs, viewing areas, digital photo inventory.

Now, under the third generation of family leadership Day & Meyer still prides itself on the kind of courteous attention you thought went out with the horse and cart.

Name: ROS Guatemala
Description:
ROS Guatemala inicia operaciones en Octubre 2018. Representando a ROS Internacional presente en 26 países de Europa y América desde 2004.

Ofrecemos el servicio de mantenimiento de Racks de paletización con un proceso probado y certificado por varias instituciones internacionales como DEKRA, Dr Möll Institute of Engineering, PACKER Engineering Inc., y en cumplimiento de las normas DIN EN 15.635 (Europea), ANSI M16.1 (EEUU).

Brindamos un servicio de calidad y de amplios beneficios para la industria del almacenaje en Guatemala.

Proceso inventado en Holanda en el año 2004. Permite reparar puntales sin necesidad de mover la mercancía de su lugar. 

Sin mantenimiento los daños se acumulan. Puntales dañados pierden gran parte de su capacidad de carga y resistencia . Daños acumulados debilitan todo el conjunto de racks y ponen en peligro a empleados y mercadería.
Sólo los Racks en buen estado cumplen con las internacionales de seguridad.

Podemos reparar daños acumulados y hacer mantenimiento preventivo de sus Racks a bajo costo y sin mayor intervención en su operación logística.


Duerma tranquilo sabiendo que sus Racks cumplen con las normas de seguridad.

Name: BOXIT Sweden
Description:
BOXIT är ett dansk- och familjeägt företag med rötter i norra Danmark. Företaget har hyrt ut lagringsutrymmen sedan 2003 och cirka 50.000 containrar sedan 2009. 

Vårt koncept hos BOXIT uppstod genom inspiration från USA och deras principer för självförvaring. Det har visat sig vara en bra utgångspunkt, då vi ända sedan BOXIT grundades har noterat ett växande intresse för och efterfrågan på förvaringslösningar. Vi är nu stolta över att vara marknadsledande i Danmark inom uthyrning av förvaringslösningar för privatpersoner och företagskunder. 

Genom lanseringen av BOXIT-containern 2009 utökades vårt produktsortiment till att även omfatta uthyrning av containrar för privatpersoner och företagskunder. Vi har nu över 7.000 containrar i vår flotta och 42 olika varianter. Här ingår standardcontainrar, isolerade containrar, kyl-/fryscontainrar, containrar med sidodörrar och många fler. Containerflottan består av förhållandevis nya containrar som byts ut regelbundet. På så sätt framstår de alltid som rena och snygga för våra kunder. 

I vårt produktsortiment ingår även vår populära Flyttbox som verkligen har blivit en stor favorit hos danskarna. Flyttbox är en flyttcontainer som gör det enkelt och flexibelt att flytta, eftersom den kan anpassas efter kundernas eget tempo och schema. 

Vid sidan om standardcontainrar tillverkar vi också skräddarsydda containerlösningar i nära samarbete med våra kunder, ända från idéfasen och tills den färdiga lösningen står redo att användas. 

För att möta efterfrågan i Danmark och Sverige har vi 7 BOXIT-lastbilar som i största möjliga utsträckning levererar och hämtar containrar från våra kunder. Därigenom kan vi planera logistiken för våra egna körningar och vara flexibla i förhållande till kundernas behov. 

Vi brinner för att ge våra kunder en bra, snabb och flexibel service – och satsar varje dag på att göra den lite bättre än dagen innan.

Name: Oracle
Description:
Las Vegas School Selection of glass Criteria
Some important considerations for choosing a school include: 
Consider the characteristics of available facilities such as the size of the studio, different rooms for working with hot and cold glass and flame working rooms to select the best space for you. 
Look for programs that emphasize professional development to help secure a job after graduation. 
Students may consider programs with experienced faculty members to learn the best techniques and tips of the trade. 
The financial differences between a public and private art school may be something a future student needs to consider and prepare for. 
Glassblowing Courses
Glassblowing for the scientific field is often offered as a single course through a school's chemistry department. Many universities have a glassblowing facility on campus where students learn to fabricate a variety of scientific apparatuses, including distillation equipment, laser tubes and condensers. Alternatively, some community colleges offer individual courses in glassblowing for aesthetic purposes in which students are introduced to the techniques of heating and manipulating glass. 
Bachelor of Fine Arts in Glass
Bachelor's degree programs cover a variety of uses for glass. Students may check the courses available to ensure a glassblowing course is included in a program's curriculum. In the final year, students typically work to develop a coherent body of work. Graduates may work as artists, designers, business owners and educators or in art galleries. 
Master of Fine Arts in Glass
Those in Master of Fine glass with programs u can expect to engage in artistic critique and develop a portfolio. Graduate students might also have the opportunity to experience professional development through assistantships. Courses include studios in which students can develop their hands on  senses and seminars in which students learn design forms and review the works of other artists.

Nella progettazione offre i massimi standard di sicurezza e garanzia che esistono sul mercato.
In un mondo dove solo ciò che è nuovo sembra essere la soluzione, noi pensiamo invece che “Solo chi ha una storia può avere un futuro”.
Non a caso, questi ultimi trent’anni raccontano di evoluzioni e trasformazioni profonde che ci hanno portato, oggi, a proporci sul mercato come partner a 360°. L’evoluzione delle esigenze dei clienti da una parte e le normative sempre più pressanti dall’altra, ci hanno portato ad un’altissima specializzazione che mettiamo al servizio dei clienti dalla progettazione alla manutenzione di tutte le soluzioni proposte.
Oggi le attività di SOTEA SISTEM comprendono la distribuzione e commercializzazione di un’ampia gamma di prodotti, destinati a rendere sicuro e funzionale ogni spazio coprendo la globalità della domanda del mercato dello stoccaggio industriale, dell’automazione e della movimentazione interna di merci.

Name: Erfa Inventar A/S
Description:
Er din virksomhed klar til at optimere lageret og skabe orden med kvalitetsstålreoler?  

Erfa Inventar er en dansk produktionsvirksomhed der specialiserer sig i reolssystemer. Vi eksperter i at forvandle dine lager- og opbevaringsbehov til en effektiv og velfungerende løsning.

Forestil dig dette:

Et lager, hvor hver eneste kvadratmeter udnyttes optimalt, takket være robuste og holdbare stålreoler, der ikke blot organiserer dine varer, men også skaber overblik og øger effektiviteten.

Selv i lagerstyring kan udfordringer opstå:

 Rod og uorden på lageret, der gør det svært at finde det nødvendige udstyr eller produkter.
 Ineffektiv udnyttelse af pladsen, der kan føre til spild og unødvendige omkostninger.
 Problemer med at finde en løsning, der både er fleksibel og tilpasset præcis dine behov.

Her træder Erfa Inventar ind:

 Optimér dit lager med vores kvalitetsstålreoler, designet til at skabe orden og forbedre arbejdsflowet.
 Uanset om det er til butik, bilindretning, værksted eller lager, kan vi levere løsninger, der matcher dine behov.
 Fra rådgivning til levering – vi er med dig hele vejen.

Det er ret simpelt:

Trin 1: Gør dig nogle overvejsler om dine behov. Uanset om det er til indretning af lager, værksted, varerbilen eller kontor, så har vi en løsning. Hvad skal du bruge reolerne stil?

Trin 2: Kontakt vores erfarne team og få skræddersyet en reolløsning, der passer perfekt til din virksomhed.

Trin 3: Vi sørger for leveringen, så du hurtigt kan komme i gang med at bruge dine nye stålreoler.


Er du klar til at få mere ud af dit lager med Erfa Inventars stålreoler? 

Lad os vise dig, hvordan vi kan hjælpe med at skabe orden og effektivitet i din virksomhed.

 Skriv til os på info@erfainventar.dk  
 Ring til os på +45 44 94 10 00
 Se mere på www.erfainventar.dk

Description:
A Cubico Self Storage & CoWorking é uma empresa localizada em Atibaia, SP, de fácil acesso - entre as Rodovias Fernão Dias e a Dom Pedro. Nossos contratos são mensais, sem taxa de adesão ou rescisão* – são flexíveis e personalizados. 

Nossas instalações ocupam 5 mil m2, com área construída de quase 2 mil m2. É seguro - possuímos sistema de vigilância 24hs e monitoramento por câmeras realizado por empresa especializada. É acessível - sem escadas. Temos estacionamento para mais de 40 veículos. Escritório com recepção, copa e um saboroso café feito com muito carinho. Usamos canecas e copos metálicos – defendemos a natureza!

Nosso objetivo é facilitar a vida das pessoas, seja ao guardar seus pertences ou oferecendo a micro e pequenos empresários a oportunidade de fortalecer a imagem da sua empresa e crescer com baixo custo e segurança.

A Cubico Self Storage oferece comodidade e facilidade de acesso para quem precisa guardar estoques, arquivos, equipamentos e até objetos pessoais que funciona como uma extensão da sua casa ou do seu negócio. É indispensável na redução de custos seja da sua casa ou da sua empresa.

Já no Espaço Criativo Cubico Coworking, temos mesas compartilhadas (Hot Desk). Sala de reuniões. Wi-fi e internet de alta velocidade. Estrutura de escritório: scanner, impressora e etc. Wi-fi.

O Escritório Virtual é um serviço da Cubico que oferece endereço comercial e fiscal - excelente para profissionalizar a imagem da sua empresa com seus clientes, gestão de correspondência e todo o conforto de um escritório sem precisar sair de sua casa. Também enviamos e recebemos encomendas.

A Caixa Postal (Mailbox) é um serviço do Escritório Virtual. Inclui caixa postal, endereço comercial e notificação por WhatsApp quando chegam suas correspondências e/ou pacotes. É ideal para quem deseja muita privacidade.

Our Integrated Workplace Solutions provide comprehensive support for businesses, including relocation management, space and facilities optimization, technology solutions, and asset and cost management. We also offer White Glove Interior Designer Solutions, providing meticulous care and precision for high-end furnishings and design projects. 

Spirit Movers is the only mission-driven relocation company in the area, dedicated to developing and empowering its people to be salt and light in the world and to each other using relocation, logistics, and integrated workplace solutions as it's platform. We partner with local churches and charities, champion sustainable practices, and believe in making every move a positive impact on our community. 

Mission: We move more than just belongings. We move people; by serving our clients, stewarding our resources, and leading our teams with a GREATER purpose.

Name: Sodus Cold Storage Co., Inc.
Description:
Sodus Cold Storage, Co., Inc. was established in 1914 by a group of local farmers and businessmen whose main goal was to provide the area growers with a warehouse to store their produce for orderly marketing. It was also built to provide an icing station so that produce could be loaded in rail cars for shipment to New York City and other major eastern markets.

1930 brought Sodus Cold Storage into the "Frozen Food Age" with its first freezer room. In 1963, Sodus Cold Storage acquired its second facility in nearby North Rose, New York. This gave Sodus Cold Storage a controlled atmosphere capability, which it had not previously had.

As the years passed, and market demand continued to grow for freezers, the most up to date insulators and refrigeration equipment was installed. This evolutionary updating of equipment was and continues to be, a major commitment to present management.

Our team members are happy to offer professional and confidential advice based on 25 years local experience in the industry. We've been doing this longer than any other storage company in this area. We understand the different circumstances which create the need for storage and we’re here to help.

Four warehouses under operating  :

Transportation, Inspection, Detection, Survey Services, Financial Advisory, Customs Brokerage, Legal Advising, and all other Logistic Services.

Statesboro Facility

At Claxton Cold Storage we are committed to our customers. Our goal is to provide the customer with accurate, reliable refrigerated warehousing service in the most professional way possible.

We value our relationship with our employees, business associates, suppliers, and customers. We want to work with our customers and support their needs on a one-to-one level to provide service beyond all expectations.

Claxton Cold Storage is currently expanding with the introduction of another secondary cold storage location in Statesboro, Georgia 

Our main facility in Claxton, Georgia offers 100,000 square feet of -10 degree F freezer space with ammonia refrigeration. And a total of 2 million cubic feet of cold storage space. Freezer areas are computer controlled and monitored to ensure reliability, and all merchandise is racked to protect stored products.

In addition to a state of the art computerized refrigeration system, Claxton Cold Storage offers equipment for bulk movement and pallet shuttle service, as well as blast capacity for quick-freezing. Inventory control is computerized to guarantee accuracy and sent out to customers on a daily basis. The remaining 15,000 square feet of the building houses a truck dock, machine room, battery charging area and offices.

Our expansion into Statesboro, Georgia includes 35,000 square feet of frozen storage and 45,000 square feet of chill storage.

At Vanguard, customer service excellence isn't merely a goal; it's our unwavering standard.

In fact, just visiting a Vanguard store can be an experience in itself.

Our light, clean, and spacious lobbies provide a place for visitors to enjoy a complimentary hot drink - and also marvel at the vintage airplanes that have been lovingly restored hanging in our flagship stores.

Our friendly, professional on-site team is always on hand to make you feel like one of the Vanguard family. But don't just take our word for it; check out our exemplary Google reviews to see how Vanguard consistently exceeds customer expectations.

Pallet racking: Our steel pallet racks will maximize your organization’s storage density and allow workers to retrieve items efficiently, reducing operational costs. In addition to racking for pallets and boxes, we also offer specialized keg racks, carton flow racks, carpet racks and more.

Mezzanines: By turning air space into usable floor space, mezzanines can increase your business’s storage, manufacturing or office area by up to 100%. The team at US Industrial Corp can complete mezzanine installation quickly, and you can even move or expand the structure as your business needs change.

Modular buildings: Modular offices, booths and clean rooms are cost-effective and relatively simple to construct. We make our modular buildings with 3-inch-thick walls and a range of surface finishes.

We also offer other storage solutions and accessories, including cantilever racks for storing long or awkwardly shaped products and wire partitions for increasing security. With new and used options, you can get the durable and safe storage equipment you need at an affordable price.

Our state-of-the-art warehouse and office are located in Bhiwandi, equipped with modern communication tools, the latest hardware, and network facilities to ensure seamless office automation. Our operations are supported by a diverse fleet of vehicles tailored to meet the specific needs of our clients and the market. We have established partnerships with leading courier and transport companies to ensure accurate, timely, and faster deliveries across Maharashtra, achieving delivery times within 36 to 48 hours. We commit to 24-hour delivery, even to the remotest corners of the state, while adhering to strict road safety norms.

We follow rigorous good warehousing practices, including systematic storage, a G+2 racking system, and proper labeling. Our cleaning procedures for premises and equipment are in line with sanitation program SOPs. We maintain comprehensive records to ensure ongoing quality, supported by active protective measures such as fire detection devices, fire extinguishers, and fire hydrants.

At VM Care & Wellness we deliver top-tier C&F and warehousing services with superior accuracy and customer satisfaction.

PicknPacker is a tech-enabled, people-first fulfilment service provider specializing in warehouse operations. Nossos diferentes Galpões estão estruturados para receber não somente pequenas cargas (alimentícia, higiene, limpeza), máquinas e peças especiais como também cargas líquidas e carga químicas/perigosas.

Para atender as necessidades específicas na logística de cada cliente, estamos a disposição para desenvolver estudos e disponibilizar as operações que se façam necessárias. Entre elas podemos destacar:

– Recebimentos.
– Gerenciamento de estoques.
– Picking ( separação e montagem de pedidos ).
– Distribuição/Gestão de Frete.
– Etiquetagem de nacionalização do produto.
– Re-embalagem.
– Estufagem de Containers de todos os tipos ( Dry, Flat Rack, Open Top e Reefers).
– Movimentação de cargas perigosas e sua armazenagem.
– Movimentação de cargas isotérmicas.
– Armazenagem de acordo com os critérios do cliente (LIFO/FIFO)
– Estudos e planejamento de logística.
– Execuções de operações logísticas externas em instalações dos clientes (in house).
– Cross Docking

Name: Global Distribution Center LLC
Description:
Originally developed by Hunts for the manufacturing of tomato products, 29180 Glenwood in Perrysburg, OH was acquired in 2008 to become the Global Distribution Center. Ideally located in NW Ohio in close proximity to major highways and thoroughfares including the I75, I80/I90 (Ohio Turnpike), and 795 triangle, there are more than 460,000 employees within a 1 hour drive. Additionally, 60% of the US population and 38% of the Canadian population are within a 1-day delivery distance.

The property has 800,000 SF of existing food grade quality dry storage space and capacity for up to 430,000 SF of build-to-suit space with plenty of parking of both trailers and cars. Capable of meeting even the most demanding client’s utility needs, the site has 10+ MGW of power, water capacity of 6.8 MGD and access to Columbia Gas of Ohio natural gas pipeline.

Competitively priced below market, the Global Distribution Center is flexible and willing to work with clients on either a short-term or long-term basis.

The Global Distribution Center also has the ability to provide value-added warehouse services to augment a client’s warehouse workforce or to manage the entire operation on the client’s behalf. We pride ourselves in adhering to the following core values:

• Accountability
• Reliability
• Honesty & Integrity
• Ecologically Responsible
• Committed to Community
Global Distribution Center’s multiple warehousing services in Perrysburg, Ohio provide fast, reliable, and accurate services. The strategic location and size of our storage space allows for competitive pricing on leased square footage while providing ideal space to store products without a hassle. Our value add warehousing services reduce the cost-per-unit within your supply chain operations and allow for flexing of capacity to respond to peak and off peak demands. We are positioned to augment a client’s warehouse workforce or to manage the entire operation on the client’s behalf.

Espacios diáfanos, luminosos y escrupulósamente limpios. Todas las luces van activadas por sensores de presencia, lo que garantiza calidad para el cliente y un ahorro energético importante.

4. Excelencia en el servicio al cliente: En Bilbox todas las necesidades de espacio y productos deribados quedan totalmente cubiertas, con servicios adicionales coomo son: sala de reuniones, venta de material específico para mudanzas; Escaneo y envío urgente de documentos; Recepción y envío de mercancías con aviso expreso por e-mail; Custodia de llaves; Almacenamiento y destrucción de archivos, y mucho más.

Criada em 2007, a EXTREME chegou inicialmente para atender os clientes da ARGOS GLOBAL PARTNER SERVICES , a primeira empresa do grupo ARGOS, estabelecida em 1998 especialista em soluções completas para supply chain.

Por desenvolver projetos diferenciados, consistentes e eficientes a ARGOS rapidamente conquistou o mercado sendo reconhecida como um parceiro comercial de qualidade, permitindo-a expandir sua atuação em decorrência das demandas de seus clientes.

Justamente em 2007, ao transferir a matriz da ARGOS de São Paulo para Guarulhos nasceu a EXTREME Operações Logísticas oferecendo a possibilidade ao grupo de iniciar sua operação própria de armazenagem.

A EXTREME também cresceu e atualmente é uma unidade de negócio distinta , com identidade própria, que desenvolve variados serviços de armazenagem, manuseio, picking, pack, transporte, içamento, logística in house e distribuição.

Por primar pela qualidade de seus serviços a EXTREME conta com profissionais especializados , somando sua experiência à da ARGOS, a EXTREME tornou-se um operador logístico realmente diferenciado.

O trabalho conjunto da Área Operacional com o Departamento de Qualidade faz com que a EXTREME busque melhorias continuas e excelência nos serviços prestados desenvolvendo fluxos de processos, monitorando os resultados através de KPI’s e elaborando procedimentos voltados à operação, segurança, transporte, atendimento e vendas.

Ao longo dos últimos anos a EXTREME tem feito investimentos constantes em infraestrutura como: armazéns, equipamentos de movimentação, sistemas ERP e WMS, coletores de dados, rede wifi, segurança, treinamento e recursos humanos sempre com o objetivo de atender seus clientes prestando um serviço reconhecidamente superior.

Name: National Food Reserve Agency (NFRA) Malawi
Description:
The National Food Reserve Agency (NFRA) was established by the Malawi Government in 1999 as a Trust to assume the responsibility for the management of the nation's Strategic Food Reserve (SFR). In 2000, the NFRA's Trust Deed was amended to include the stabilisation of prices and the grain market, as well as being responsible for the importation and exportation of grain on behalf of the government.

The agency’s main mandate is the management and maintenance of the strategic food reserves by holding ready resources in the form of physical grain stocks and funds necessary for use through normal marketing channels to help reduce the impact of the failure of the private sector to respond to market signals and make adequate provisions to satisfy national requirements of grain.

ООО «ФАБС Логистик» является производителем высокотехнологичных систем управления технологическими процессами с собственными производственными площадями и штатом высококвалифицированных инженеров-конструкторов и монтажников.

Накопленный опыт позволяет предлагать нашим клиентам продукцию высокого качества и уникальные технические и технологические решения самого высокого уровня в области автоматизации складов.

Высокое качество конечной продукции невозможно без высокого качества комплектующих. Поэтому мы очень внимательно подходим к определению круга наших поставщиков и работаем только с лучшими в своей области. Это позволяет нам гарантировать нашим Клиентам безотказную работу поставляемого оборудования в течение многих лет.

ООО «ФАБС Логистик» является крупным системным интегратором при строительстве складов и выполняет функции Генерального подрядчика при реализации комплексных складских проектов. Компания так же является поставщиком высококачественного импортного складского оборудования на российский рынок.

Мы можем предложить нашим клиентам широкий набор стандартных решений для самых различных отраслей, например, для дистрибуции фармацевтических, косметических, продовольственных товаров и т. д.

Мы имеем высококвалифицированный коллектив специалистов и сотрудничаем с ведущими мировыми компаниями, что позволяет предлагать лучшие решения и оборудование в каждом конкретном случае.

Мы благодарим Вас за доверие, оказанное нашей компании и постараемся приложить все свои силы и опыт для помощи Вам.

Od ponad 15 lat obsługujemy oraz wspieramy ukraiński biznes w zakresie międzynarodowego obrotu towarowego. Doskonale znamy specyfikę oraz złożoność transakcji dokonywanych przez ukraińskie przedsiębiorstwa. Firma zlokalizowana jest w Chełmie, 20 km od przejścia granicznego Dorohusk-Jagodzin. Dzięki temu nasze magazyny mają idealną lokalizację jako punkt dla zbierania, sortowania, przeładunku oraz dystrybucji towarów, które są importowane lub eksportowane z Ukrainy.

Assa Sp. z o.o. z powodzeniem działa od 2012 r.  Powstała na bazie wieloletnich doświadczeń w zakresie międzynarodowego obrotu towarowego. Od momentu powstania firmy podstawą działalności są usługi celne, które są stale rozwijane. Niewątpliwie dużym krokiem w budowaniu pozytywnego wizerunku firmy w relacjach biznesowych było otrzymanie w 2016 roku statusu AEO. Dzięki niemu nasi klienci mogą korzystać z szeregu ułatwień, co zwiększyło szybkość oraz efektywność przepływu towarów. Od 2017 roku specjalizujemy się w przeładunkach, magazynowaniu oraz dystrybucji miodu w beczkach. W 2018 roku planujemy budowę nowoczesnego centrum logistycznego wysokiego składowania klasy A o powierzchni 5000 m², wyposażonego w nowoczesny sprzęt i technologie.

Naszą działalność opieramy na solidnych podstawach i rzetelnych relacjach z naszymi klientami.  Jesteśmy dla nich prawdziwym partnerem w biznesie.

Maricell: https://www.maricell.it/en/

Name: Roller Industries // Tools that Move Pallet Rack & Shelving
Description:
Roller Industries is the leading manufacturer of storage system moving tools.  With several patented products, Roller Industries is focused creating storage efficiency through tools that allow shelving, racks and production work areas mobile in minutes.  For nearly 50 years, industrial storage has been static and has caused businesses to work around their current storage layout.  By allowing storage to be dynamic, businesses can redesign their existing storage layout in minutes.  Traditional methods of moving storage racks and shelves has been to remove the product/inventory, disassemble, reassemble in a new location and restock the shelves.  The American made products from Roller Industries allow shelving and racks to be moved while fully assembled and, in most cases, without unloading the shelves saving valuable time and with minimal disruption to your work flow.

Roller Industries proprietary products work on rivet (boltless) shelving, most pallet racks, and are used in many commercial facilities to move assembly stations.  

In 2008, co-founders Clay and Jay Ridley had a need to redesign their warehouse layout to make room for a new assembly line one of their entrepreneurial ventures.  When told the shelves of their Rivetier boltless shelving would have to be emptied and the shelving disassembled, they search for an easier, quicker and less disruptive way to move the shelving.  As it turns out, they had to create a solution themselves and the rest is our history.

Name: Collision Awareness
Description:
At Collision Awareness, we help businesses protect their people, equipment, and operations with innovative, motion-activated safety systems designed for today’s fast-paced industrial environments.

Our products create safer workplaces by detecting movement and providing real-time visual alerts in critical areas where pedestrian and forklift traffic intersect. Whether at blind corners, busy aisleways, overhead doors, or loading docks, Collision Awareness products help prevent accidents before they happen, reducing downtime, injuries, and liability while increasing workplace safety.

What We Offer:
• Motion-Activated Safety Systems for warehouses and industrial facilities
• Forklift & Pedestrian Warning Sensors
• Overhead Door Monitors
• Rack and Wall-Mounted Traffic Alert Units
• Height warning monitors
• Custom Safety Solutions to fit unique facility needs upon request

Why Collision Awareness?
• Proactive accident prevention, not just response
• Bright LED visual warnings with optional addons for audible alarms and additional lights
• Easy-to-install, plug-and-play products
• Designed to support OSHA workplace safety standards and best safety practices

Trusted by safety managers, warehouse operators, and facility directors across North America with over 18,000 units in use

Our Mission:
To create safer work environments by providing smart, reliable, and practical safety alert solutions that give workers time to react and avoid collisions.

Industries We Serve:
• Warehousing & Distribution
• Manufacturing
• Logistics & Supply Chain Operations
• Industrial Transportation Facilities

From small warehouses to large-scale distribution centers, we are proud to partner with companies that prioritize the safety of their teams and the efficiency of their operations.

Interested in seeing how Collision Awareness can help improve your facility’s safety? Our team is always ready to assist!

This page features news and promotions by UNEC the Hyster dealer in Malta

Hyster offers a comprehensive range of tough and intelligently designed material handling equipment. From container handlers, to nearly every type and size of forklift truck, and warehousing equipment - more than 140 models are available.

In the 1920s, Hyster started as a manufacturer of lifting machines used in the rigorous logging industry. A few years later, the first forklift trucks were invented, and the Hyster brand quickly gained its reputation for rugged quality. Today, that same pioneering, forward-thinking trajectory is taking Hyster into exciting new territory. Its products continue to reduce the cost of ownership, boost productivity and enhance the comfort of businesses from multiple industries. Every truck made — whether powered by LPG, diesel, lithium-ion, or lead-acid batteries — is purpose-built to excel in its application.

The Hyster reputation for engineering and manufacturing robust, reliable lift trucks is reinforced by a dynamic, global network of carefully chosen dealers, each with the same goal of keeping operations moving and costs under control. Worldwide presence also leads to consistent quality, streamlined processes, greater buying power and more configurations to meet client needs and preferences. Choose Hyster and gain a strong partner with the resources and experience to support operations, regardless of size and location.

Name: Galati Free Trade Zone - Zona Libera Galati
Description:
The Galati Free Zone is a precisely delimited territory in which investors benefit from customs and fiscal facilities for their activities.

Potential investors in the Galati Free Zone can benefit from a series of advantages:
With an area of about 80 ha of land, The Free Trade Zone is practically the only true multi-modal center in the South-East of Romania that offers access to multiple communication ways & utilities:
•	direct connection to the European road transport network European Road E87
•	direct connection to railway transport (the only Free Zone that offers connection to the railway with a wide gauge of Russian type as well as with a European gauge). In the western vicinity of the Galati Free Zone - there is the railway station Gara Larga - where the junction between the Russian wide railway and the European railway is made.
•	naval transport on the Danube (both for river ships and for sea ships) with free access to 3 river-sea berths. The depth in the own berths of the Galati Free Zone is between 4m at 5 m from the quay and 9 m at 15 m from the quay - the depths can vary depending on the elevations of the Danube waters.
•	direct access to high power connection
•	direct access to the natural gas network
•	direct access to running water

- The Galati Free Zone offers a geo-strategic advantage, being at the eastern border of the European Union, at only 7 kilometers from Rep. Moldova and Ukraine.
- Zona Galati Free Zone can offer compact land for any type of investment project.
- Customs taxes and VAT are exempt from payment for goods introduced in the Galati Free Zone for processing, storage or sale between Free Zone residents.
- Transit of goods between free zones is also duty free.
- Access to skilled labor and low costs.
- In the Free Zone of Galati, land is offered for concession for periods of up to 49 years with the possibility of extension for another 25 years.
- Financial operations are made in freely convertible currency.

Name: Pallet Rack Inspection BC
Description:
Pallet Rack Inspection BC was founded by Greg Hubbert and Kevin Van Neck in November 2017, born out of a need for qualified pallet rack inspections in Western Canada.

In early 2017, WorkSafeBC endeavoured to formulate new pallet rack regulation. To do so, they solicited the help of rack manufacturers, local retailers, and installers. Together, with the expertise of the industry, WorkSafeBC drafted the regulation which will take effect January 1, 2018.

Currently, the existing players in the racking industry do not have the means or motivation to fulfil inspection services. Alternatively, inspections are the specialization and sole focus of Pallet Rack Inspection BC. PRIBC is singularly dedicated to the safety element of storage equipment in the warehouse market.

Greg and Kevin bring 15 years combined experience in warehouse storage and rack sales. Driven by a passion for designing creative and intelligent storage solutions, they have served clients in the automotive, academic, medical, and manufacturing industries.

Greg and Kevin’s experience building warehouse storage from the ground-up means they are uniquely qualified to inspect existing pallet racking for damage, strain, and improper installation.

PRIBC is an all-suite solution. Should an inspection identify insufficiencies in your racking, we can coordinate the removal, and repair or installation of new rack. We facilitate permitting, produce drawings and offer custom engineered storage solutions. PRIBC is also equipped to provide scheduled inspections or train your employees to self-report through our custom, app-based software.

Your storage needs are unique, so let us customize a strategy for your racking.

Call us for a free, no obligation consultation: 1-800-638-0427

Description:
For over 31 years we have been providing exceptional services in assembly, warehousing, and fulfillment.  Propeller, Inc. is a full-service 3PL.

What can we do for you?  We can assemble your device or build your kit.  We can re-work or test your product.  We can help you design a package or point-of-purchase (POP) display.  If you have a “powdery” type material we can fill 40 jars per minute and then seal with an induction sealer.  If your material is a liquid or a cream, we have Simplex volumetric filling machines that can do that job.   Propeller, Inc. started in 1991.  Most recently, however,  we have been assembling 25,000 Covid Testing Kits per day and packing them into retail POP displays destined for Costco.            

We would love to become one of your sub-contractors.   We have a 40,000 square foot warehouse with truck high docks to facilitate receiving your materials.  We have many experienced hands available pitch in and help with a project - big or small.  

Here is  a short list some of the equipment we have available for your project:

Enercon Induction sealer, Shrink wrappers, Case erectors, Carton sealers, Heat tunnels, Banding machines, Label print and apply machines, Date code printing, Conveyors, SpeeDee brand powder cup filler, Simplex liquid fillers, Bottle cappers, RF blister pack sealing machine, Pallet wrappers,
Bottle labelers,  Check weighers, Hot glue machine, Wafer seal applicators, bar code scanners and more.  Most importantly, we have a group of dedicated, terrific people who want you to succeed.  Give us a call at 801-221-5999!

As a Distribution Center
We consolidate your products in one location, where we assist you to receive all your products from different vendors around the world, and we assist to ship them to your other business locations or retail shops per instruction. We usually ship in bulk quantity with pallet. 

As a Fulfillment Center
We assist you to pick and pack your online customer’s order and send directly to them. Usually deal with EA (each quantity) to your retail customer such as Amazon, eBay or Walmart.com buyer.
1. Pick and Pack plus promotional material for shipping
2. Remove outer box into smaller unit for shipping
3. Return authorization and sorting merchandise

Cross Docking Service
To provide customer a central site where we quickly sort the items and later on to be delivered to multiple destinations in the most productive way with an efficient cost and time.
To serve to combine several small shipments in one site and ship out in one transportation method to save the shipping cost

Advantages of Cross Docking
for large or small items?
• No need a large warehouse space
• Reducing labor fee
• Reducing storage fee
• Transportation has fuller load

distribution cost will be reduced

Name: Plano Data
Description:
Company History
Plano Data was organized as a Texas corporation in early 1995 in response to a need by the oil industry for experienced technical data management services. Jim McCullor and Bill Smith co-founded the company and on July 1, 1995, were awarded a long term contract from a major oil company. Other exploration and production clients were soon included in the client base. In addition, records management services to the health care industry were added to promote corporate stability through diversification. Additional support functions such as document imaging were developed in order to become a more complete data management service.

In response to growth and an accompanying need for additional space, Plano Data moved to a spacious new facility in June 2004 built to company specifications and requirements. 

Mission
Provide quality, cost effective records and data management services with an emphasis on practical, cost effective solutions. 

Maintain a keen respect for data confidentiality and integrity. 

Consider each client to be of equal value. 

Form alliances and partnerships as necessary to offer complete data management packages.

Name: We Think Software Solutions
Description:
STREAMLINE Warehouse Management System is a subscription based Inventory Management System.  There are no up-front costs.  Pay by the month and cancel at anytime!  It is not a capital expense; it is a monthly budgeted item.  Treat it like your phone or electric bill.  (Actually, it will probably cost a lot less!)  There’s a concept...  Solve all your inventory headaches for less than the cost of your monthly phone bill!



STREAMLINE Warehouse Management System is a hosted solution, which means you don’t have to deal with anything more technical than making sure you have a PC with a high-speed internet connection.  (Cable, DSL, T1, etc.)  You just log on and use the system.  From anywhere – Your warehouse or your living room.  It is that simple. 
 

Here is what we will not do: We will NOT send you a CD and tell you to install your new inventory management system on your “server”.  Or send you an email telling you to download a file and install a new “patch” to fix a problem.  Those headaches are gone.  We handle all the version upgrades, enhancements, and yes, the occasional bug fix, completely behind the scenes.  When you log on, you are always using the most up to date version of the system.

STREAMLINE Warehouse Management System  is a perfect solution for all your warehousing needs.

Sabemos que la logística puede convertirse en un cuello de botella para los emprendedores y empresas que están escalando. Por eso diseñamos un servicio flexible que se adapta al volumen de cada negocio, desde startups hasta marcas consolidadas.

 Servicios principales:

Recepción y almacenamiento seguro de productos.

Preparación de pedidos (picking & packing) con procesos optimizados.

Integración con plataformas eCommerce (Shopify, Tiendanube, WooCommerce, Mercado Libre).

Gestión de envíos y seguimiento.

Reportes de stock en tiempo real.

 Beneficios para tu negocio:

Reducís costos fijos y convertís tu logística en variable.

Enfocás tu tiempo en vender y hacer crecer tu marca, no en preparar pedidos.

Mejorás la experiencia de tus clientes con entregas más rápidas y confiables.

Nuestra misión es que cada eCommerce pueda competir en igualdad de condiciones con grandes jugadores, sin tener que invertir en depósitos propios, personal extra o procesos complejos.

 Si vendés online y querés escalar tus ventas sin dolores de cabeza logísticos, podemos ayudarte.

Name: CaSSOA
Description:
CaSSOA (Caravan Storage Site Owners’ Association).
We represent caravan storage site owners’ across the UK and work towards minimising caravan theft by promoting the highest levels of security.

CaSSOA caravan storage sites are surveyed and accredited based on security and our members enjoy a range of benefits including the recognition of the high standard of storage provided and insurance discounts for their customers. 

We will set the standards and best practice for secure storage within the industry.
 Promote caravan and motorhome storage in the UK.
 Provide opportunities for members to network and share best practice via forums and annual events

Since 1999, we have grown significantly and now work with over 450 secure storage sites across the UK. All our accredited caravan storage sites are independently assessed for security features, access and amenities to make sure they provide superior levels of protection from theft.

CaSSOA is a recognised membership body providing security accreditations, many insurance companies offer policy discounts for vehicles stored on secure CaSSOA sites due to our commitment in reducing caravan thefts.

If you are a storage site owner and would like more information about CaSSOA membership please browse our website or feel free to contact us.

The everyday wear and tear from warehouse operations ultimately increase the structural stress levels of your storage handling equipment.  This affects the structural integrity and load bearing capacity, making your storage handling equipment potentially unsafe.  That’s why regular assessment is essential.  Our reliable storage handling equipment inspection, audit and repair services help you to ensure that your storage handling equipment is safe to use and capable of providing the highest levels of productivity in your warehouse.

We also have the expertise to install, dismantle, and relocating of your storage handling equipment.  

We can help you:
•	Identify and report problems before they become serious
•	Confirm the safety, integrity and reliability of your storage handling equipment
•	Minimise the risk of workplace accidents or storage handling equipment collapsing
•	Ensure worker safety and prevent injury, loss of life, heavy fines, compensation claims, legal actions, and insurance claims (not paying out) as a result of faulty storage handling equipment.
•	Maintain safety standards and comply with international standards. 

As Africa’s leader in storage handling equipment inspection, audit and repair services, we offer you unrivalled expertise, ensuring the reliability and safety of all your storage handling equipment.

All inspections are carried out according to European Standards EN15512, EN15620, EN15635, EN15878, SEMA, and ASIB.

To discuss how our inspection, audit, and repair services could benefit your company contact us today.

DOCUMENT SHREDDING. We offer a variety of services to meet your needs -- from shredding in one of our mobile trucks at your location to picking up your documents and transporting them to our secure facility for shredding. We also offer No Appointment Necessary services; drop off your documents Monday through Friday, between 9 am-5 pm, or attend one of our Saturday Shred Fests. And you don’t need to worry about how we handle your documents; we’ve been AAA Certified by the National Association for Information Destruction, which means you can trust that your documents will be securely shredded by only us in our secure facility.

We use cutting-edge bar-coding and inventory-tracking equipment, enabling us to retrieve your boxes and/or individual files at a moment’s notice. We charge only $59/month for your first 230 standard bankers boxes – among the lowest in the Chicagoland area.

Paper Tiger is an independent, family owned and operated company committed to providing customers with peace of mind, reliable quality service, and highly competitive rates. Ask about our Satisfaction Guarantee!

Name: BSB Warehouse
Description:
Our dedicated storage warehouse facilities provide customers with secure, compliant, discreet, high-quality storage for their lithium-ion batteries.

What We Store?
Electric Vehicle Battery Storage
Manufacturing electric vehicles involves a complex logistical production chain.  The storage of batteries on site is inconvenient, increases liability by holding potentially volatile items, takes up production space and adds another tier of operational detail.  All of this detracts from the core activity – manufacturing.  We maintain an off-site store of batteries ready for ‘just-in-time’ delivery and fulfilling manufacturers’ warranty commitments.

Energy Battery Storage
Batteries used to store renewable energy need to arrive with their customers in optimum condition and at the right time.  Manufacturers and installers do not want to store them for long periods with the associated liability, space requirement and delivery challenges.  We solve those problems by providing an off-site store of batteries ready for ‘just-in-time’ delivery.

Other Battery Storage
We have the specialist facilities and experience to store all new lithium batteries.  In circumstances where a manufacturer or end-user site storage is not convenient or potentially safe we are happy to discuss alternatives within our facilities.

If you would like to discuss your storage needs for new lithium-ion batteries please contact us on: 
info@batterystoragebox.com / https://www.batterystoragebox.com/

E-Commerce Fulfillment: We manage the picking, packing, and shipping of products for e-commerce businesses. This includes handling orders, storing inventory, and ensuring timely deliveries to customers.

Cross-Docking: We facilitate the direct transfer of goods from inbound to outbound transportation, minimizing storage time and improving the speed of deliveries.

Container Unloading: You handle the unloading of containers, ensuring that products are quickly and safely transferred to the warehouse for further processing or distribution.

Storage: We offer warehouse space for storing goods, providing inventory management and tracking to ensure efficient stock control.

These services are critical for businesses looking to scale operations, reduce costs, and enhance customer satisfaction, especially in the fast-paced world of e-commerce and logistics.

Name: Help Ukraine Center
Description:
The largest Ukrainian logistics companies have joined the Help Ukraine Center volunteer initiative to create the Eastern European warehouses and infrastructure network that will ensure prompt engaging and shipping the humanitarian supplies to Ukraine.
The project was created with the participation of TIS, Rozetka, Fozzy Group, Horizon Capital and others.
The companies deploy warehouses for humanitarian supplies in border cities of the Eastern Europe and establish logistic chains that makes it possible to deliver cargo to Ukraine as
soon as feasible. At present, two such hubs operate: Lublin (Poland) and Huși (Romania).
Anyone throughout the world can ship the no-address assistance to one of the Help Ukraine Center’s warehouses. Humanitarian and medical supplies will be safely transported to Ukraine and transferred for further distribution to the Ministry of Health, the Ministry of Reintegration of Temporarily Occupied Territories, the Armed Forces of Ukraine and city humanitarian centers. Help Ukraine Center also works towards fundraising with the help of the partner Ernst Prost Foundation/Menshen fur Frieden charity foundation in Germany. All monies raised by the fund are used to purchase the necessary supplies and transport them to Ukraine.
Help Ukraine Center handles up to 50 trucks with cargo daily. At least 150 volunteers are working daily at the Center’s locations.
The Help Ukraine Center initiative is publicly supported by the singer Sting, the actress Jennifer Aniston, the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development President Odile Renaud-Basso, Ukraine’s Ambassador to Poland Andrii Deshchytsia, and many others.
In order to help Help Ukraine Center, you can: 1. ship the cargo;
2. make a charity payment;
3. come and become a volunteer;
4. share about the Center’s work in social and mass media.

我們搭配最先進的科技設備與系統作來營運超過4.5萬坪以上的倉儲空間，相當於七個台北小巨蛋的面積，目前已進駐永聯物流園區分別是：台北園區、大園園區，服務超過100家國內外品牌客戶。藉由經驗發現：同類型的產品會需要相似的物流加工處理需求，我們透過設置產業專倉—紅酒專倉、電商專倉、美妝專倉、鞋服專倉、統合倉儲，聚集產業規模與需求，讓中小型企業也能共享大規模的服務品質。

Working at ALS
給員工更好的工作環境，提供多樣的學習及成長的空間。透過整合領先業界的智慧物流科技設備，搭配即時的資料運算來減少作業中的錯誤率；把重複性高的任務交給科技來協助，減少重複性工作的人力耗損，讓每位特捷同仁可以在發揮在更有價值的物流服務上面，大幅提升團隊整體營運效率！同時我們重視每一位員工的工作情緒，除了鋪設減輕站立疲勞的減壓地墊、提供員工中午休息舒適的空間，工作中更安排固定休息時間，避免長時間的工作疲勞。

Name: The Logistics Terminal
Description:
Port Centric Solutions
For years, importers of freight have incurred the financial and environmental costs of pointlessly hauling containers, weighing up to forty four tonnes, hundreds of miles across the UK only for each container to be returned to the port empty.
Quite simply, the port centric logistics solution offered by TLT enables cargo owners to gain control of both supply-chain costs and the timely delivery of their goods directly from the port Warehousing Solution straight to their customers.
Carbon emissions are significantly reduced by TLT quickly offloading the container at the Port. The empty container is immediately returned to the Exporting Berth, allowing shipping lines to achieve a faster turnaround.
Additionally, TLT offers a complete logistics solution for onward delivery of de-vanned products. This includes everything from palletised loads through to non-palletised freight which is achieved through partnerships with leading pallet distribution network, Pall-Ex and 2,500 haulage companies around the UK as well as using their own modern fleet of vehicles.

Name: SunRing Enterprise Co.,Ltd
Description:
Sunring Enterprise is a well-established manufacturing company with over 30 years experience in the field of material handling and warehousing.  

Our unique, high-density pallet storage systems, carton storage and handling products,  and contract manufacturing services have satisfied the needs of countless private and public organizations around the world.  

What makes Sunring products stand out from the crowd? Our absolute commitment to manufacturing and providing quality products that will meet or exceed client expectations in terms of performance and durability.
This vision and determination has greatly contributed in helping Sunring penetrate new markets around the world including the United States and Canada..

Our most successful products include Flow-Rail and Spring-Rail - two truly unique high density pushback storage systems that can be installed on existing racks with no special beams required.  The tracks of both systems are perfectly horizontal which helps maximize vertical space and often allow an extra storage level with all the cost savings and benefits this can provide.
Sunring also offers a multitude of high-quality carton storage systems, carton flow beds and conveyor systems. 

Aside from material handling and warehouse, Sunring is also known for its innovative Vertical Farming System products & Home Vertical Hydroponic Systems.  
For more information on Sunring or Sunring products please visit our website.   
ISO9001:2000 certified

Name: 24H Frost
Description:
The fully automatic cold store 24H Frost is one of the most modern generation of freezing and logistics centers in Northern France. We are located in the strongly growing and dynamic port of Loon-Plage, a borough of Dunkirk. Dunkirk, the center of the Paris-London-Brussels triangle, offers a potential market of more than 100 million consumers!
24H FROST is ideally situated on the "fast quays" (quais du port rapide) in Loon-Plage. Known international food groups already transport their frozen products from Loon-Plage to regular destinations in the UK, the Caribbean, the Middle East and beyond. In addition, the number of lines to other destinations is increasing every year.

At the end of August 2019, the new deep-frozen storage facility -22 ° C will be available at the port of Dunkirk (Loon-Plage). You will be able to store from 1 to 10,000 pallets.

In addition, we offer the following services:

•	Your container directly to the port
•	Customs formalities are arranged for you
•	Cross docking
•	Customized labels
•	Stacking pallets
•	Order picking
•	Load without pallets

Description: La CMC srl di Orta Nova (FG) è una socità di servizi che opera per conto terzi, le principali attività sono lo stoccaggio di cereali, prodotti per l'agricoltura e pellets e il loro insacco e commercializzazione. La sede si estende su una superficie di 33.000 mq ed è situata alla periferia di Orta Nova (FG) nel cuore del Tavoliere delle Puglie e al centro di Strade Statali di grande comunicazione, autostrade e distante pochi km dall'importante porto industriale di Manfredonia. La struttura dello stabilimento comprende due palazzine di due livelli, una adibita ad uffici amministrativi, l'altra come abitazione del custode, un bilico a ponte elettronico, 16 silos in metallo da 500 tonnellate ciascuno, 15 silos in metallo da 1.500 tonnellate ciascuno, 2 tramogge con ribalta automezzi con una portata cadauna di tonnellate 110/ora che tramite linee di nastri trasportatori conferiscono il prodotto nella cella di destinazione. Per quanto riguarda i depositi, disponiamo di n. 4 capannoni e un ampio piazzale asfaltato. Tra i nostri servizi vi sono: l'insacco di prodotti per l'agricoltura e di pellets destinati al riscaldamento, il servizio di deposito conto terzi di questi prodotti, lo stoccaggio di cereai nei silos e la commercializzazione dei pellets.

Name: INVENTORYPRO
Description:
InventoryPRO основана в 2018 году, и специализируется на проведении независимых инвентаризаций любого уровня сложности. Сегодня компания ведет свою деятельность в Украине, Молдавии, Румынии. 

За период своего существования мы достигли существенных результатов развития, и имеем уникальный опыт в сфере инвентаризации ритейла, логистических центров, а также внедрения систем для автоматизации складских операций. 

Компания имеет собственный учебный центр, что позволяет постоянно повышать скорость и качество работы своих сотрудников. 
 
Учитывая наш опыт и пожелания наших европейских заказчиков, нами был разработан уникальный программный продукт. Инструменты которые мы используем позволяет быстро и точно провести инвентаризацию, а также быстро обработать и предоставить результаты заказчику. Результаты инвентаризации могут быть получены в реальном времени, и импортированы в учетную систему предприятия заказчика. Наличие данного инструмента позволяет нам сократить время проведения инвентаризации до 50%. В итоге это позволяет сократить задействованные человеческие ресурсы, что в свою очередь уменьшит стоимость работ.

Нами разработаны методологии проведения инвентаризаций для различных типов объектов, которые позволяют максимально эффективно и качественно провести инвентаризацию на объекте любой сложности.

La CISS est également membre fondateur de FEDESSA, la Fédération européenne du self-stockage, et contribue chaque année au rapport européen du secteur en partenariat avec CBRE.

Que vous soyez un acteur établi ou que vous découvriez le marché, vous avez votre place au sein de notre réseau.

 Rejoignez notre communauté et participez à l’avenir du self-stockage en France !

Name: Energreen Nutrition Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
Energreen Nutrition supplies an extensive range of feed ingredients to Australian producers, including protein meals, fibres, energy (vegetable oils), phosphates and feed additives.

Energreen Nutrition provides canola, soybean, sunflower, cottonseed, protein meals, fibre and oils from our associated companies, Cootamundra Oil Seeds and Australian Oil Seed Processors. We also import and distribute copra meal, soybean meal and soyhull fibre from AQIS approved facilities.

Energreen Nutrition has been marketing soy products, finished feeds, starch-based pellets, and Australian cold-pressed oils into New Zealand for over 20 years.  We have also worked with our Malaysian suppliers of soy products for over 16 years, and source our copra meal from Solomon Island growers who are part of the Lindt sustainable copra production project in the region.

Name: Global Parcel Service US Inc
Description:
Established in 2018, Global Parcel Service Inc.(GPS) offers comprehensive range of e-commerce services.
GPS’s global network of offices, partners, last mile couriers, and alliances enable us to provide to most cost-effective solutions to our customers. We manage millions of e-commerce packages monthly to and from Asia, Europe, and the Americas.

Our familiarity with local customs and regulatory requirements puts us in a unique position to address the increasing global needs of our client such as finding capacity quickly in a competitive market or navigate a customs issue.

Our ground-breaking technology platform allows live tracking of your goods and enables tremendous efficiency in clearing your goods through customs.

Our goal is to provide you with an exception level of service that is easy and effortless. Our e-commerce and logistics specialist will analyze your unique logistics needs and recommend a customized solution that will meet both your budget and timeline. An account manager is assigned to manage your shipment and to act as your single point of contact throughout the journey, from start to finish.

We have the network, the expertise, and the dedication to meet your e-commerce and logistics in a timely manner. We assure you that your goods will be delivered safely to your customers.
